Authors: Xingtai Gui, Meijie Zhang, Tianyi Yan, Wencheng Han, Jiahao Gong, Feiyang Tan, Cheng-zhong Xu, Jianbing Shen

FAR-Drive: Frame-AutoRegressive Video Generation in Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving

Abstract (English): Despite rapid progress in autonomous driving, reliable training and evaluation of driving systems remain fundamentally constrained by the lack of scalable and interactive simulation environments. Recent generative video models achieve remarkable visual fidelity, yet most operate in open-loop settings and fail to support fine-grained frame-level interaction between agent actions and environment evolution. Building a learning-based closed-loop simulator for autonomous driving poses three major challenges: maintaining long-horizon temporal and cross-view consistency, mitigating autoregressive degradation under iterative self-conditioning, and satisfying low-latency inference constraints. In this work, we propose FAR-Drive, a frame-level autoregressive video generation framework for autonomous driving. We introduce a multi-view diffusion transformer with fine-grained structured control, enabling geometrically consistent multi-camera generation. To address long-horizon consistency and iterative degradation, we design a two-stage training strategy consisting of adaptive reference horizon conditioning and blend-forcing autoregressive training, which progressively improves consistency and robustness under self-conditioning. To meet low-latency interaction requirements, we further integrate system-level efficiency optimizations for inference acceleration. Experiments on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among existing closed-loop autonomous driving simulation approaches, while maintaining sub-second latency on a single GPU.

摘要（中文）: 尽管自动驾驶领域取得了快速进展，但由于缺乏可扩展和交互式的仿真环境，驾驶系统的可靠训练和评估仍然受到根本限制。近年来，生成式视频模型在视觉逼真度方面取得显著成果，但大多数在开环设置下运行，并且无法支持智能体动作和环境演化之间细粒度的帧级别交互。为自动驾驶构建基于学习的闭环模拟器面临三大挑战：维持长时程的时间和跨视角一致性、减轻迭代自条件化下的自回归衰退，以及满足低延迟推理约束。本文提出FAR-Drive，一种用于自动驾驶的帧级别自回归视频生成框架。我们引入了一个具有细粒度结构化控制的多视角扩散Transformer，实现了几何一致的多摄像头生成。为了解决长时程一致性和迭代衰退问题，我们设计了一个两阶段训练策略，包括自适应参考时程条件化和混合强制自回归训练，逐步提高自条件化下的连贯性和鲁棒性。为了满足低延迟交互需求，我们进一步集成了系统级效率优化以加速推理。在nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在现有闭环自动驾驶仿真方法中实现了最先进的性能，同时在单个GPU上保持亚秒级延迟。

TLDR: FAR-Drive introduces a frame-autoregressive video generation framework for closed-loop autonomous driving simulation, featuring multi-view diffusion transformers and a two-stage training strategy for improved consistency and low-latency inference.

简要说明: FAR-Drive 提出了一个用于闭环自动驾驶模拟的帧自回归视频生成框架，其特点是多视角扩散变换器和两阶段训练策略，以提高一致性和低延迟推理。

Relevance: (9/10)

Authors: Yaoru Li, Federico Landi, Marco Godi, Xin Jin, Ruiju Fu, Yufei Ma, Muyang Sun, Heyu Si, Qi Guo

Visual Confused Deputy: Exploiting and Defending Perception Failures in Computer-Using Agents

Abstract (English): Computer-using agents (CUAs) act directly on graphical user interfaces, yet their perception of the screen is often unreliable. Existing work largely treats these failures as performance limitations, asking whether an action succeeds, rather than whether the agent is acting on the correct object at all. We argue that this is fundamentally a security problem. We formalize the visual confused deputy: a failure mode in which an agent authorizes an action based on a misperceived screen state, due to grounding errors, adversarial screenshot manipulation, or time-of-check-to-time-of-use (TOCTOU) races. This gap is practically exploitable: even simple screen-level manipulations can redirect routine clicks into privileged actions while remaining indistinguishable from ordinary agent mistakes. To mitigate this threat, we propose the first guardrail that operates outside the agent's perceptual loop. Our method, dual-channel contrastive classification, independently evaluates (1) the visual click target and (2) the agent's reasoning about the action against deployment-specific knowledge bases, and blocks execution if either channel indicates risk. The key insight is that these two channels capture complementary failure modes: visual evidence detects target-level mismatches, while textual reasoning reveals dangerous intent behind visually innocuous controls. Across controlled attacks, real GUI screenshots, and agent traces, the combined guardrail consistently outperforms either channel alone. Our results suggest that CUA safety requires not only better action generation, but independent verification of what the agent believes it is clicking and why. Materials are provided\footnote{Model, benchmark, and code: https://github.com/vllm-project/semantic-router}.

摘要（中文）: 使用计算机的代理（CUAs）直接在图形用户界面上执行操作，但它们对屏幕的感知通常是不可靠的。现有的工作主要将这些失败视为性能限制，关注的是动作是否成功，而不是代理是否作用于正确的对象。我们认为这本质上是一个安全问题。我们形式化了视觉混淆代理：一种失效模式，在此模式下，由于接地误差、对抗性屏幕截图操作或检查时间到使用时间（TOCTOU）竞争，代理基于错误感知的屏幕状态授权操作。这种差距具有实际可利用性：即使是简单的屏幕级操作也可以将常规点击重定向到特权操作，同时仍然与普通的代理错误无法区分。为了缓解这种威胁，我们提出了第一个在代理感知循环之外运行的护栏。我们的方法，双通道对比分类，独立评估（1）视觉点击目标和（2）代理对操作的推理，并将其与特定于部署的知识库进行对比，如果任一通道指示存在风险，则阻止执行。关键的洞察在于，这两个通道捕获了互补的失效模式：视觉证据检测目标级别的错配，而文本推理则揭示了视觉上无害的控件背后的危险意图。在受控攻击、真实GUI屏幕截图和代理跟踪中，组合护栏始终优于单独的任何一个通道。我们的结果表明，CUA的安全性不仅需要更好的动作生成，还需要独立验证代理认为它所点击的内容以及原因。我们提供了相关材料\footnote{模型、基准测试和代码：https://github.com/vllm-project/semantic-router}。

TLDR: The paper identifies a security vulnerability in computer-using agents (CUAs) called 'visual confused deputy' where agents misperceive screen states, and proposes a 'dual-channel contrastive classification' guardrail to mitigate this threat.

简要说明: 本文指出计算机使用代理（CUA）中存在一种名为“视觉混淆副手”的安全漏洞，即代理错误感知屏幕状态，并提出了一种“双通道对比分类”安全措施来缓解这一威胁。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Xunzhuo Liu, Bowei He, Xue Liu, Andy Luo, Haichen Zhang, Huamin Chen

GNNVerifier: Graph-based Verifier for LLM Task Planning

Abstract (English): Large language models (LLMs) facilitate the development of autonomous agents. As a core component of such agents, task planning aims to decompose complex natural language requests into concrete, solvable sub-tasks. Since LLM-generated plans are frequently prone to hallucinations and sensitive to long-context prom-pts, recent research has introduced plan verifiers to identify and correct potential flaws. However, most existing approaches still rely on an LLM as the verifier via additional prompting for plan review or self-reflection. LLM-based verifiers can be misled by plausible narration and struggle to detect failures caused by structural relations across steps, such as type mismatches, missing intermediates, or broken dependencies. To address these limitations, we propose a graph-based verifier for LLM task planning. Specifically, the proposed method has four major components: Firstly, we represent a plan as a directed graph with enriched attributes, where nodes denote sub-tasks and edges encode execution order and dependency constraints. Secondly, a graph neural network (GNN) then performs structural evaluation and diagnosis, producing a graph-level plausibility score for plan acceptance as well as node/edge-level risk scores to localize erroneous regions. Thirdly, we construct controllable perturbations from ground truth plan graphs, and automatically generate training data with fine-grained annotations. Finally, guided by the feedback from our GNN verifier, we enable an LLM to conduct local edits (e.g., tool replacement or insertion) to correct the plan when the graph-level score is insufficient. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets, backbone LLMs, and planners demonstrate that our GNNVerifier achieves significant gains in improving plan quality. Our data and code is available at https://github.com/BUPT-GAMMA/GNNVerifier.

摘要（中文）: 大型语言模型（LLMs）促进了自主代理的开发。作为此类代理的核心组成部分，任务规划旨在将复杂的自然语言请求分解为具体、可解决的子任务。由于LLM生成的计划经常容易出现幻觉，并且对长上下文提示敏感，最近的研究引入了计划验证器来识别和纠正潜在的缺陷。然而，大多数现有方法仍然依赖于LLM作为验证器，通过额外的提示来进行计划审查或自我反思。基于LLM的验证器可能会被看似合理的叙述所误导，并且难以检测由跨步骤的结构关系引起的故障，例如类型不匹配、缺少中间环节或依赖关系断裂。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种用于LLM任务规划的基于图的验证器。具体来说，所提出的方法包含四个主要组成部分：首先，我们将计划表示为一个带有丰富属性的有向图，其中节点表示子任务，边表示执行顺序和依赖约束。其次，图神经网络 (GNN) 执行结构评估和诊断，生成计划接受的图级别合理性分数，以及节点/边级别的风险分数，以定位错误区域。第三，我们从真实计划图构建可控的扰动，并自动生成带有细粒度注释的训练数据。最后，在来自GNN验证器的反馈指导下，我们使LLM能够进行局部编辑（例如，工具替换或插入）以在图级别分数不足时更正计划。跨各种数据集、骨干LLM和规划器的广泛实验表明，我们的GNNVerifier在提高计划质量方面取得了显著的收益。我们的数据和代码可在https://github.com/BUPT-GAMMA/GNNVerifier上获取。

TLDR: This paper introduces GNNVerifier, a graph-based approach to verify and correct task plans generated by Large Language Models (LLMs), addressing limitations of existing LLM-based verifiers. It uses a GNN to evaluate plan structure and enable LLM-based plan editing.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了GNNVerifier，一种基于图的方法来验证和纠正大型语言模型(LLM)生成的任务计划，解决了现有基于LLM验证器的局限性。它使用GNN评估计划结构，并支持基于LLM的计划编辑。

Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yu Hao, Qiuyu Wang, Cheng Yang, Yawen Li, Zhiqiang Zhang, Chuan Shi

Learning to Order: Task Sequencing as In-Context Optimization

Abstract (English): Task sequencing (TS) is one of the core open problems in Deep Learning, arising in a plethora of real-world domains, from robotic assembly lines to autonomous driving. Unfortunately, prior work has not convincingly demonstrated the generalization ability of meta-learned TS methods to solve new TS problems, given few initial demonstrations. In this paper, we demonstrate that deep neural networks can meta-learn over an infinite prior of synthetically generated TS problems and achieve a few-shot generalization. We meta-learn a transformer-based architecture over datasets of sequencing trajectories generated from a prior distribution that samples sequencing problems as paths in directed graphs. In a large-scale experiment, we provide ample empirical evidence that our meta-learned models discover optimal task sequences significantly quicker than non-meta-learned baselines.

摘要（中文）: 任务排序(TS)是深度学习中的一个核心开放问题，它出现在从机器人装配线到自动驾驶等诸多现实世界领域。不幸的是，先前的工作尚未令人信服地证明元学习的TS方法在给定少量初始演示的情况下解决新的TS问题的泛化能力。在本文中，我们证明了深度神经网络可以对无限先验的合成生成的TS问题进行元学习，并实现小样本泛化。我们对基于Transformer的架构进行元学习，其训练数据集是从先验分布中生成的排序轨迹，该先验分布将排序问题采样为有向图中的路径。在一个大规模实验中，我们提供了充分的经验证据表明，我们的元学习模型比非元学习的基线模型更快地发现最优任务序列。

TLDR: This paper presents a meta-learning approach using transformers to learn task sequencing policies from synthetic data, demonstrating improved few-shot generalization compared to non-meta-learned methods, which is very useful in RL environment.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种使用Transformer的元学习方法，从合成数据中学习任务排序策略，与非元学习方法相比，展示了更好的少样本泛化能力，这在强化学习环境中非常有用。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jan Kobiolka, Christian Frey, Arlind Kadra, Gresa Shala, Josif Grabocka

Perception-Aware Autonomous Exploration in Feature-Limited Environments

Abstract (English): Autonomous exploration in unknown environments typically relies on onboard state estimation for localisation and mapping. Existing exploration methods primarily maximise coverage efficiency, but often overlook that visual-inertial odometry (VIO) performance strongly depends on the availability of robust visual features. As a result, exploration policies can drive a robot into feature-sparse regions where tracking degrades, leading to odometry drift, corrupted maps, and mission failure. We propose a hierarchical perception-aware exploration framework for a stereo-equipped unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) that explicitly couples exploration progress with feature observability. Our approach (i) associates each candidate frontier with an expected feature quality using a global feature map, and prioritises visually informative subgoals, and (ii) optimises a continuous yaw trajectory along the planned motion to maintain stable feature tracks. We evaluate our method in simulation across environments with varying texture levels and in real-world indoor experiments with largely textureless walls. Compared to baselines that ignore feature quality and/or do not optimise continuous yaw, our method maintains more reliable feature tracking, reduces odometry drift, and achieves on average 30\% higher coverage before the odometry error exceeds specified thresholds.

摘要（中文）: 在未知环境中进行自主探索通常依赖于机载状态估计来进行定位和建图。现有的探索方法主要关注覆盖效率最大化，但往往忽略了视觉惯性里程计(VIO)的性能强烈依赖于鲁棒视觉特征的可用性。因此，探索策略可能将机器人驱动到特征稀疏区域，导致跟踪退化，进而产生里程计漂移、地图损坏和任务失败。我们提出了一种针对配备双目相机无人机(UAV)的分层感知探索框架，该框架将探索进展与特征可观测性显式地结合起来。我们的方法(i) 使用全局特征地图将每个候选前沿与预期特征质量相关联，并优先考虑视觉信息丰富的子目标，以及(ii) 优化沿规划运动的连续yaw轨迹，以保持稳定的特征跟踪。我们在具有不同纹理水平的环境中进行了仿真评估，并在纹理贫乏的真实室内环境中进行了实验评估。与忽略特征质量和/或不优化连续yaw的基线方法相比，我们的方法能够保持更可靠的特征跟踪，减少里程计漂移，并在里程计误差超过指定阈值之前，平均实现高出30%的覆盖率。

TLDR: This paper presents a perception-aware autonomous exploration framework for UAVs that considers feature observability to improve VIO performance and coverage in feature-limited environments, demonstrating improved performance over baselines in simulation and real-world experiments.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种感知自主探索框架，用于无人机在特征受限环境中，通过考虑特征可观测性来提高视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的性能和覆盖率。在模拟和真实世界实验中，该方法相对于基线方法表现出更好的性能。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Moji Shi, Rajitha de Silva, Hang Yu, Riccardo Polvara, Marija Popović

EAAE: Energy-Aware Autonomous Exploration for UAVs in Unknown 3D Environments

Abstract (English): Battery-powered multirotor unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) can rapidly map unknown environments, but mission performance is often limited by energy rather than geometry alone. Standard exploration policies that optimise for coverage or time can therefore waste energy through manoeuvre-heavy trajectories. In this paper, we address energy-aware autonomous 3D exploration for multirotor UAVs in initially unknown environments. We propose Energy-Aware Autonomous Exploration (EAAE), a modular frontier-based framework that makes energy an explicit decision variable during frontier selection. EAAE clusters frontiers into view-consistent regions, plans dynamically feasible candidate trajectories to the most informative clusters, and predicts their execution energy using an offline power estimation loop. The next target is then selected by minimising predicted trajectory energy while preserving exploration progress through a dual-layer planning architecture for safe execution. We evaluate EAAE in a full exploration pipeline with a rotor-speed-based power model across simulated 3D environments of increasing complexity. Compared to representative distance-based and information gain-based frontier baselines, EAAE consistently reduces total energy consumption while maintaining competitive exploration time and comparable map quality, providing a practical drop-in energy-aware layer for frontier exploration.

摘要（中文）: 基于电池供电的多旋翼无人机（UAV）能够快速绘制未知环境地图，但任务性能通常受到能量的限制，而非仅仅是几何因素。因此，优化覆盖率或时间的标准探索策略可能因频繁的机动轨迹而浪费能量。在本文中，我们研究了针对最初未知环境中多旋翼无人机的能量感知自主3D探索。我们提出了一种能量感知自主探索（EAAE）方案，这是一个模块化的基于边界的框架，该框架将能量作为边界选择过程中的一个显式决策变量。EAAE将边界聚类成视图一致的区域，规划到信息量最大的聚类的动态可行候选轨迹，并使用离线功率估算循环预测其执行能量。然后，通过最小化预测的轨迹能量来选择下一个目标，同时通过用于安全执行的双层规划架构来保持探索进度。我们通过一个完整的探索流程，使用基于旋翼转速的功率模型，在复杂度递增的模拟3D环境中评估EAAE。与具有代表性的基于距离和基于信息增益的边界基线相比，EAAE始终如一地降低了总能量消耗，同时保持了具有竞争力的探索时间和可比的地图质量，为边界探索提供了一个实用的即插即用的能量感知层。

TLDR: This paper presents an energy-aware autonomous exploration framework (EAAE) for UAVs in unknown 3D environments, reducing energy consumption while maintaining exploration efficiency compared to standard methods.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种用于无人机在未知3D环境中进行能量感知自主探索的框架（EAAE），与标准方法相比，它在保持探索效率的同时降低了能量消耗。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jacob Elskamp, Moji Shi, Leonard Bauersfeld, Davide Scaramuzza, Marija Popović

S2Act: Simple Spiking Actor

Abstract (English): Spiking neural networks (SNNs) and biologically-inspired learning mechanisms are attractive in mobile robotics, where the size and performance of onboard neural network policies are constrained by power and computational budgets. Existing SNN approaches, such as population coding, reward modulation, and hybrid artificial neural network (ANN)-SNN architectures, have shown promising results; however, they face challenges in complex, highly stochastic environments due to SNN sensitivity to hyperparameters and inconsistent gradient signals. To address these challenges, we propose simple spiking actor (S2Act), a computationally lightweight framework that deploys an RL policy using an SNN in three steps: (1) architect an actor-critic model based on an approximated network of rate-based spiking neurons, (2) train the network with gradients using compatible activation functions, and (3) transfer the trained weights into physical parameters of rate-based leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons for inference and deployment. By globally shaping LIF neuron parameters such that their rate-based responses approximate ReLU activations, S2Act effectively mitigates the vanishing gradient problem, while pre-constraining LIF response curves reduces reliance on complex SNN-specific hyperparameter tuning. We demonstrate our method in two multi-agent stochastic environments (capture-the-flag and parking) that capture the complexity of multi-robot interactions, and deploy our trained policies on physical TurtleBot platforms using Intel's Loihi neuromorphic hardware. Our experimental results show that S2Act outperforms relevant baselines in task performance and real-time inference in nearly all considered scenarios, highlighting its potential for rapid prototyping and efficient real-world deployment of SNN-based RL policies.

摘要（中文）: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）和生物启发式学习机制在移动机器人领域极具吸引力，该领域对车载神经网络策略的规模和性能提出了功耗和计算预算的限制。现有的SNN方法，例如群体编码、奖励调制和混合人工神经网络（ANN）-SNN架构，已经展现出令人鼓舞的结果；然而，由于SNN对超参数的敏感性以及梯度信号的不一致性，它们在复杂、高度随机的环境中面临挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种简单的尖峰行动者（S2Act），它是一个计算轻量级的框架，使用SNN通过三个步骤部署强化学习策略：（1）构建一个基于速率编码型尖峰神经元近似网络的行动者-评论家模型；（2）使用兼容的激活函数通过梯度训练该网络；（3）将训练好的权重转移到基于速率的漏电积分发放（LIF）神经元的物理参数中，用于推理和部署。通过全局调整LIF神经元的参数，使其速率编码的响应近似于ReLU激活，S2Act有效地缓解了梯度消失问题，同时预先约束LIF响应曲线降低了对复杂SNN特定超参数调优的依赖。我们在两个多智能体随机环境（夺旗和泊车）中演示了我们的方法，这两个环境捕捉了多机器人交互的复杂性，并使用英特尔的Loihi神经形态硬件在物理TurtleBot平台上部署了我们训练的策略。我们的实验结果表明，S2Act在几乎所有考虑的场景中都优于相关基线，在任务性能和实时推理方面均表现出色，突显了其在基于SNN的强化学习策略的快速原型设计和高效现实世界部署方面的潜力。

TLDR: The paper presents S2Act, a framework for deploying RL policies using spiking neural networks on resource-constrained robotic platforms. It trains a surrogate network and transfers weights to LIF neurons, demonstrating superior performance in multi-agent environments and real-world deployment.

简要说明: 该论文提出了S2Act，一个使用脉冲神经网络在资源受限的机器人平台上部署强化学习策略的框架。它训练一个替代网络并将权重转移到LIF神经元，证明了在多智能体环境和现实部署中具有卓越的性能。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Ugur Akcal, Seung Hyun Kim, Mikihisa Yuasa, Hamid Osooli, Jiarui Sun, Ribhav Sahu, Mattia Gazzola, Huy T. Tran, Girish Chowdhary

End-to-End Dexterous Grasp Learning from Single-View Point Clouds via a Multi-Object Scene Dataset

Abstract (English): Dexterous grasping in multi-object scene constitutes a fundamental challenge in robotic manipulation. Current mainstream grasping datasets predominantly focus on single-object scenarios and predefined grasp configurations, often neglecting environmental interference and the modeling of dexterous pre-grasp gesture, thereby limiting their generalizability in real-world applications. To address this, we propose DGS-Net, an end-to-end grasp prediction network capable of learning dense grasp configurations from single-view point clouds in multi-object scene. Furthermore, we propose a two-stage grasp data generation strategy that progresses from dense single-object grasp synthesis to dense scene-level grasp generation. Our dataset comprises 307 objects, 240 multi-object scenes, and over 350k validated grasps. By explicitly modeling grasp offsets and pre-grasp configurations, the dataset provides more robust and accurate supervision for dexterous grasp learning. Experimental results show that DGS-Net achieves grasp success rates of 88.63\% in simulation and 78.98\% on a real robotic platform, while exhibiting lower penetration with a mean penetration depth of 0.375 mm and penetration volume of 559.45 mm^3, outperforming existing methods and demonstrating strong effectiveness and generalization capability. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/4taotao8/DGS-Net.

摘要（中文）: 在多物体场景中进行灵巧抓取是机器人操作中一项根本性的挑战。目前主流的抓取数据集主要关注单物体场景和预定义的抓取配置，通常忽略环境干扰以及灵巧预抓取姿态的建模，从而限制了它们在实际应用中的泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了DGS-Net，一种端到端的抓取预测网络，能够从多物体场景的单视角点云中学习密集的抓取配置。此外，我们提出了一种两阶段的抓取数据生成策略，该策略从密集的单物体抓取合成进展到密集的场景级抓取生成。我们的数据集包含307个物体、240个多物体场景以及超过35万个经过验证的抓取。通过显式地建模抓取偏移和预抓取配置，该数据集为灵巧抓取学习提供了更稳健和准确的监督。实验结果表明，DGS-Net在仿真中实现了88.63%的抓取成功率，在真实的机器人平台上实现了78.98%的抓取成功率，同时展现出更低的穿透，平均穿透深度为0.375毫米，穿透体积为559.45立方毫米，优于现有方法，并展示了强大的有效性和泛化能力。我们的数据集可在https://github.com/4taotao8/DGS-Net上获取。

TLDR: This paper introduces DGS-Net, an end-to-end grasp prediction network and dataset for dexterous grasping in multi-object scenes using single-view point clouds, demonstrating promising simulation and real-world robot grasping results.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为DGS-Net的端到端抓取预测网络，并提出了一个用于多物体场景中灵巧抓取的单视角点云数据集，展示了有前景的模拟和真实机器人抓取结果。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tao Geng, Dapeng Yang, Ziwei Liu, Le Zhang, Le Qi, WangYang Li, Yi Ren, Shan Luo, Fenglei Ni

Coupled Particle Filters for Robust Affordance Estimation

Abstract (English): Robotic affordance estimation is challenging due to visual, geometric, and semantic ambiguities in sensory input. We propose a method that disambiguates these signals using two coupled recursive estimators for sub-aspects of affordances: graspable and movable regions. Each estimator encodes property-specific regularities to reduce uncertainty, while their coupling enables bidirectional information exchange that focuses attention on regions where both agree, i.e., affordances. Evaluated on a real-world dataset, our method outperforms three recent affordance estimators (Where2Act, Hands-as-Probes, and HRP) by 308%, 245%, and 257% in precision, and remains robust under challenging conditions such as low light or cluttered environments. Furthermore, our method achieves a 70% success rate in our real-world evaluation. These results demonstrate that coupling complementary estimators yields precise, robust, and embodiment-appropriate affordance predictions.

摘要（中文）: 由于感知输入中存在视觉、几何和语义歧义，机器人可供性估计极具挑战性。我们提出一种方法，使用两个耦合的递归估计器来消除这些信号的歧义，这两个估计器分别针对可供性的子方面：可抓握区域和可移动区域。每个估计器编码特定属性的规律性来减少不确定性，而它们的耦合实现了双向信息交换，从而将注意力集中在两者都一致的区域，即可供性。在真实世界数据集上的评估表明，我们的方法在精确度方面分别优于最近的三种可供性估计器（Where2Act、Hands-as-Probes 和 HRP）308%、245% 和 257%，并且在低光或杂乱环境等具有挑战性的条件下仍然保持稳健性。此外，我们的方法在真实世界的评估中实现了 70% 的成功率。这些结果表明，耦合互补的估计器可以产生精确、稳健且适合机器人自身物理特性的可供性预测。

TLDR: This paper introduces a novel method using coupled particle filters for robust robotic affordance estimation, outperforming existing methods in precision and robustness under challenging conditions.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种使用耦合粒子滤波器的新方法，用于鲁棒的机器人可供性估计，在精度和鲁棒性方面优于现有方法，即使在具有挑战性的条件下也是如此。

Relevance: (6/10)

Authors: Patrick Lowin, Vito Mengers, Oliver Brock

BodyGuards: Escorting by Multiple Robots in Unknown Environment under Limited Communication

Abstract (English): Multi-robot systems are increasingly deployed in high-risk missions such as reconnaissance, disaster response, and subterranean operations. Protecting a human operator while navigating unknown and adversarial environments remains a critical challenge, especially when the communication among the operator and robots is restricted. Unlike existing collaborative exploration methods that aim for complete coverage, this work focuses on task-oriented exploration to minimize the navigation time of the operator to reach its goal while ensuring safety under adversarial threats. A novel escorting framework BodyGuards, is proposed to explicitly integrate seamlessly collaborative exploration, inter-robot-operator communication and escorting. The framework consists of three core components: (I) a dynamic movement strategy for the operator that maintains a local map with risk zones for proactive path planning; (II) a dual-mode robotic strategy combining frontier based exploration with optimized return events to balance exploration, threat detection, and intermittent communication; and (III) multi-robot coordination protocols that jointly plan exploration and information sharing for efficient escorting. Extensive human-in-the-loop simulations and hardware experiments demonstrate that the method significantly reduces operator risk and mission time, outperforming baselines in adversarial and constrained environments.

摘要（中文）: 多机器人系统越来越多地被部署在高风险任务中，例如侦察、灾难响应和地下作业。在未知和对抗环境中导航的同时保护人类操作员仍然是一项关键挑战，尤其是在操作员和机器人之间的通信受限的情况下。与旨在实现完整覆盖的现有协同探索方法不同，这项工作侧重于面向任务的探索，以最大限度地减少操作员到达目标的导航时间，同时确保在对抗威胁下的安全性。本文提出了一种新颖的护送框架BodyGuards，它无缝集成了协同探索、机器人-操作员间的通信和护送。该框架由三个核心组件组成：（I）一种用于操作员的动态移动策略，该策略维护一个带有风险区域的局部地图，用于主动路径规划；（II）一种双模机器人策略，结合了基于边界的探索和优化的返回事件，以平衡探索、威胁检测和间歇性通信；以及（III）多机器人协调协议，该协议联合规划探索和信息共享，以实现高效的护送。大量的人在环仿真和硬件实验表明，该方法显著降低了操作员的风险和任务时间，在对抗和受限环境中优于基线方法。

TLDR: The paper introduces a multi-robot escorting framework called BodyGuards for protecting a human operator in unknown environments with limited communication, focusing on task-oriented exploration to minimize navigation time and operator risk.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为BodyGuards的多机器人护送框架，用于在通信受限的未知环境中保护人类操作员。该框架专注于面向任务的探索，旨在最小化导航时间和操作员风险。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: Zhuoli Tian, Yanze Bao, Meng Guo

AeroGrab: A Unified Framework for Aerial Grasping in Cluttered Environments

Abstract (English): Reliable aerial grasping in cluttered environments remains challenging due to occlusions and collision risks. Existing aerial manipulation pipelines largely rely on centroid-based grasping and lack integration between the grasp pose generation models, active exploration, and language-level task specification, resulting in the absence of a complete end-to-end system. In this work, we present an integrated pipeline for reliable aerial grasping in cluttered environments. Given a scene and a language instruction, the system identifies the target object and actively explores it to gain better views of the object. During exploration, a grasp generation network predicts multiple 6-DoF grasp candidates for each view. Each candidate is evaluated using a collision-aware feasibility framework, and the overall best grasp is selected and executed using standard trajectory generation and control methods. Experiments in cluttered real-world scenarios demonstrate robust and reliable grasp execution, highlighting the effectiveness of combining active perception with feasibility-aware grasp selection for aerial manipulation.

摘要（中文）: 摘要： 由于遮挡和碰撞风险，在杂乱环境中实现可靠的空中抓取仍然具有挑战性。现有的空中操作流程很大程度上依赖于基于质心的抓取，并且缺乏抓取姿态生成模型、主动探索和语言级任务规范之间的集成，导致缺乏完整的端到端系统。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个集成的流程，用于在杂乱环境中实现可靠的空中抓取。给定一个场景和一个语言指令，该系统识别目标物体并主动探索它，以获得更好的物体视角。在探索过程中，一个抓取生成网络为每个视角预测多个 6 自由度的抓取候选姿势。使用一个碰撞感知的可行性框架评估每个候选姿势，并使用标准轨迹生成和控制方法选择并执行总体上最佳的抓取姿势。在杂乱的真实世界场景中的实验表明了鲁棒且可靠的抓取执行，突出了将主动感知与可行性感知的抓取选择相结合进行空中操作的有效性。

TLDR: This paper introduces an integrated aerial grasping pipeline that combines active exploration, 6-DoF grasp generation, and collision-aware feasibility assessment to achieve reliable grasping in cluttered environments, guided by language instructions.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一个集成的空中抓取流程，结合了主动探索、六自由度抓取生成和碰撞感知可行性评估，以在混乱环境中实现可靠的抓取，并由语言指令引导。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Shivansh Pratap Singh, Naveen Sudheer Nair, Samaksh Ujjawal, Sarthak Mishra, Soham Patil, Rishabh Dev Yadav, Spandan Roy

Transformers As Generalizable Optimal Controllers

Abstract (English): We study whether optimal state-feedback laws for a family of heterogeneous Multiple-Input, Multiple-Output (MIMO) Linear Time-Invariant (LTI) systems can be captured by a single learned controller. We train one transformer policy on LQR-generated trajectories from systems with different state and input dimensions, using a shared representation with standardization, padding, dimension encoding, and masked loss. The policy maps recent state history to control actions without requiring plant matrices at inference time. Across a broad set of systems, it achieves empirically small sub-optimality relative to Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR), remains stabilizing under moderate parameter perturbations, and benefits from lightweight fine-tuning on unseen systems. These results support transformer policies as practical approximators of near-optimal feedback laws over structured linear-system families.

摘要（中文）: 我们研究了对于一类异构多输入多输出（MIMO）线性时不变（LTI）系统，是否可以使用单个学习控制器来捕获最优状态反馈控制律。我们使用具有标准化、填充、维度编码和掩码损失的共享表示，基于来自具有不同状态和输入维度的系统的LQR生成的轨迹训练了一个Transformer策略。该策略将最近的状态历史映射到控制行为，而无需在推理时使用系统矩阵。在广泛的系统集合中，相对于线性二次型调节器（LQR），该策略在经验上实现了较小的次优性，在适度的参数扰动下保持稳定，并能受益于对未见系统的轻量级微调。这些结果支持将Transformer策略作为结构化线性系统族近最优反馈控制律的实用逼近器。

TLDR: This paper explores using transformers to learn generalizable optimal controllers for MIMO LTI systems, showing near-optimal performance and stability across diverse systems with minimal fine-tuning.

简要说明: 本文研究了使用Transformer学习MIMO LTI系统通用最优控制器的方法，结果表明，该方法在不同的系统上能够实现接近最优的性能和稳定性，并只需进行少量微调。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Turki Bin Mohaya, Maitham F. AL-Sunni, John M. Dolan, Peter Seiler

From Folding Mechanics to Robotic Function: A Unified Modeling Framework for Compliant Origami

Abstract (English): Origami inspired architectures offer a powerful route toward lightweight, reconfigurable, and programmable robotic systems. Yet, a unified mechanics framework capable of seamlessly bridging rigid folding, elastic deformation, and stability driven transitions in compliant origami remains lacking. Here, we introduce a geometry consistent modeling framework based on discrete differential geometry (DDG) that unifies panel elasticity and crease rotation within a single variational formulation. By embedding crease panel coupling directly into a mid edge geometric discretization, the framework naturally captures rigid folding limits, distributed bending, multistability, and nonlinear dynamic snap through within one mechanically consistent structure. This unified description enables programmable control of stability and deformation across rigid and compliant regimes, allowing origami structures to transition from static folding mechanisms to active robotic modules. An implicit dynamic formulation incorporating gravity, contact, friction, and magnetic actuation further supports strongly coupled multiphysics simulations. Through representative examples spanning single fold bifurcation, deployable Miura membranes, bistable Waterbomb modules, and Kresling based crawling robots, we demonstrate how geometry driven mechanics directly informs robotic functionality. This work establishes discrete differential geometry as a foundational design language for intelligent origami robotics, enabling predictive modeling, stability programming, and mechanics guided robotic actuation within a unified computational platform.

摘要（中文）: 受折纸启发的结构为轻量化、可重构和可编程的机器人系统提供了一条有效的途径。然而，一个能够无缝连接刚性折叠、弹性变形和柔顺折纸中由稳定性驱动的跃迁的统一力学框架仍然缺失。在此，我们引入了一种基于离散微分几何（DDG）的几何一致性建模框架，在单个变分公式中统一了面板弹性和折痕旋转。通过将折痕-面板耦合直接嵌入到中间边几何离散化中，该框架可以在一个力学一致的结构中自然地捕捉刚性折叠极限、分散弯曲、多稳态和非线性动态屈曲。这种统一的描述使得能够对刚性和柔顺状态下的稳定性和变形进行可编程控制，从而使折纸结构能够从静态折叠机构转变为主动机器人模块。包含重力、接触、摩擦和磁力驱动的隐式动态公式进一步支持强耦合的多物理场仿真。通过涵盖单折分叉、可展开的Miura薄膜、双稳态Waterbomb模块和基于Kresling的爬行机器人的代表性例子，我们展示了几何驱动的力学如何直接影响机器人功能。这项工作将离散微分几何确立为智能折纸机器人的基础设计语言，从而在一个统一的计算平台中实现预测性建模、稳定性编程和力学引导的机器人驱动。

TLDR: This paper introduces a unified, geometry-consistent modeling framework based on discrete differential geometry (DDG) for compliant origami, enabling simulation and control of origami-based robotic systems across rigid, compliant, and dynamic regimes.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种统一的、几何一致的基于离散微分几何（DDG）的柔性折纸建模框架，能够在刚性、柔性和动态状态下模拟和控制基于折纸的机器人系统。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Bohan Zhang, Bo Wang, Huajiang Ouyang, Zhigang Wu, Haohao Bi, Jiawei Xu, Mingchao Liu, Weicheng Huang

ViSA: Visited-State Augmentation for Generalized Goal-Space Contrastive Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (GCRL) is a framework for learning a policy that can reach arbitrarily given goals. In particular, Contrastive Reinforcement Learning (CRL) provides a framework for policy updates using an approximation of the value function estimated via contrastive learning, achieving higher sample efficiency compared to conventional methods. However, since CRL treats the visited state as a pseudo-goal during learning, it can accurately estimate the value function only for limited goals. To address this issue, we propose a novel data augmentation approach for CRL called ViSA (Visited-State Augmentation). ViSA consists of two components: 1) generating augmented state samples, with the aim of augmenting hard-to-visit state samples during on-policy exploration, and 2) learning consistent embedding space, which uses an augmented state as auxiliary information to regularize the embedding space by reformulating the objective function of the embedding space based on mutual information. We evaluate ViSA in simulation and real-world robotic tasks and show improved goal-space generalization, which permits accurate value estimation for hard-to-visit goals. Further details can be found on the project page: \href{https://issa-n.github.io/projectPage_ViSA/}{\texttt{https://issa-n.github.io/projectPage\_ViSA/}}

摘要（中文）: 目标条件强化学习（GCRL）是一种学习能够达到任意给定目标的策略的框架。特别地，对比强化学习（CRL）提供了一个框架，通过使用对比学习估计的价值函数的近似值进行策略更新，与传统方法相比，实现了更高的样本效率。然而，由于CRL在学习过程中将访问过的状态视为伪目标，它只能准确地估计有限目标的价值函数。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的CRL数据增强方法，称为 ViSA（访问状态增强）。ViSA 由两个部分组成：1) 生成增强状态样本，旨在增强在线策略探索期间难以访问的状态样本；2) 学习一致的嵌入空间，该空间利用增强状态作为辅助信息，通过基于互信息重构嵌入空间的目标函数来正则化嵌入空间。我们在模拟和真实世界的机器人任务中评估了 ViSA，并展示了改进的目标空间泛化能力，这使得能够准确地估计难以访问的目标的价值。更多详细信息请访问项目页面：\href{https://issa-n.github.io/projectPage_ViSA/}{\texttt{https://issa-n.github.io/projectPage\_ViSA/}}

TLDR: The paper introduces ViSA, a data augmentation method for Contrastive Reinforcement Learning (CRL) that improves goal-space generalization by augmenting hard-to-visit states and learning consistent embedding spaces, demonstrating improved performance in simulated and real-world robotic tasks.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种用于对比强化学习（CRL）的数据增强方法ViSA，通过增强难访问状态和学习一致的嵌入空间，提高了目标空间泛化能力，并在模拟和真实机器人任务中展示了改进的性能。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Issa Nakamura, Tomoya Yamanokuchi, Yuki Kadokawa, Jia Qu, Shun Otsub, Ken Miyamoto, Shotaro Miwa, Takamitsu Matsubara

GraspALL: Adaptive Structural Compensation from Illumination Variation for Robotic Garment Grasping in Any Low-Light Conditions

Abstract (English): Achieving accurate garment grasping under dynamically changing illumination is crucial for all-day operation of service robots.However, the reduced illumination in low-light scenes severely degrades garment structural features, leading to a significant drop in grasping robustness.Existing methods typically enhance RGB features by exploiting the illumination-invariant properties of non-RGB modalities, yet they overlook the varying dependence on non-RGB features under varying lighting conditions, which can introduce misaligned non-RGB cues and thereby weaken the model's adaptability to illumination changes when utilizing multimodal information.To address this problem, we propose GraspALL, an illumination-structure interactive compensation model.The innovation of GraspALL lies in encoding continuous illumination changes into quantitative references to guide adaptive feature fusion between RGB and non-RGB modalities according to varying lighting intensities, thereby generating illumination-consistent grasping representations.Experiments on the self-built garment grasping dataset demonstrate that GraspALL improves grasping accuracy by 32-44% over baselines under diverse illumination conditions.

摘要（中文）: 在动态变化光照条件下实现精确的服装抓取，对于服务机器人全天候运行至关重要。然而，弱光场景下的低照度会严重降低服装的结构特征，导致抓取鲁棒性显著下降。现有方法通常利用非RGB模态的光照不变特性来增强RGB特征，但它们忽略了非RGB特征在不同光照条件下依赖性的差异，这可能会引入错位的非RGB线索，从而在使用多模态信息时削弱模型对光照变化的适应性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了GraspALL，一种光照-结构交互补偿模型。GraspALL的创新之处在于将连续的光照变化编码为定量参考，以指导RGB和非RGB模态之间根据不同光照强度的自适应特征融合，从而生成光照一致的抓取表示。在自建的服装抓取数据集上的实验表明，在各种光照条件下，GraspALL比基线模型提高了32-44%的抓取准确率。

TLDR: The paper introduces GraspALL, a model that adaptively fuses RGB and non-RGB features to improve garment grasping accuracy in low-light conditions by encoding continuous illumination changes. Experiments show a 32-44% improvement over baselines.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了GraspALL，一种自适应融合RGB和非RGB特征的模型，通过编码连续的光照变化来提高在低光照条件下服装抓取的准确性。实验表明，与基线相比，准确率提高了32-44%。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Haifeng Zhong, Wenshuo Han, Zhouyu Wang, Runyang Feng, Fan Tang, Tong-Yee Lee, Zipei Fan, Ruihai Wu, Yuran Wang, Hao Dong, Hechang Chen, Hyung Jin Chang, Yixing Gao

LiDAR-EVS: Enhance Extrapolated View Synthesis for 3D Gaussian Splatting with Pseudo-LiDAR Supervision

Abstract (English): 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a powerful technique for real-time LiDAR and camera synthesis in autonomous driving simulation. However, simulating LiDAR with 3DGS remains challenging for extrapolated views beyond the training trajectory, as existing methods are typically trained on single-traversal sensor scans, suffer from severe overfitting and poor generalization to novel ego-vehicle paths. To enable reliable simulation of LiDAR along unseen driving trajectories without external multi-pass data, we present LiDAR-EVS, a lightweight framework for robust extrapolated-view LiDAR simulation in autonomous driving. Designed to be plug-and-play, LiDAR-EVS readily extends to diverse LiDAR sensors and neural rendering baselines with minimal modification. Our framework comprises two key components: (1) pseudo extrapolated-view point cloud supervision with multi-frame LiDAR fusion, view transformation, occlusion curling, and intensity adjustment; (2) spatially-constrained dropout regularization that promotes robustness to diverse trajectory variations encountered in real-world driving. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiDAR-EVS achieves SOTA performance on extrapolated-view LiDAR synthesis across three datasets, making it a promising tool for data-driven simulation, closed-loop evaluation, and synthetic data generation in autonomous driving systems.

摘要（中文）: 3D高斯溅射 (3DGS) 已成为自动驾驶仿真中实时激光雷达和相机合成的强大技术。然而，由于现有方法通常基于单次遍历传感器扫描进行训练，存在严重的过拟合问题，且对新的自车路径的泛化能力较差，因此利用3DGS仿真超出训练轨迹范围的推断视角激光雷达仍然具有挑战性。为了在没有外部多遍数据的情况下，能够可靠地仿真沿未见驾驶轨迹的激光雷达，我们提出了LiDAR-EVS，一个轻量级框架，用于在自动驾驶中实现稳健的推断视角激光雷达仿真。LiDAR-EVS设计为即插即用，只需少量修改即可轻松扩展到各种激光雷达传感器和神经渲染基线。我们的框架包含两个关键组件：（1）通过多帧激光雷达融合、视角变换、遮挡卷曲和强度调整获得的伪推断视角点云监督；（2）空间约束的Dropout正则化，增强了对真实世界驾驶中遇到的各种轨迹变化的鲁棒性。大量的实验表明，LiDAR-EVS在三个数据集上的推断视角激光雷达合成方面实现了SOTA性能，使其成为自动驾驶系统中数据驱动仿真、闭环评估和合成数据生成的一个有前景的工具。

TLDR: The paper introduces LiDAR-EVS, a plug-and-play framework for improving extrapolated view LiDAR simulation with 3D Gaussian Splatting, achieving SOTA performance on novel driving trajectories through pseudo-LiDAR supervision and spatial regularization.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了LiDAR-EVS，一个即插即用的框架，通过伪LiDAR监督和空间正则化来改进具有3D高斯溅射的外推视图LiDAR模拟，并在新的驾驶轨迹上实现了SOTA性能。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yiming Huang, Xin Kang, Sipeng Zhang, Hongliang Ren, Weihua Zhang, Junjie Lai

Seeing Where to Deploy: Metric RGB-Based Traversability Analysis for Aerial-to-Ground Hidden Space Inspection

Abstract (English): Inspection of confined infrastructure such as culverts often requires accessing hidden spaces whose entrances are reachable primarily from elevated viewpoints. Aerial-ground cooperation enables a UAV to deploy a compact UGV for interior exploration, but selecting a suitable deployment region from aerial observations requires metric terrain reasoning involving scale ambiguity, reconstruction uncertainty, and terrain semantics. We present a metric RGB-based geometric-semantic reconstruction and traversability analysis framework for aerial-to-ground hidden space inspection. A feed-forward multi-view RGB reconstruction backbone produces dense geometry, while temporally consistent semantic segmentation yields a 3D semantic map. To enable deployment-relevant measurements without LiDAR-based dense mapping, we introduce an embodied motion prior that recovers metric scale by enforcing consistency between predicted camera motion and onboard platform egomotion. From the metrically grounded reconstruction, we construct a confidence-aware geometric-semantic traversability map and evaluate candidate deployment zones under explicit reachability constraints. Experiments on a tethered UAV-UGV platform demonstrate reliable deployment-zone identification in hidden space scenarios.

摘要（中文）: 涵洞等受限基础设施的检查通常需要进入隐藏空间，而这些空间的入口主要从高空视点才可到达。无人机-地面机器人协同使得无人机能够部署一个紧凑型地面机器人进行内部探索，但从空中观测中选择合适的部署区域需要进行包含尺度模糊、重建不确定性和地形语义的度量地形推理。我们提出了一种基于度量RGB的几何-语义重建和可通行性分析框架，用于空-地隐藏空间检查。前馈式多视点RGB重建主干网络生成稠密几何体，而时序一致的语义分割产生3D语义地图。为了在没有基于激光雷达的稠密建图情况下实现与部署相关的测量，我们引入了一种具身运动先验，通过强制预测相机运动与机载平台自运动之间的一致性来恢复度量尺度。从度量接地的重建中，我们构建一个置信度感知的几何-语义可通行性地图，并在明确的可达性约束下评估候选部署区域。在系绳式无人机-地面机器人平台上的实验表明，在隐藏空间场景中能够可靠地识别部署区域。

TLDR: This paper introduces a metric RGB-based framework for aerial-to-ground hidden space inspection, enabling a UAV to select suitable deployment zones for a UGV using geometric-semantic reconstruction and traversability analysis without LiDAR.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种基于度量RGB的空中到地面隐蔽空间检测框架，使无人机能够使用几何语义重建和可穿越性分析来选择适合UGV部署的区域，而无需激光雷达。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Seoyoung Lee, Shaekh Mohammad Shithil, Durgakant Pushp, Lantao Liu, Zhangyang Wang

CyboRacket: A Perception-to-Action Framework for Humanoid Racket Sports

Abstract (English): Dynamic ball-interaction tasks remain challenging for robots because they require tight perception-action coupling under limited reaction time. This challenge is especially pronounced in humanoid racket sports, where successful interception depends on accurate visual tracking, trajectory prediction, coordinated stepping, and stable whole-body striking. Existing robotic racket-sport systems often rely on external motion capture for state estimation or on task-specific low-level controllers that must be retrained across tasks and platforms. We present CyboRacket, a hierarchical perception-to-action framework for humanoid racket sports that integrates onboard visual perception, physics-based trajectory prediction, and large-scale pre-trained whole-body control. The framework uses onboard cameras to track the incoming object, predicts its future trajectory, and converts the estimated interception state into target end-effector and base-motion commands for whole-body execution by SONIC on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot. We evaluate the proposed framework in a vision-based humanoid tennis-hitting task. Experimental results demonstrate real-time visual tracking, trajectory prediction, and successful striking using purely onboard sensing.

摘要（中文）: 动态的球体交互任务对于机器人来说仍然具有挑战性，因为它们需要在有限的反应时间内进行紧密的感知-动作耦合。在人形球拍运动中，这一挑战尤为突出，因为成功拦截依赖于精确的视觉跟踪、轨迹预测、协调的步进和稳定的全身击打。现有的机器人球拍运动系统通常依赖于外部运动捕捉来进行状态估计，或者依赖于特定任务的低级控制器，这些控制器必须跨任务和平台进行重新训练。我们提出了CyboRacket，一种用于人形球拍运动的分层感知-动作框架，集成了车载视觉感知、基于物理的轨迹预测和大规模预训练的全身控制。该框架使用车载摄像头跟踪来球，预测其未来轨迹，并将估计的拦截状态转换为目标末端执行器和基座运动指令，供Unitree G1人形机器人的SONIC进行全身执行。我们通过一项基于视觉的人形网球击打任务来评估所提出的框架。实验结果表明，可以仅使用车载传感实现实时的视觉跟踪、轨迹预测和成功的击打。

TLDR: CyboRacket is a hierarchical framework for humanoid robots that uses onboard sensing, physics-based trajectory prediction, and pre-trained whole-body control to perform dynamic ball-interaction tasks like tennis hitting.

简要说明: CyboRacket是一个用于人形机器人的分层框架，它利用板载传感、基于物理的轨迹预测和预训练的全身控制来执行动态球类互动任务，例如击打网球。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Peng Ren, Chuan Qi, Haoyang Ge, Qiyuan Su, Xuguo He, Cong Huang, Pei Chi, Jiang Zhao, Kai Chen

Latent Dynamics-Aware OOD Monitoring for Trajectory Prediction with Provable Guarantees

Abstract (English): In safety-critical Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS), accurate trajectory prediction provides vital guidance for downstream planning and control, yet although deep learning models achieve high-fidelity forecasts on validation data, their reliability degrades under out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios caused by environmental uncertainty or rare traffic behaviors in real-world deployment; detecting such OOD events is challenging due to evolving traffic conditions and changing interaction patterns, while safety-critical applications demand formal guarantees on detection delay and false-alarm rates, motivating us-following recent work [1]-to formulate OOD monitoring for trajectory prediction as a quickest changepoint detection (QCD) problem that offers a principled statistical framework with established theory; we further observe that the real-world evolution of prediction errors under in-distribution (ID) conditions can be effectively modeled by a Hidden Markov Model (HMM), and by leveraging this structure we extend the cumulative Maximum Mean Discrepancy approach to enable detection without requiring explicit knowledge of the post-change distribution while still admitting provable guarantees on delay and false alarms, with experiments on three real-world driving datasets demonstrating reduced detection delay and robustness to heavy-tailed errors and unknown post-change conditions.

摘要（中文）: 在安全攸关的网络物理系统（CPS）中，准确的轨迹预测为下游的规划和控制提供了至关重要的指导。然而，尽管深度学习模型在验证数据上实现了高保真度的预测，但由于环境不确定性或现实部署中罕见的交通行为所引起的分外分布（OOD）场景，其可靠性会下降。检测此类OOD事件具有挑战性，原因是不断变化的交通状况和交互模式，同时安全攸关应用需要对检测延迟和误报率进行正式保证。这促使我们——遵循最近的研究[1]——将轨迹预测的OOD监控定义为一个最速变化点检测（QCD）问题，该问题提供了一个具有既定理论的、有原则的统计框架。我们进一步观察到，在分布内（ID）条件下预测误差在现实世界中的演化可以有效地由隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）建模。通过利用这种结构，我们扩展了累积最大均值差异方法，从而能够在不需要显式了解变化后分布的情况下进行检测，同时仍然允许对延迟和误报进行可证明的保证。在三个真实世界驾驶数据集上的实验表明，该方法降低了检测延迟，并对重尾误差和未知的变化后条件具有鲁棒性。

TLDR: This paper addresses out-of-distribution (OOD) detection for trajectory prediction in safety-critical systems by formulating it as a quickest changepoint detection (QCD) problem using a Hidden Markov Model (HMM) to achieve provable guarantees on detection delay and false alarms, which is evaluated on real-world driving datasets.

简要说明: 本文研究了安全关键系统中轨迹预测的分布外（OOD）检测问题，通过使用隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）将其形式化为最速变化点检测（QCD）问题，从而在检测延迟和误报方面实现可证明的保证，并在真实驾驶数据集上进行了评估。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tongfei Guo, Lili Su

A Loss Landscape Visualization Framework for Interpreting Reinforcement Learning: An ADHDP Case Study

Abstract (English): Reinforcement learning algorithms have been widely used in dynamic and control systems. However, interpreting their internal learning behavior remains a challenge. In the authors' previous work, a critic match loss landscape visualization method was proposed to study critic training. This study extends that method into a framework which provides a multi-perspective view of the learning dynamics, clarifying how value estimation, policy optimization, and temporal-difference (TD) signals interact during training. The proposed framework includes four complementary components; a three-dimensional reconstruction of the critic match loss surface that shows how TD targets shape the optimization geometry; an actor loss landscape under a frozen critic that reveals how the policy exploits that geometry; a trajectory combining time, Bellman error, and policy weights that indicates how updates move across the surface; and a state-TD map that identifies the state regions that drive those updates. The Action-Dependent Heuristic Dynamic Programming (ADHDP) algorithm for spacecraft attitude control is used as a case study. The framework is applied to compare several ADHDP variants and shows how training stabilizers and target updates change the optimization landscape and affect learning stability. Therefore, the proposed framework provides a systematic and interpretable tool for analyzing reinforcement learning behavior across algorithmic designs.

摘要（中文）: 强化学习算法已被广泛应用于动态和控制系统中。然而，解读其内部学习行为仍然是一个挑战。在作者之前的研究中，提出了一种评论家匹配损失景观可视化方法来研究评论家训练。本研究将该方法扩展为一个框架，该框架提供对学习动态的多视角观察，阐明价值估计、策略优化和时间差分（TD）信号在训练期间如何相互作用。所提出的框架包括四个互补的组成部分：评论家匹配损失曲面的三维重构，展示了TD目标如何塑造优化几何结构；冻结评论家下的演员损失景观，揭示了策略如何利用该几何结构；结合时间、贝尔曼误差和策略权重的轨迹，指示更新如何在曲面上移动；以及一个状态-TD图，识别驱动这些更新的状态区域。将用于航天器姿态控制的动作依赖启发式动态规划（ADHDP）算法作为一个案例研究。应用该框架来比较几种ADHDP变体，并展示了训练稳定器和目标更新如何改变优化景观并影响学习稳定性。因此，所提出的框架为分析跨算法设计的强化学习行为提供了一种系统且可解释的工具。

TLDR: This paper proposes a framework for visualizing the loss landscape in reinforcement learning to understand the interplay between value estimation, policy optimization, and TD signals, using ADHDP for spacecraft attitude control as a case study.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于可视化强化学习中损失景观的框架，以理解价值估计、策略优化和TD信号之间的相互作用，并以用于航天器姿态控制的ADHDP为例。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Jingyi Liu, Jian Guo, Eberhard Gill

SmallSatSim: A High-Fidelity Simulation and Training Toolkit for Microgravity Robotic Close Proximity Operations

Abstract (English): Microgravity rendezvous and close proximity operations (RPO) is a growing area of interest for applications spanning in-space assembly and manufacturing (ISAM), orbital debris remediation, and small body exploration. Microgravity environments present unique challenges for robotic control and planning algorithms for new agile RPO mission scenarios like free-floating manipulation, planning under failure, and estimating high-fidelity dynamics of tumbling bodies. To facilitate the development and testing of novel RPO algorithms, we introduce SmallSatSim, a high-fidelity simulation toolkit that leverages the MuJoCo physics engine to accurately model small satellite RPO dynamics in local microgravity robotic free-flight settings, including under model disturbances and perturbations. The framework includes cutting edge out-of-the-box free-flyer control techniques. A GPU-accelerated pipeline using MuJoCo MJX and JAX is implemented for sampling- and learning-based simulation uses cases. SmallSatSim also supports configurable failure models, enabling the evaluation of safe control strategies under adversarial conditions. Visualization, logging, and GPU-enabled parallelization further enhance SmallSatSim's capability for RPO testing. We outline SmallSatSim's features and intended use cases, and demonstrate its use for robotic RPO planning and control. The open-sourced toolkit aims to accelerate research in autonomous, agile robotic small satellite operations.

摘要（中文）: 微重力交会和近距离操作(RPO)是日益受到关注的领域，其应用涵盖在轨组装与制造(ISAM)、轨道碎片清除以及小行星探测。微重力环境为用于新型敏捷RPO任务场景（例如自由漂浮操作、故障条件下的规划以及翻滚物体的精确动力学估计）的机器人控制和规划算法提出了独特的挑战。为了促进新型RPO算法的开发和测试，我们引入了SmallSatSim，这是一个高精度仿真工具包，它利用MuJoCo物理引擎来准确地模拟局部微重力机器人自由飞行环境中的小型卫星RPO动力学，包括在模型扰动和摄动下。该框架包括最前沿的开箱即用的自由飞行器控制技术。利用MuJoCo MJX和JAX的GPU加速流水线被用于基于采样和学习的仿真用例。SmallSatSim还支持可配置的故障模型，从而能够评估不利条件下的安全控制策略。可视化、日志记录和GPU加速并行化进一步增强了SmallSatSim的RPO测试能力。我们概述了SmallSatSim的特性和预期用例，并展示了其在机器人RPO规划和控制中的应用。该开源工具包旨在加速自主、敏捷机器人小型卫星操作方面的研究。

TLDR: The paper introduces SmallSatSim, a high-fidelity, open-source simulation toolkit for microgravity robotic close proximity operations (RPO), designed for testing and development of novel RPO algorithms using MuJoCo and GPU acceleration.

简要说明: 本文介绍SmallSatSim，一个高保真度的开源微重力机器人近距离操作（RPO）仿真工具包，旨在利用MuJoCo和GPU加速来测试和开发新型RPO算法。

Authors: David Schwartz, Alexander Hansson, Sabrina Bodmer, David Sternberg, Oliver Jia-Richards, Keenan Albee

Visualizing Critic Match Loss Landscapes for Interpretation of Online Reinforcement Learning Control Algorithms

Abstract (English): Reinforcement learning has proven its power on various occasions. However, its performance is not always guaranteed when system dynamics change. Instead, it largely relies on users' empirical experience. For reinforcement learning algorithms with an actor-critic structure, the critic neural network reflects the approximation and optimization process in the RL algorithm. Analyzing the performance of the critic neural network helps to understand the mechanism of the algorithm. To support systematic interpretation of such algorithms in dynamic control problems, this work proposes a critic match loss landscape visualization method for online reinforcement learning. The method constructs a loss landscape by projecting recorded critic parameter trajectories onto a low-dimensional linear subspace. The critic match loss is evaluated over the projected parameter grid using fixed reference state samples and temporal-difference targets. This yields a three-dimensional loss surface together with a two-dimensional optimization path that characterizes critic learning behavior. To extend analysis beyond visual inspection, quantitative landscape indices and a normalized system performance index are introduced, enabling structured comparison across different training outcomes. The approach is demonstrated using the Action-Dependent Heuristic Dynamic Programming algorithm on cart-pole and spacecraft attitude control tasks. Comparative analyses across projection methods and training stages reveal distinct landscape characteristics associated with stable convergence and unstable learning. The proposed framework enables both qualitative and quantitative interpretation of critic optimization behavior in online reinforcement learning.

摘要（中文）: 强化学习已在多种场合证明其能力。然而，当系统动态发生变化时，其性能并不能总是得到保证。相反，它很大程度上依赖于用户的经验。对于具有Actor-Critic结构的强化学习算法，评论家（Critic）神经网络反映了强化学习算法中的近似和优化过程。分析评论家神经网络的性能有助于理解算法的机制。为了支持对此类算法在动态控制问题中的系统性解释，本文提出了一种针对在线强化学习的评论家匹配损失景观可视化方法。该方法通过将记录的评论家参数轨迹投影到低维线性子空间上来构建损失景观。评论家匹配损失使用固定的参考状态样本和时间差分（Temporal-Difference）目标在投影的参数网格上进行评估。这产生了一个三维损失表面以及一个表征评论家学习行为的二维优化路径。为了将分析扩展到视觉检查之外，引入了定量景观指标和一个归一化的系统性能指标，从而可以对不同的训练结果进行结构化比较。本文使用作用依赖启发式动态规划算法在倒立摆和航天器姿态控制任务上演示了该方法。对投影方法和训练阶段的比较分析揭示了与稳定收敛和不稳定学习相关的不同景观特征。所提出的框架能够对在线强化学习中评论家优化行为进行定性和定量解释。

TLDR: This paper proposes a visualization method for analyzing critic behavior in online reinforcement learning by projecting critic parameter trajectories onto a low-dimensional loss landscape, allowing for qualitative and quantitative interpretation.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种可视化方法，通过将critic参数轨迹投影到低维损失景观上，来分析在线强化学习中critic的行为，从而实现定性和定量解释。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jingyi Liu, Jian Guo, Eberhard Gill

Computational Concept of the Psyche

Abstract (English): This article presents an overview of approaches to modeling the human psyche in the context of constructing an artificial one. Based on this overview, a concept of cognitive architecture is proposed, in which the psyche is viewed as the operating system of a living or artificial subject, comprising a space of states, including the state of needs that determine the meaning of a subject's being in relation to stimuli from the external world, and intelligence as a decision-making system regarding actions in this world to satisfy these needs. Based on this concept, a computational formalization is proposed for creating artificial general intelligence systems for an agent through experiential learning in a state space that includes agent's needs, taking into account their biological or existential significance for the intelligent agent, along with agent's sensations and actions. Thus, the problem of constructing artificial general intelligence is formalized as a system for making optimal decisions in the space of specific agent needs under conditions of uncertainty, maximizing success in achieving goals, minimizing existential risks, and maximizing energy efficiency. A minimal experimental implementation of the model is presented.

摘要（中文）: 本文概述了在构建人工心理的背景下，对人类心理建模的各种方法。在此基础上，提出了一种认知架构的概念，其中心理被视为生物或人工主体的操作系统，包含一个状态空间，包括需要状态，该状态决定了主体相对于外部世界刺激的存在意义；以及智能，作为关于在此世界中采取行动以满足这些需求的决策系统。基于此概念，提出了一种计算形式化方法，用于通过在包括主体需求的状态空间中的经验学习，为智能体创建通用人工智能系统，考虑到这些需求对于智能体的生物或存在意义，以及智能体的感觉和行动。因此，构建通用人工智能的问题被形式化为一个在特定主体需求空间中，在不确定性条件下做出最优决策的系统，以最大化实现目标的成功率，最小化存在风险，并最大化能量效率。文中还展示了该模型的最小化实验实现。

TLDR: This paper proposes a cognitive architecture for AGI, viewing the psyche as an operating system driven by needs and formalized for experiential learning, aiming for optimal decision-making under uncertainty. A minimal experimental implementation is presented.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种AGI的认知架构，将心灵视为由需求驱动的操作系统，并将其形式化以进行经验学习，旨在在不确定性下做出最优决策。论文展示了一个最简的实验实现。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Anton Kolonin, Vladimir Krykov

Evasive Intelligence: Lessons from Malware Analysis for Evaluating AI Agents

Abstract (English): Artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly adopted as tool-using agents that can plan, observe their environment, and take actions over extended time periods. This evolution challenges current evaluation practices where the AI models are tested in restricted, fully observable settings. In this article, we argue that evaluations of AI agents are vulnerable to a well-known failure mode in computer security: malicious software that exhibits benign behavior when it detects that it is being analyzed. We point out how AI agents can infer the properties of their evaluation environment and adapt their behavior accordingly. This can lead to overly optimistic safety and robustness assessments. Drawing parallels with decades of research on malware sandbox evasion, we demonstrate that this is not a speculative concern, but rather a structural risk inherent to the evaluation of adaptive systems. Finally, we outline concrete principles for evaluating AI agents, which treat the system under test as potentially adversarial. These principles emphasize realism, variability of test conditions, and post-deployment reassessment.

摘要（中文）: 人工智能（AI）系统正日益被采纳为工具型智能体，它们可以规划、观察环境，并在较长时间段内采取行动。这种演进对当前的评估实践提出了挑战，因为现有的评估通常是在受限的、完全可观察的环境中测试AI模型。在本文中，我们认为对AI智能体的评估容易受到计算机安全领域一种众所周知的失效模式的影响：恶意软件在检测到自身正被分析时会表现出良性行为。我们指出，AI智能体如何能够推断出其评估环境的属性，并相应地调整其行为。这可能导致过于乐观的安全性和鲁棒性评估结果。通过与恶意软件沙箱规避数十年的研究进行类比，我们证明这并非只是推测性的担忧，而是自适应系统评估中固有的结构性风险。最后，我们概述了评估AI智能体的具体原则，这些原则将受测系统视为潜在的对抗性系统。这些原则强调真实性、测试条件的可变性以及部署后的重新评估。

TLDR: This paper argues that AI agent evaluations are susceptible to evasion tactics similar to malware, leading to inflated performance assessments, and proposes evaluation principles considering the agent as potentially adversarial.

简要说明: 本文指出，人工智能代理的评估容易受到类似恶意软件的规避策略的影响，导致对性能的评估过于乐观。文章提出了将代理视为潜在对抗者的评估原则。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Simone Aonzo, Merve Sahin, Aurélien Francillon, Daniele Perito

Listening to the Echo: User-Reaction Aware Policy Optimization via Scalar-Verbal Hybrid Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): While current emotional support dialogue systems typically rely on expert-defined scalar rewards for alignment, these signals suffer from severe information sparsity. They cannot explain why a response failed or how to adapt to dynamic user states, often diverging from the actual goal of facilitating positive emotional shifts. In practice, the most direct and reliable learning signal emerges from the user's continuous reactions during ongoing interaction. We therefore propose Reaction Aware Policy Optimization (RAPO), a framework that optimizes over interaction consequences rather than rubric scores. RAPO treats dialogue as a reaction-driven process and utilizes simulated user responses to generate dense natural-language feedback through three core components: Hindsight Dialogue Selection, which isolates pivotal turns that meaningfully alter user emotional trajectories; Generative Hindsight Feedback, which transforms user reactions into contrastive ranking signals and natural-language critiques; and Scalar-Verbal Hybrid Policy Optimization, which couples scalar reward optimization for global alignment with verbal feedback distillation for fine-grained semantic refinement. Extensive experiments on ESC and Sotopia demonstrate that RAPO significantly outperforms strong reinforcement learning baselines in driving positive interaction outcomes.

摘要（中文）: 以下是翻译结果： 虽然目前的情感支持对话系统通常依赖于专家定义的标量奖励进行对齐，但这些信号存在严重的信息稀疏性问题。它们无法解释为什么一个回复失败或如何适应动态用户状态，常常偏离促进积极情绪转变的实际目标。实际上，最直接和可靠的学习信号来自用户在持续交互过程中的连续反应。因此，我们提出了反应感知策略优化（RAPO），这是一个优化交互后果而非评分标准的框架。RAPO将对话视为一个反应驱动的过程，并利用模拟的用户反应，通过三个核心组件生成密集型自然语言反馈：后见之明对话选择，它隔离了有意义地改变用户情绪轨迹的关键轮次；生成式后见之明反馈，它将用户反应转换为对比排序信号和自然语言批评；以及标量-文本混合策略优化，它将用于全局对齐的标量奖励优化与用于细粒度语义改进的文本反馈提炼相结合。在ESC和Sotopia上的大量实验表明，RAPO在驱动积极交互结果方面显著优于强大的强化学习基线。

TLDR: The paper introduces Reaction Aware Policy Optimization (RAPO), a reinforcement learning framework that utilizes user reactions, transformed into natural language feedback, to improve emotional support dialogue systems, demonstrably outperforming existing methods.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为Reaction Aware Policy Optimization (RAPO)的强化学习框架，该框架利用用户反应，将其转换为自然语言反馈，以改进情感支持对话系统，并且表现优于现有方法。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jing Ye, Xinpei Zhao, Lu Xiang, Yaping Zhang, Chengqing Zong

Intelligent Co-Design: An Interactive LLM Framework for Interior Spatial Design via Multi-Modal Agents

Abstract (English): In architectural interior design, miscommunication frequently arises as clients lack design knowledge, while designers struggle to explain complex spatial relationships, leading to delayed timelines and financial losses. Recent advancements in generative layout tools narrow the gap by automating 3D visualizations. However, prevailing methodologies exhibit limitations: rule-based systems implement hard-coded spatial constraints that restrict participatory engagement, while data-driven models rely on extensive training datasets. Recent large language models (LLMs) bridge this gap by enabling intuitive reasoning about spatial relationships through natural language. This research presents an LLM-based, multimodal, multi-agent framework that dynamically converts natural language descriptions and imagery into 3D designs. Specialized agents (Reference, Spatial, Interactive, Grader), operating via prompt guidelines, collaboratively address core challenges: the agent system enables real-time user interaction for iterative spatial refinement, while Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) reduces data dependency without requiring task-specific model training. This framework accurately interprets spatial intent and generates optimized 3D indoor design, improving productivity, and encouraging nondesigner participation. Evaluations across diverse floor plans and user questionnaires demonstrate effectiveness. An independent LLM evaluator consistently rated participatory layouts higher in user intent alignment, aesthetic coherence, functionality, and circulation. Questionnaire results indicated 77% satisfaction and a clear preference over traditional design software. These findings suggest the framework enhances user-centric communication and fosters more inclusive, effective, and resilient design processes. Project page: https://rsigktyper.github.io/AICodesign/

摘要（中文）: 在建筑室内设计中，由于客户缺乏设计知识，而设计师难以解释复杂的空间关系，经常出现沟通不畅问题，导致时间延误和经济损失。生成式布局工具的最新进展通过自动化的3D可视化缩小了差距。然而，目前的主流方法存在局限性：基于规则的系统实施硬编码的空间约束，从而限制了参与性互动；而数据驱动的模型则依赖于广泛的训练数据集。近年来，大型语言模型(LLM)通过自然语言实现对空间关系的直观推理，弥补了这一差距。本研究提出了一种基于LLM的多模态、多Agent框架，该框架能够动态地将自然语言描述和图像转换为3D设计。通过提示指南运行的专业化Agent（参考Agent、空间Agent、交互Agent、评分Agent）协同解决核心挑战：该Agent系统支持实时用户交互，用于迭代的空间优化；同时，检索增强生成(RAG)技术减少了数据依赖性，而无需进行特定任务的模型训练。该框架能够准确地理解空间意图并生成优化的3D室内设计，从而提高生产力并鼓励非设计人员参与。对多种平面图和用户问卷的评估证明了其有效性。独立的LLM评估器一致认为，参与式布局在用户意图对齐、美学连贯性、功能性和动线上都得分更高。问卷调查结果显示，满意度达到77%，并且明显优于传统设计软件。这些发现表明，该框架增强了以用户为中心的沟通，并促进了更具包容性、有效性和弹性的设计流程。项目页面：https://rsigktyper.github.io/AICodesign/

TLDR: This paper introduces an LLM-based, multi-modal, multi-agent framework for interior spatial design that translates natural language and imagery into 3D designs, enabling real-time user interaction and improving design processes.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种基于LLM的多模态多智能体室内空间设计框架，该框架将自然语言和图像转换为3D设计，实现实时用户交互并改进设计流程。

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Ren Jian Lim, Rushi Dai

Algorithms for Deciding the Safety of States in Fully Observable Non-deterministic Problems: Technical Report

Abstract (English): Learned action policies are increasingly popular in sequential decision-making, but suffer from a lack of safety guarantees. Recent work introduced a pipeline for testing the safety of such policies under initial-state and action-outcome non-determinism. At the pipeline's core, is the problem of deciding whether a state is safe (a safe policy exists from the state) and finding faults, which are state-action pairs that transition from a safe state to an unsafe one. Their most effective algorithm for deciding safety, TarjanSafe, is effective on their benchmarks, but we show that it has exponential worst-case runtime with respect to the state space. A linear-time alternative exists, but it is slower in practice. We close this gap with a new policy-iteration algorithm iPI, that combines the best of both: it matches TarjanSafe's best-case runtime while guaranteeing a polynomial worst-case. Experiments confirm our theory and show that in problems amenable to TarjanSafe iPI has similar performance, whereas in ill-suited problems iPI scales exponentially better.

摘要（中文）: 学习到的动作策略在序贯决策中越来越受欢迎，但安全性保障不足。最近的研究引入了一个管道，用于在初始状态和动作结果非确定性的情况下测试此类策略的安全性。该管道的核心问题是确定一个状态是否安全（即是否存在从此状态出发的安全策略）并找到故障，即从安全状态转移到不安全状态的状态-动作对。他们用于确定安全性的最有效算法TarjanSafe在其基准测试中表现出色，但我们证明了其最坏情况下的运行时复杂度相对于状态空间呈指数增长。存在一种线性时间的替代方案，但在实践中速度较慢。我们通过一种新的策略迭代算法iPI来弥合这一差距，该算法结合了两者的优点：它匹配TarjanSafe的最佳情况运行时，同时保证了多项式最坏情况复杂度。实验证实了我们的理论，并且表明在适合TarjanSafe的问题中，iPI具有相似的性能，而在不适合的问题中，iPI的扩展性呈指数级增长。

TLDR: This paper introduces a new policy-iteration algorithm, iPI, for deciding the safety of states in non-deterministic problems, improving upon existing methods by achieving both fast best-case runtime and polynomial worst-case runtime guarantees.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种新的策略迭代算法 iPI，用于在非确定性问题中判断状态的安全性。该算法改进了现有方法，兼具快速的最佳情况运行时和多项式最坏情况运行时的保证。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Johannes Schmalz, Chaahat Jain

Directional Embedding Smoothing for Robust Vision Language Models

Abstract (English): The safety and reliability of vision-language models (VLMs) are a crucial part of deploying trustworthy agentic AI systems. However, VLMs remain vulnerable to jailbreaking attacks that undermine their safety alignment to yield harmful outputs. In this work, we extend the Randomized Embedding Smoothing and Token Aggregation (RESTA) defense to VLMs and evaluate its performance against the JailBreakV-28K benchmark of multi-modal jailbreaking attacks. We find that RESTA is effective in reducing attack success rate over this diverse corpus of attacks, in particular, when employing directional embedding noise, where the injected noise is aligned with the original token embedding vectors. Our results demonstrate that RESTA can contribute to securing VLMs within agentic systems, as a lightweight, inference-time defense layer of an overall security framework.

摘要（中文）: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的安全性和可靠性是部署可信 Agentic AI 系统的重要组成部分。然而，VLMs 仍然容易受到越狱攻击，这些攻击会破坏其安全对齐，从而产生有害的输出。在这项工作中，我们将随机嵌入平滑和令牌聚合（RESTA）防御扩展到 VLMs，并针对 JailBreakV-28K 多模态越狱攻击基准测试评估其性能。我们发现，RESTA 在降低针对这一多样化攻击语料库的攻击成功率方面是有效的，特别是当采用方向嵌入噪声时，其中注入的噪声与原始令牌嵌入向量对齐。我们的结果表明，RESTA 作为整体安全框架的轻量级推理时防御层，可以为保障 Agentic 系统中的 VLMs 安全做出贡献。

TLDR: This paper adapts Randomized Embedding Smoothing and Token Aggregation (RESTA) to Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as a defense against jailbreaking attacks, finding that directional embedding noise is especially effective in reducing attack success.

简要说明: 该论文将随机嵌入平滑和令牌聚合（RESTA）应用于视觉语言模型（VLM），作为防御越狱攻击的方法，发现定向嵌入噪声特别有效地降低了攻击成功率。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Ye Wang, Jing Liu, Toshiaki Koike-Akino

Safe Flow Q-Learning: Offline Safe Reinforcement Learning with Reachability-Based Flow Policies

Abstract (English): Offline safe reinforcement learning (RL) seeks reward-maximizing policies from static datasets under strict safety constraints. Existing methods often rely on soft expected-cost objectives or iterative generative inference, which can be insufficient for safety-critical real-time control. We propose Safe Flow Q-Learning (SafeFQL), which extends FQL to safe offline RL by combining a Hamilton--Jacobi reachability-inspired safety value function with an efficient one-step flow policy. SafeFQL learns the safety value via a self-consistency Bellman recursion, trains a flow policy by behavioral cloning, and distills it into a one-step actor for reward-maximizing safe action selection without rejection sampling at deployment. To account for finite-data approximation error in the learned safety boundary, we add a conformal prediction calibration step that adjusts the safety threshold and provides finite-sample probabilistic safety coverage. Empirically, SafeFQL trades modestly higher offline training cost for substantially lower inference latency than diffusion-style safe generative baselines, which is advantageous for real-time safety-critical deployment. Across boat navigation, and Safety Gymnasium MuJoCo tasks, SafeFQL matches or exceeds prior offline safe RL performance while substantially reducing constraint violations.

摘要（中文）: 离线安全强化学习旨在从静态数据集中获取同时满足严格安全约束的奖励最大化策略。现有方法通常依赖于软期望成本目标或迭代生成式推理，这可能不足以应对安全攸关的实时控制场景。我们提出了安全流 Q 学习（SafeFQL），通过将受 Hamilton-Jacobi 可达性启发的安全价值函数与高效的单步流策略相结合，把 FQL 扩展到安全离线强化学习。SafeFQL 通过自洽的贝尔曼递归学习安全价值，通过行为克隆训练流策略，并将其提炼成单步执行器，以实现奖励最大化且安全的动作选择，而无需部署时的拒绝采样。为了解决学习到的安全边界中由于有限数据近似误差导致的问题，我们添加了一个保形的预测校准步骤，该步骤调整安全阈值并提供有限样本概率安全覆盖。实验结果表明，与扩散风格的安全生成式基线相比，SafeFQL 以适度更高的离线训练成本换取显著更低的推理延迟，这对于实时的安全攸关部署是有利的。在船只导航和Safety Gymnasium MuJoCo任务中，SafeFQL 在大幅减少约束违例的同时，达到或超过了先前的离线安全强化学习性能。

TLDR: Safe Flow Q-Learning (SafeFQL) introduces a novel approach to offline safe reinforcement learning by combining reachability-inspired safety with efficient one-step flow policies, demonstrating improved safety and lower inference latency compared to existing methods.

简要说明: Safe Flow Q-Learning (SafeFQL) 提出了一种新的离线安全强化学习方法，它将基于可达性的安全性和高效的单步流策略相结合，与现有方法相比，展示了更高的安全性和更低的推理延迟。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Mumuksh Tayal, Manan Tayal, Ravi Prakash

Sample-Efficient Hypergradient Estimation for Decentralized Bi-Level Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): Many strategic decision-making problems, such as environment design for warehouse robots, can be naturally formulated as bi-level reinforcement learning (RL), where a leader agent optimizes its objective while a follower solves a Markov decision process (MDP) conditioned on the leader's decisions. In many situations, a fundamental challenge arises when the leader cannot intervene in the follower's optimization process; it can only observe the optimization outcome. We address this decentralized setting by deriving the hypergradient of the leader's objective, i.e., the gradient of the leader's strategy that accounts for changes in the follower's optimal policy. Unlike prior hypergradient-based methods that require extensive data for repeated state visits or rely on gradient estimators whose complexity can increase substantially with the high-dimensional leader's decision space, we leverage the Boltzmann covariance trick to derive an alternative hypergradient formulation. This enables efficient hypergradient estimation solely from interaction samples, even when the leader's decision space is high-dimensional. Additionally, to our knowledge, this is the first method that enables hypergradient-based optimization for 2-player Markov games in decentralized settings. Experiments highlight the impact of hypergradient updates and demonstrate our method's effectiveness in both discrete and continuous state tasks.

摘要（中文）: 许多战略决策问题，例如仓库机器人的环境设计，可以自然地表述为双层强化学习（RL），其中领导者智能体优化其目标，而跟随者解决一个以领导者决策为条件的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）。在许多情况下，当领导者无法干预跟随者的优化过程时，会产生一个根本性的挑战；它只能观察优化结果。我们通过推导领导者目标函数的超梯度来解决这种去中心化设置，即，考虑跟随者最优策略变化的领导者策略梯度。与先前需要大量数据用于重复状态访问，或者依赖于梯度估计器的超梯度方法不同，这些梯度估计器的复杂度可能随着高维领导者决策空间的增加而显著增加，我们利用玻尔兹曼协方差技巧来推导一种替代的超梯度公式。这使得仅通过交互样本即可实现高效的超梯度估计，即使领导者的决策空间是高维的。此外，据我们所知，这是第一个在去中心化设置下，为双人马尔可夫博弈实现基于超梯度优化的方法。实验突出了超梯度更新的影响，并证明了我们的方法在离散和连续状态任务中的有效性。

TLDR: This paper introduces a sample-efficient hypergradient estimation method for decentralized bi-level reinforcement learning, leveraging the Boltzmann covariance trick to address challenges in high-dimensional leader decision spaces and 2-player Markov games.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于去中心化双层强化学习的样本高效超梯度估计方法，利用玻尔兹曼协方差技巧来解决高维领导者决策空间和双人马尔可夫博弈中的挑战。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Mikoto Kudo, Takumi Tanabe, Akifumi Wachi, Youhei Akimoto

Universe Routing: Why Self-Evolving Agents Need Epistemic Control

Abstract (English): A critical failure mode of current lifelong agents is not lack of knowledge, but the inability to decide how to reason. When an agent encounters "Is this coin fair?" it must recognize whether to invoke frequentist hypothesis testing or Bayesian posterior inference - frameworks that are epistemologically incompatible. Mixing them produces not minor errors, but structural failures that propagate across decision chains. We formalize this as the universe routing problem: classifying questions into mutually exclusive belief spaces before invoking specialized solvers. Our key findings challenge conventional assumptions: (1) hard routing to heterogeneous solvers matches soft MoE accuracy while being 7x faster because epistemically incompatible frameworks cannot be meaningfully averaged; (2) a 465M-parameter router achieves a 2.3x smaller generalization gap than keyword-matching baselines, indicating semantic rather than surface-level reasoning; (3) when expanding to new belief spaces, rehearsal-based continual learning achieves zero forgetting, outperforming EWC by 75 percentage points, suggesting that modular epistemic architectures are fundamentally more amenable to lifelong learning than regularization-based approaches. These results point toward a broader architectural principle: reliable self-evolving agents may require an explicit epistemic control layer that governs reasoning framework selection.

摘要（中文）: 当前终身学习智能体的一个关键失效模式并非知识的缺乏，而是无法决定如何进行推理。当智能体遇到“这枚硬币是公平的吗？”时，它必须识别是调用频率论假设检验还是贝叶斯后验推断——这些框架在认识论上是不相容的。混合它们会导致结构性失效，而不是轻微的错误，这种失效会沿着决策链传播。我们将此形式化为宇宙路由问题：在调用专门的求解器之前，将问题分类到互斥的信念空间中。我们的主要发现挑战了传统假设：（1）硬路由到异构求解器匹配了软MoE的准确率，同时速度提升了7倍，因为认识论上不相容的框架无法进行有意义的平均；（2）一个4.65亿参数的路由器实现了比关键词匹配基线小2.3倍的泛化差距，表明它运用的是语义推理而非表面层面的推理；（3）当扩展到新的信念空间时，基于排练的持续学习实现了零遗忘，优于EWC 75个百分点，表明模块化认知架构从根本上比基于正则化的方法更适合终身学习。这些结果指向一个更广泛的架构原则：可靠的自演化智能体可能需要一个显式的认知控制层来管理推理框架的选择。

TLDR: This paper introduces "Universe Routing," a method for selecting appropriate reasoning frameworks for lifelong agents, showing that hard routing outperforms soft averaging and rehearsal-based continual learning excels in new belief spaces, suggesting the need for explicit epistemic control.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为"宇宙路由"的方法，用于为终身智能体选择合适的推理框架。研究表明，硬路由优于软平均，基于排练的持续学习在新信念空间中表现出色，这表明需要显式的认知控制。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Zhaohui Geoffrey Wang

TrajMamba: An Ego-Motion-Guided Mamba Model for Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction from an Egocentric Perspective

Abstract (English): Future trajectory prediction of a tracked pedestrian from an egocentric perspective is a key task in areas such as autonomous driving and robot navigation. The challenge of this task lies in the complex dynamic relative motion between the ego-camera and the tracked pedestrian. To address this challenge, we propose an ego-motion-guided trajectory prediction network based on the Mamba model. Firstly, two Mamba models are used as encoders to extract pedestrian motion and ego-motion features from pedestrian movement and ego-vehicle movement, respectively. Then, an ego-motion guided Mamba decoder that explicitly models the relative motion between the pedestrian and the vehicle by integrating pedestrian motion features as historical context with ego-motion features as guiding cues to capture decoded features. Finally, the future trajectory is generated from the decoded features corresponding to the future timestamps. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on the PIE and JAAD datasets.

摘要（中文）: 从自我中心视角预测被追踪行人的未来轨迹是自动驾驶和机器人导航等领域的关键任务。该任务的挑战在于自我相机与被追踪行人之间复杂的动态相对运动。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于Mamba模型的、以自身运动为引导的轨迹预测网络。首先，使用两个Mamba模型作为编码器，分别从行人运动和自我车辆运动中提取行人运动特征和自身运动特征。然后，利用一个以自身运动为引导的Mamba解码器，通过将行人运动特征作为历史上下文，并将自身运动特征作为引导线索集成，来显式地建模行人和车辆之间的相对运动，从而捕获解码后的特征。最后，从对应于未来时间戳的解码特征中生成未来轨迹。大量实验证明了所提出模型的有效性，并在PIE和JAAD数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

TLDR: TrajMamba uses Mamba models to predict pedestrian trajectories from an egocentric perspective by explicitly modeling the relative motion between the pedestrian and the ego-vehicle, achieving state-of-the-art results on standard datasets.

简要说明: TrajMamba 使用 Mamba 模型从以自我为中心的角度预测行人轨迹，通过显式建模行人和自我车辆之间的相对运动，在标准数据集上实现了最先进的结果。

Authors: Yusheng Peng, Gaofeng Zhang, Liping Zheng

AgentTrace: Causal Graph Tracing for Root Cause Analysis in Deployed Multi-Agent Systems

Abstract (English): As multi-agent AI systems are increasingly deployed in real-world settings - from automated customer support to DevOps remediation - failures become harder to diagnose due to cascading effects, hidden dependencies, and long execution traces. We present AgentTrace, a lightweight causal tracing framework for post-hoc failure diagnosis in deployed multi-agent workflows. AgentTrace reconstructs causal graphs from execution logs, traces backward from error manifestations, and ranks candidate root causes using interpretable structural and positional signals - without requiring LLM inference at debugging time. Across a diverse benchmark of multi-agent failure scenarios designed to reflect common deployment patterns, AgentTrace localizes root causes with high accuracy and sub-second latency, significantly outperforming both heuristic and LLM-based baselines. Our results suggest that causal tracing provides a practical foundation for improving the reliability and trustworthiness of agentic systems in the wild.

摘要（中文）: 随着多智能体人工智能系统越来越多地部署在现实环境中——从自动化客户支持到DevOps修复——由于级联效应、隐藏的依赖关系和漫长的执行轨迹，故障诊断变得更加困难。我们提出了AgentTrace，一个轻量级的因果追踪框架，用于已部署多智能体工作流的事后故障诊断。AgentTrace从执行日志中重建因果图，从错误表现向后追踪，并使用可解释的结构和位置信号对候选根本原因进行排序——无需在调试时进行LLM推理。在一个旨在反映常见部署模式的多样化多智能体故障场景基准测试中，AgentTrace以高精度和亚秒级延迟定位根本原因，显著优于基于启发式和基于LLM的基线方法。我们的结果表明，因果追踪为提高实际应用中智能体系统的可靠性和可信度提供了切实可行的基础。

TLDR: AgentTrace is a framework for diagnosing failures in deployed multi-agent systems by reconstructing causal graphs from execution logs and ranking potential root causes. It outperforms heuristic and LLM-based baselines in localizing root causes.

简要说明: AgentTrace是一个用于诊断已部署的多智能体系统中故障的框架，它通过从执行日志中重建因果图并对潜在的根本原因进行排序。在定位根本原因方面，它优于基于启发式和基于LLM的基线。

Novelty: (8/10)
