Authors: Zhaohui Geoffrey Wang

MVHOI: Bridge Multi-view Condition to Complex Human-Object Interaction Video Reenactment via 3D Foundation Model

Abstract (English): Human-Object Interaction (HOI) video reenactment with realistic motion remains a frontier in expressive digital human creation. Existing approaches primarily handle simple image-plane motion (e.g., in-plane translations), struggling with complex non-planar manipulations like out-of-plane reorientation. In this paper, we propose MVHOI, a two-stage HOI video reenactment framework that bridges multi-view reference conditions and video foundation models via a 3D Foundation Model (3DFM). The 3DFM first produces view-consistent object priors conditioned on implicit motion dynamics across novel viewpoints. A controllable video generation model then synthesizes high-fidelity object texture by incorporating multi-view reference images, ensuring appearance consistency via a reasonable retrieval mechanism. By enabling these two stages to mutually reinforce one another during the inference phase, our framework shows superior performance in generating long-duration HOI videos with intricate object manipulations. Extensive experiments show substantial improvements over prior approaches, especially for HOI with complex 3D object manipulations.

摘要（中文）: 利用逼真运动进行人-物交互 (HOI) 视频重演仍然是表现力丰富的数字人创建领域的前沿课题。现有方法主要处理简单的图像平面运动（例如，平面内平移），难以应对复杂的非平面操作，例如平面外重定向。在本文中，我们提出了一种 MVHOI，这是一种两阶段 HOI 视频重演框架，它通过一个 3D 基础模型 (3DFM) 连接多视角参考条件和视频基础模型。3DFM 首先产生视角一致的物体先验，这些先验以跨新视点的隐式运动动力学为条件。然后，一个可控的视频生成模型通过纳入多视角参考图像来合成高保真物体纹理，并通过合理的检索机制确保外观一致性。通过使这两个阶段在推理阶段相互加强，我们的框架在生成具有复杂物体操作的长时长 HOI 视频方面表现出卓越的性能。大量的实验表明，该方法优于以往的方法，尤其是在具有复杂 3D 物体操作的 HOI 方面。

TLDR: The paper introduces MVHOI, a two-stage framework that reenacts complex human-object interaction videos with realistic 3D object manipulations by leveraging multi-view conditions and a 3D foundation model.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了MVHOI，一个两阶段框架，通过利用多视角条件和一个3D基础模型，重现具有逼真3D物体操控的复杂人-物交互视频。

Authors: Jinguang Tong, Jinbo Wu, Kaisiyuan Wang, Zhelun Shen, Xuan Huang, Mochu Xiang, Xuesong Li, Yingying Li, Haocheng Feng, Chen Zhao, Hang Zhou, Wei He, Chuong Nguyen, Jingdong Wang, Hongdong Li

EcoFair-CH-MARL: Scalable Constrained Hierarchical Multi-Agent RL with Real-Time Emission Budgets and Fairness Guarantees

Abstract (English): Global decarbonisation targets and tightening market pressures demand maritime logistics solutions that are simultaneously efficient, sustainable, and equitable. We introduce EcoFair-CH-MARL, a constrained hierarchical multi-agent reinforcement learning framework that unifies three innovations: (i) a primal-dual budget layer that provably bounds cumulative emissions under stochastic weather and demand; (ii) a fairness-aware reward transformer with dynamically scheduled penalties that enforces max-min cost equity across heterogeneous fleets; and (iii) a two-tier policy architecture that decouples strategic routing from real-time vessel control, enabling linear scaling in agent count. New theoretical results establish O(\sqrt{T}) regret for both constraint violations and fairness loss. Experiments on a high-fidelity maritime digital twin (16 ports, 50 vessels) driven by automatic identification system traces, plus an energy-grid case study, show up to 15% lower emissions, 12% higher through-put, and a 45% fair-cost improvement over state-of-the-art hierarchical and constrained MARL baselines. In addition, EcoFair-CH-MARL achieves stronger equity (lower Gini and higher min-max welfare) than fairness-specific MARL baselines (e.g., SOTO, FEN), and its modular design is compatible with both policy- and value-based learners. EcoFair-CH-MARL therefore advances the feasibility of large-scale, regulation-compliant, and socially responsible multi-agent coordination in safety-critical domains.

摘要（中文）: 全球脱碳目标和日益收紧的市场压力要求海运物流解决方案必须同时具备高效、可持续和公平性。我们引入 EcoFair-CH-MARL，这是一个受约束的分层多智能体强化学习框架，它融合了三项创新：（i）一个原始-对偶预算层，可以证明在随机天气和需求下累积排放量的边界；（ii）一个公平感知奖励转换器，具有动态调度的惩罚，可以跨异构船队强制执行最大-最小成本公平性；（iii）一个两层策略架构，将战略路由与实时船舶控制分离，从而实现智能体数量的线性扩展。新的理论结果表明，约束违反和公平损失的遗憾值都有 O(\sqrt{T})。在一个由船舶自动识别系统轨迹驱动的高保真海运数字孪生（16 个港口，50 艘船）以及一个能源网案例研究上的实验表明，与最先进的分层和约束 MARL 基线相比，排放量降低高达 15%，吞吐量提高 12%，公平成本改善 45%。此外，EcoFair-CH-MARL 比特定于公平性的 MARL 基线（例如，SOTO，FEN）实现了更强的公平性（更低的基尼系数和更高的最小-最大福利），并且其模块化设计与基于策略和基于价值的学习器都兼容。因此，EcoFair-CH-MARL 提升了在安全关键领域中大规模、符合法规且具有社会责任感的多智能体协同的可行性。

TLDR: The paper introduces EcoFair-CH-MARL, a constrained hierarchical multi-agent RL framework for maritime logistics, achieving improved emissions, throughput, and fairness with theoretical guarantees and demonstrated performance in high-fidelity simulations. It's focused on large-scale, regulation-compliant, and socially responsible multi-agent coordination.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为 EcoFair-CH-MARL 的约束分层多智能体强化学习框架，用于海事物流，实现了改进的排放、吞吐量和公平性，具有理论保证，并在高保真模拟中得到了验证。它专注于大规模、符合法规且具有社会责任感的多智能体协调。

Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Saad Alqithami

The Scenic Route to Deception: Dark Patterns and Explainability Pitfalls in Conversational Navigation

Abstract (English): As pedestrian navigation increasingly experiments with Generative AI, and in particular Large Language Models, the nature of routing risks transforming from a verifiable geometric task into an opaque, persuasive dialogue. While conversational interfaces promise personalisation, they introduce risks of manipulation and misplaced trust. We categorise these risks using a 2x2 framework based on intent and origin, distinguishing between intentional manipulations (dark patterns) and unintended harms (explainability pitfalls). We propose seamful design strategies to mitigate these harms. We suggest that one robust way to operationalise trustworthy conversational navigation is through neuro-symbolic architecture, where verifiable pathfinding algorithms ground GenAI's persuasive capabilities, ensuring systems explain their limitations and incentives as clearly as they explain the route.

摘要（中文）: 随着行人导航越来越多地尝试生成式人工智能，特别是大型语言模型，路径规划的本质正面临着从一个可验证的几何任务转变为一个不透明的、具有说服力的对话的风险。尽管对话式界面有望实现个性化，但它们也引入了操纵和错位信任的风险。我们使用一个基于意图和来源的2x2框架来对这些风险进行分类，区分了有意的操纵（黑暗模式）和无意的危害（可解释性陷阱）。我们提出了无缝设计策略来缓解这些危害。我们认为，实现可信赖的对话式导航的一个可靠方法是通过神经符号架构，通过可验证的路径查找算法来限制生成式人工智能的说服能力，确保系统在解释路线的同时，也清晰地解释其局限性和激励机制。

TLDR: This paper analyzes the risks of manipulation in GenAI-powered pedestrian navigation, classifying them into dark patterns and explainability pitfalls, and proposes mitigation strategies using seamful design and neuro-symbolic architectures.

简要说明: 本文分析了生成式人工智能驱动的行人导航中存在的操纵风险，将其分为恶意欺骗和可解释性缺陷，并提出了利用无缝设计和神经符号架构的缓解策略。

Relevance: (6/10)

Authors: Ilya Ilyankou, Stefano Cavazzi, James Haworth

Emotional Cost Functions for AI Safety: Teaching Agents to Feel the Weight of Irreversible Consequences

Abstract (English): Humans learn from catastrophic mistakes not through numerical penalties, but through qualitative suffering that reshapes who they are. Current AI safety approaches replicate none of this. Reward shaping captures magnitude, not meaning. Rule-based alignment constrains behaviour, but does not change it. We propose Emotional Cost Functions, a framework in which agents develop Qualitative Suffering States, rich narrative representations of irreversible consequences that persist forward and actively reshape character. Unlike numerical penalties, qualitative suffering states capture the meaning of what was lost, the specific void it creates, and how it changes the agent's relationship to similar future situations. Our four-component architecture - Consequence Processor, Character State, Anticipatory Scan, and Story Update is grounded in one principle. Actions cannot be undone and agents must live with what they have caused. Anticipatory dread operates through two pathways. Experiential dread arises from the agent's own lived consequences. Pre-experiential dread is acquired without direct experience, through training or inter-agent transmission. Together they mirror how human wisdom accumulates across experience and culture. Ten experiments across financial trading, crisis support, and content moderation show that qualitative suffering produces specific wisdom rather than generalised paralysis. Agents correctly engage with moderate opportunities at 90-100% while numerical baselines over-refuse at 90%. Architecture ablation confirms the mechanism is necessary. The full system generates ten personal grounding phrases per probe vs. zero for a vanilla LLM. Statistical validation (N=10) confirms reproducibility at 80-100% consistency.

摘要（中文）: 人类从灾难性的错误中学习，并非通过数值惩罚，而是通过重塑其存在方式的定性痛苦。目前的人工智能安全方法没有复制这一点。奖励塑造捕捉的是幅度，而非意义。基于规则的对齐约束行为，但并不改变它。 我们提出了情绪成本函数，这是一种使智能体发展出定性痛苦状态的框架，这种状态是对不可逆转的后果的丰富叙事性表示，它可以持续存在并积极地重塑性格。与数值惩罚不同，定性痛苦状态捕捉到了损失的意义、它所创造的具体空缺，以及它如何改变智能体与未来类似情境的关系。我们的四组件架构——后果处理器、性格状态、预期扫描和故事更新——基于一个原则：行动不可撤销，智能体必须承受其所造成的结果。 预期的恐惧感通过两条途径运作。 体验性的恐惧感源于智能体自身经历的后果。 前体验性的恐惧感则无需直接经验即可获得，通过训练或智能体间的传播获得。 它们共同反映了人类智慧如何通过经验和文化积累。 在金融交易、危机支持和内容审核方面的十项实验表明，定性痛苦会产生特定的智慧，而不是普遍的麻痹。智能体正确地参与中等机会的概率为 90-100%，而数值基线过度拒绝的概率为 90%。架构消融实验证实了该机制的必要性。 完整系统为每个探针生成十个个人基础短语，而原始 LLM 则为零。 统计验证 (N=10) 确认了 80-100% 一致性的可重复性。

TLDR: This paper introduces Emotional Cost Functions, a framework that equips AI agents with "qualitative suffering states" to better learn from irreversible consequences, demonstrating improved decision-making compared to numerical penalties in several tasks.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为“情感成本函数”的框架，该框架通过赋予AI智能体“定性痛苦状态”来更好地从不可逆转的后果中学习，并在多个任务中展示了优于数值惩罚的决策能力。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (9/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Pandurang Mopgar

Tri-Prompting: Video Diffusion with Unified Control over Scene, Subject, and Motion

Abstract (English): Recent video diffusion models have made remarkable strides in visual quality, yet precise, fine-grained control remains a key bottleneck that limits practical customizability for content creation. For AI video creators, three forms of control are crucial: (i) scene composition, (ii) multi-view consistent subject customization, and (iii) camera-pose or object-motion adjustment. Existing methods typically handle these dimensions in isolation, with limited support for multi-view subject synthesis and identity preservation under arbitrary pose changes. This lack of a unified architecture makes it difficult to support versatile, jointly controllable video. We introduce Tri-Prompting, a unified framework and two-stage training paradigm that integrates scene composition, multi-view subject consistency, and motion control. Our approach leverages a dual-condition motion module driven by 3D tracking points for background scenes and downsampled RGB cues for foreground subjects. To ensure a balance between controllability and visual realism, we further propose an inference ControlNet scale schedule. Tri-Prompting supports novel workflows, including 3D-aware subject insertion into any scenes and manipulation of existing subjects in an image. Experimental results demonstrate that Tri-Prompting significantly outperforms specialized baselines such as Phantom and DaS in multi-view subject identity, 3D consistency, and motion accuracy.

摘要（中文）: 近期的视频扩散模型在视觉质量方面取得了显著进展，但精确、细粒度的控制仍然是一个关键瓶颈，限制了内容创作的实际可定制性。对于AI视频创作者而言，三种形式的控制至关重要：（i）场景构图，（ii）多视角一致的主体定制，以及（iii）相机姿态或物体运动调整。现有方法通常孤立地处理这些维度，对多视角主体合成和任意姿态变化下的身份保持支持有限。这种缺乏统一架构的情况使得支持多功能、联合可控的视频变得困难。我们引入了Tri-Prompting，一个统一的框架和两阶段训练范式，集成了场景构图、多视角主体一致性和运动控制。我们的方法利用一个双条件运动模块，该模块由用于背景场景的3D跟踪点和用于前景主体的降采样RGB线索驱动。为了确保可控性和视觉真实感之间的平衡，我们进一步提出了一个推理ControlNet尺度调度。Tri-Prompting 支持新的工作流程，包括将具有3D感知的主体插入到任何场景中，以及操纵图像中现有的主体。实验结果表明，Tri-Prompting 在多视角主体身份、3D一致性和运动准确性方面显著优于特定的基线方法，如 Phantom 和 DaS。

TLDR: The paper introduces Tri-Prompting, a unified framework for video diffusion that enables joint control over scene composition, multi-view subject consistency, and motion, outperforming existing methods.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Tri-Prompting，一个统一的视频扩散框架，可以联合控制场景构成、多视角主体一致性和运动，并且优于现有方法。

Authors: Zhenghong Zhou, Xiaohang Zhan, Zhiqin Chen, Soo Ye Kim, Nanxuan Zhao, Haitian Zheng, Qing Liu, He Zhang, Zhe Lin, Yuqian Zhou, Jiebo Luo

Severe Domain Shift in Skeleton-Based Action Recognition:A Study of Uncertainty Failure in Real-World Gym Environments

Abstract (English): The practical deployment gap -- transitioning from controlled multi-view 3D skeleton capture to unconstrained monocular 2D pose estimation -- introduces a compound domain shift whose safety implications remain critically underexplored. We present a systematic study of this severe domain shift using a novel Gym2D dataset (style/viewpoint shift) and the UCF101 dataset (semantic shift). Our Skeleton Transformer achieves 63.2% cross-subject accuracy on NTU-120 but drops to 1.6% under zero-shot transfer to the Gym domain and 1.16% on UCF101. Critically, we demonstrate that high Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) detection AUROC does not guarantee safe selective classification. Standard uncertainty methods fail to detect this performance drop: the model remains confidently incorrect with 99.6% risk even at 50% coverage across both OOD datasets. While energy-based scoring (AUROC >= 0.91) and Mahalanobis distance provide reliable distributional detection signals, such high AUROC scores coexist with poor risk-coverage behavior when making decisions. A lightweight finetuned gating mechanism restores calibration and enables graceful abstention, substantially reducing the rate of confident wrong predictions. Our work challenges standard deployment assumptions, providing a principled safety analysis of both semantic and geometric skeleton recognition deployment.

摘要（中文）: 实际部署差距——即从受控的多视角3D骨骼捕捉过渡到无约束的单目2D姿态估计——引入了复合领域迁移，其安全隐患尚未得到充分研究。我们使用新颖的Gym2D数据集（风格/视角迁移）和UCF101数据集（语义迁移）对这种严重的领域迁移进行了系统研究。我们的骨骼Transformer在NTU-120数据集上取得了63.2%的跨主体准确率，但在零样本迁移到Gym领域时降至1.6%，在UCF101上降至1.16%。 关键是，我们证明了高异分布(OOD)检测AUROC并不能保证安全的选择性分类。标准的不确定性方法未能检测到这种性能下降：即使在两个OOD数据集上覆盖率达到50%，模型仍以99.6%的风险保持自信的错误状态。虽然基于能量的评分（AUROC >= 0.91）和马氏距离提供了可靠的分布检测信号，但当进行决策时，如此高的AUROC分数与较差的风险-覆盖率行为共存。一种轻量级的微调门控机制恢复了校准并实现了优雅的弃权，从而大幅降低了自信错误预测的比例。我们的工作挑战了标准的部署假设，并对语义和几何骨骼识别部署进行了严格的安全分析。

TLDR: This paper investigates the severe domain shift problem in skeleton-based action recognition, showing that standard uncertainty methods fail to detect performance drops and proposing a finetuned gating mechanism for improved calibration and risk reduction.

简要说明: 本文研究了基于骨骼的动作识别中严重的领域迁移问题，表明标准的不确定性方法无法检测到性能下降，并提出了一种微调的门控机制，以改善校准和降低风险。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Aaditya Khanal, Junxiu Zhou

ViFeEdit: A Video-Free Tuner of Your Video Diffusion Transformer

Abstract (English): Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have demonstrated remarkable scalability and quality in image and video generation, prompting growing interest in extending them to controllable generation and editing tasks. However, compared to the image counterparts, progress in video control and editing remains limited, mainly due to the scarcity of paired video data and the high computational cost of training video diffusion models. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a video-free tuning framework termed ViFeEdit for video diffusion transformers. Without requiring any forms of video training data, ViFeEdit achieves versatile video generation and editing, adapted solely with 2D images. At the core of our approach is an architectural reparameterization that decouples spatial independence from the full 3D attention in modern video diffusion transformers, which enables visually faithful editing while maintaining temporal consistency with only minimal additional parameters. Moreover, this design operates in a dual-path pipeline with separate timestep embeddings for noise scheduling, exhibiting strong adaptability to diverse conditioning signals. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method delivers promising results of controllable video generation and editing with only minimal training on 2D image data. Codes are available https://github.com/Lexie-YU/ViFeEdit.

摘要（中文）: 扩散Transformer (DiT) 在图像和视频生成方面展现出卓越的可扩展性和质量，激发了将其扩展到可控生成和编辑任务的日益浓厚的兴趣。然而，与图像相比，视频控制和编辑的进展仍然有限，这主要是由于配对视频数据的稀缺以及训练视频扩散模型的高计算成本。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 ViFeEdit 的视频自由微调框架，用于视频扩散Transformer。ViFeEdit 不需要任何形式的视频训练数据，仅通过二维图像就能实现通用的视频生成和编辑。我们方法的核心是一种架构重参数化，它将空间独立性与现代视频扩散Transformer中的完整3D注意力解耦，从而仅需最少的额外参数就能实现视觉上逼真的编辑，同时保持时间一致性。此外，这种设计在一个双路径流水线中运行，并具有用于噪声调度的单独的时间步长嵌入，从而对各种条件信号表现出强大的适应性。大量实验表明，我们的方法仅需在二维图像数据上进行最少的训练，即可提供有希望的可控视频生成和编辑结果。代码可在 https://github.com/Lexie-YU/ViFeEdit 获取。

TLDR: ViFeEdit introduces a video-free tuning framework for video diffusion transformers, enabling controllable video generation and editing using only 2D image data, addressing the scarcity of video data and high computational costs.

简要说明: ViFeEdit 提出了一个用于视频扩散变换器的免视频微调框架，仅使用 2D 图像数据即可实现可控视频生成和编辑，解决了视频数据稀缺和计算成本高的问题。

Authors: Ruonan Yu, Zhenxiong Tan, Zigeng Chen, Songhua Liu, Xinchao Wang

Pointing-Based Object Recognition

Abstract (English): This paper presents a comprehensive pipeline for recognizing objects targeted by human pointing gestures using RGB images. As human-robot interaction moves toward more intuitive interfaces, the ability to identify targets of non-verbal communication becomes crucial. Our proposed system integrates several existing state-of-the-art methods, including object detection, body pose estimation, monocular depth estimation, and vision-language models. We evaluate the impact of 3D spatial information reconstructed from a single image and the utility of image captioning models in correcting classification errors. Experimental results on a custom dataset show that incorporating depth information significantly improves target identification, especially in complex scenes with overlapping objects. The modularity of the approach allows for deployment in environments where specialized depth sensors are unavailable.

摘要（中文）: 本文提出了一种利用RGB图像识别手指导向目标物体的综合流水线。随着人机交互向更直观的界面发展，识别非语言交流目标的能力变得至关重要。我们提出的系统集成了几种现有的最先进方法，包括目标检测、人体姿态估计、单目深度估计和视觉-语言模型。我们评估了从单张图像重建的3D空间信息的影响以及图像描述模型在纠正分类错误方面的效用。在自定义数据集上的实验结果表明，结合深度信息显著提高了目标识别率，尤其是在物体重叠的复杂场景中。该方法的模块化设计使其能够部署在无法使用专用深度传感器的环境中。

TLDR: This paper introduces a pipeline for recognizing objects pointed at by humans in RGB images, using a combination of object detection, pose estimation, monocular depth estimation, and vision-language models. They show improved performance by incorporating depth information in a custom dataset.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一个用于识别RGB图像中人类指向物体的流水线，该流水线结合了目标检测、姿势估计、单目深度估计和视觉-语言模型。 他们在一个定制的数据集中展示了通过结合深度信息而改进的性能。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (6/10)

Authors: Lukáš Hajdúch, Viktor Kocur

Reference-Free Omnidirectional Stereo Matching via Multi-View Consistency Maximization

Abstract (English): Reliable omnidirectional depth estimation from multi-fisheye stereo matching is pivotal to many applications, such as embodied robotics. Existing approaches either rely on spherical sweeping with heuristic fusion strategies to build the cost columns or perform reference-centric stereo matching based on rectified views. However, these methods fail to explicitly exploit geometric relationships between multiple views, rendering them less capable of capturing the global dependencies, visibility, or scale changes. In this paper, we shift to a new perspective and propose a novel reference-free framework, dubbed FreeOmniMVS, via multi-view consistency maximization. The highlight of FreeOmniMVS is that it can aggregate pair-wise correlations into a robust, visibility-aware, and global consensus. As such, it is tolerant to occlusions, partial overlaps, and varying baselines. Specifically, to achieve global coherence, we introduce a novel View-pair Correlation Transformer (VCT) that explicitly models pairwise correlation volumes across all camera view pairs, allowing us to drop unreliable pairs caused by occlusion or out-of-focus observations. To realize scalable and visibility-aware consensus, we propose a lightweight attention mechanism that adaptively fuses the correlation vectors, eliminating the need for a designated reference view and allowing all cameras to contribute equally to the stereo matching process. Extensive experiments on diverse benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method for globally consistent, visibility-aware, and scale-aware omnidirectional depth estimation.

摘要（中文）: 从多鱼眼立体匹配中进行可靠的全向深度估计对于许多应用至关重要，例如具身机器人。现有方法要么依赖于带有启发式融合策略的球面扫描来构建代价列，要么基于校正后的视图执行以参考视图为中心的立体匹配。然而，这些方法未能明确利用多个视图之间的几何关系，从而使其在捕获全局依赖性、可见性或尺度变化方面能力不足。在本文中，我们转换到一个新的视角，并提出了一种新颖的无参考框架，名为FreeOmniMVS，通过多视图一致性最大化来实现。 FreeOmniMVS的亮点在于它可以将成对相关性聚合为鲁棒的、可见性感知的和全局共识。因此，它能够容忍遮挡、部分重叠和不同的基线。具体来说，为了实现全局一致性，我们引入了一种新颖的视图对相关性转换器（VCT），它可以显式地建模所有相机视图对之间的成对相关体积，从而使我们能够舍弃由遮挡或失焦观测引起的不太可靠的对。为了实现可扩展的、可见性感知的共识，我们提出了一种轻量级的注意力机制，它可以自适应地融合相关向量，从而消除了对指定参考视图的需求，并允许所有相机平等地参与立体匹配过程。 在各种基准数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法在全球一致性、可见性感知和尺度感知的全向深度估计方面具有优越性。

TLDR: This paper introduces FreeOmniMVS, a novel reference-free framework for omnidirectional stereo matching that leverages multi-view consistency maximization via a View-pair Correlation Transformer (VCT) and attention mechanisms, demonstrating superior performance on benchmark datasets.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了FreeOmniMVS，一种新颖的无参考全向立体匹配框架，通过View-pair Correlation Transformer (VCT)和注意力机制，利用多视图一致性最大化，并在基准数据集上展示了优越的性能。

Relevance: (6/10)

Authors: Lehuai Xu, Weiming Zhang, Yang Li, Sidan Du, Lin Wang

Riemannian Motion Generation: A Unified Framework for Human Motion Representation and Generation via Riemannian Flow Matching

Abstract (English): Human motion generation is often learned in Euclidean spaces, although valid motions follow structured non-Euclidean geometry. We present Riemannian Motion Generation (RMG), a unified framework that represents motion on a product manifold and learns dynamics via Riemannian flow matching. RMG factorizes motion into several manifold factors, yielding a scale-free representation with intrinsic normalization, and uses geodesic interpolation, tangent-space supervision, and manifold-preserving ODE integration for training and sampling. On HumanML3D, RMG achieves state-of-the-art FID in the HumanML3D format (0.043) and ranks first on all reported metrics under the MotionStreamer format. On MotionMillion, it also surpasses strong baselines (FID 5.6, R@1 0.86). Ablations show that the compact $\mathscr{T}+\mathscr{R}$ (translation + rotations) representation is the most stable and effective, highlighting geometry-aware modeling as a practical and scalable route to high-fidelity motion generation.

摘要（中文）: 人体运动生成通常在欧几里得空间中学习，但有效的运动遵循结构化的非欧几里得几何。我们提出了黎曼运动生成 (Riemannian Motion Generation, RMG)，一个统一的框架，其在乘积流形上表示运动，并通过黎曼流匹配学习动力学。RMG 将运动分解为多个流形因子，产生具有内在归一化的无尺度表示，并使用测地线插值、切空间监督和保持流形的 ODE 积分进行训练和采样。在 HumanML3D 数据集上，RMG 在 HumanML3D 格式下实现了最先进的 FID 分数 (0.043)，并在 MotionStreamer 格式下在所有报告的指标中排名第一。在 MotionMillion 数据集上，它也超越了强大的基线 (FID 5.6, R@1 0.86)。消融实验表明，紧凑的 $\mathscr{T}+\mathscr{R}$ (平移 + 旋转) 表示是最稳定有效的，突出了几何感知建模是实现高保真运动生成的一种实用且可扩展的途径。

TLDR: This paper introduces Riemannian Motion Generation (RMG), a novel framework for human motion generation that leverages Riemannian flow matching on a product manifold, achieving state-of-the-art results on HumanML3D and strong performance on MotionMillion.

简要说明: 本文介绍了黎曼运动生成 (RMG)，这是一种新颖的人体运动生成框架，它利用产品流形上的黎曼流匹配，在 HumanML3D 上实现了最先进的结果，并在 MotionMillion 上实现了强大的性能。

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Fangran Miao, Jian Huang, Ting Li

Molecular Identifier Visual Prompt and Verifiable Reinforcement Learning for Chemical Reaction Diagram Parsing

Abstract (English): Reaction diagram parsing (RxnDP) is critical for extracting chemical synthesis information from literature. Although recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm to automate this complex visual reasoning task, their application is fundamentally bottlenecked by the inability to align visual chemical entities with pre-trained knowledge, alongside the inherent discrepancy between token-level training and reaction-level evaluation. To address these dual challenges, this work enhances VLM-based RxnDP from two complementary perspectives: prompting representation and learning paradigms. First, we propose Identifier as Visual Prompting (IdtVP), which leverages naturally occurring molecule identifiers (e.g., bold numerals like 1a) to activate the chemical knowledge acquired during VLM pre-training. IdtVP enables powerful zero-shot and out-of-distribution capabilities, outperforming existing prompting strategies. Second, to further optimize performance within fine-tuning paradigms, we introduce Re3-DAPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that leverages verifiable rewards to directly optimize reaction-level metrics, thereby achieving consistent gains over standard supervised fine-tuning. Additionally, we release the ScannedRxn benchmark, comprising scanned historical reaction diagrams with real-world artifacts, to rigorously assess model robustness and out-of-distribution ability. Our contributions advance the accuracy and generalization of VLM-based reaction diagram parsing. We will release data, models, and code on GitHub.

摘要（中文）: 反应图解析 (RxnDP) 对于从文献中提取化学合成信息至关重要。尽管最近的视觉-语言模型 (VLMs) 已成为自动化这一复杂视觉推理任务的一种有前景的范式，但其应用从根本上受到以下因素的限制：无法将视觉化学实体与预训练知识对齐，以及令牌级训练和反应级评估之间固有的差异。为了应对这两个挑战，本工作从两个互补的视角增强了基于 VLM 的 RxnDP：提示表示和学习范式。首先，我们提出了“标识符作为视觉提示” (IdtVP)，它利用自然存在的分子标识符（例如，粗体数字如 1a）来激活 VLM 预训练期间获得的化学知识。 IdtVP 实现了强大的零样本和超出分布能力，优于现有的提示策略。其次，为了进一步优化微调范式中的性能，我们引入了 Re3-DAPO，一种强化学习算法，它利用可验证的奖励来直接优化反应级指标，从而在标准监督微调的基础上实现了持续的增益。此外，我们发布了 ScannedRxn 基准，其中包含带有真实世界伪影的扫描历史反应图，以严格评估模型的鲁棒性和超出分布能力。我们的贡献提高了基于 VLM 的反应图解析的准确性和泛化性。我们将在 GitHub 上发布数据、模型和代码。

TLDR: The paper introduces Identifier as Visual Prompting (IdtVP) and Re3-DAPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm, to improve Vision-Language Model based reaction diagram parsing (RxnDP) and releases a new benchmark dataset called ScannedRxn.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 Identifier as Visual Prompting (IdtVP) 和 Re3-DAPO（一种强化学习算法），以改进基于视觉-语言模型的反应图解析 (RxnDP)，并发布了一个名为 ScannedRxn 的新基准数据集。

Authors: Jiahe Song, Chuang Wang, Yinfan Wang, Hao Zheng, Rui Nie, Bowen Jiang, Xingjian Wei, Junyuan Gao, Yubin Wang, Bin Wang, Lijun Wu, Jiang Wu, Qian Yu, Conghui He

Edit2Interp: Adapting Image Foundation Models from Spatial Editing to Video Frame Interpolation with Few-Shot Learning

Abstract (English): Pre-trained image editing models exhibit strong spatial reasoning and object-aware transformation capabilities acquired from billions of image-text pairs, yet they possess no explicit temporal modeling. This paper demonstrates that these spatial priors can be repurposed to unlock temporal synthesis capabilities through minimal adaptation - without introducing any video-specific architecture or motion estimation modules. We show that a large image editing model (Qwen-Image-Edit), originally designed solely for static instruction-based edits, can be adapted for Video Frame Interpolation (VFI) using only 64-256 training samples via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Our core contribution is revealing that the model's inherent understanding of "how objects transform" in static scenes contains latent temporal reasoning that can be activated through few-shot fine-tuning. While the baseline model completely fails at producing coherent intermediate frames, our parameter-efficient adaptation successfully unlocks its interpolation capability. Rather than competing with task-specific VFI methods trained from scratch on massive datasets, our work establishes that foundation image editing models possess untapped potential for temporal tasks, offering a data-efficient pathway for video synthesis in resource-constrained scenarios. This bridges the gap between image manipulation and video understanding, suggesting that spatial and temporal reasoning may be more intertwined in foundation models than previously recognized

摘要（中文）: 预训练图像编辑模型展现出从数十亿图像-文本对中习得的强大的空间推理和对象感知变换能力，然而它们不具备显式的时间建模能力。本文证明，这些空间先验可以通过最小的适配被重新利用来解锁时间合成能力——无需引入任何特定于视频的架构或运动估计模块。我们展示了一个大型图像编辑模型（Qwen-Image-Edit），其最初仅被设计用于静态的基于指令的编辑，可以通过仅使用64-256个训练样本，经由低秩适配(LoRA)被调整用于视频帧插值(VFI)。我们的核心贡献在于揭示了该模型对静态场景中“对象如何变换”的内在理解，其中包含潜在的时间推理能力，可以通过小样本微调激活。尽管基线模型完全无法生成连贯的中间帧，我们参数高效的适配成功地解锁了其插值能力。我们的工作并非与从头开始在海量数据集上训练的特定任务VFI方法竞争，而是证明了基础图像编辑模型在时间任务方面拥有未开发的潜力，为资源受限场景中的视频合成提供了一条数据高效的途径。这弥合了图像处理和视频理解之间的差距，表明在基础模型中，空间和时间推理的关联可能比之前认为的更加紧密。

TLDR: The paper demonstrates that large image editing models can be adapted for video frame interpolation with few-shot learning, revealing latent temporal reasoning capabilities within their existing spatial knowledge.

简要说明: 该论文证明了大型图像编辑模型可以通过少量样本学习来适应视频帧插值，揭示了它们现有空间知识中潜在的时间推理能力。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Nasrin Rahimi, Mısra Yavuz, Burak Can Biner, Yunus Bilge Kurt, Ahmet Rasim Emirdağı, Süleyman Aslan, Görkay Aydemir, M. Akın Yılmaz, A. Murat Tekalp

Mind-of-Director: Multi-modal Agent-Driven Film Previsualization via Collaborative Decision-Making

Abstract (English): We present Mind-of-Director, a multi-modal agent-driven framework for film previz that models the collaborative decision-making process of a film production team. Given a creative idea, Mind-of-Director orchestrates multiple specialized agents to produce previz sequences within the game engine. The framework consists of four cooperative modules: Script Development, where agents draft and refine the screenplay iteratively; Virtual Scene Design, which transforms text into semantically aligned 3D environments; Character Behaviour Control, which determines character blocking and motion; and Camera Planning, which optimizes framing, movement, and composition for cinematic camera effects. A real-time visual editing system built in the game engine further enables interactive inspection and synchronized timeline adjustment across scenes, behaviours, and cameras. Extensive experiments and human evaluations show that Mind-of-Director generates high-quality, semantically grounded previz sequences in approximately 25 minutes per idea, demonstrating the effectiveness of agent collaboration for both automated prototyping and human-in-the-loop filmmaking.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了“导演之心”，一个用于电影预演的多模态、代理驱动的框架，它模拟了电影制作团队的协同决策过程。给定一个创意，“导演之心”协调多个专业代理，以在游戏引擎中生成预演序列。该框架由四个协作模块组成：剧本开发，代理在此模块中迭代地起草和完善剧本；虚拟场景设计，将文本转换为语义对齐的3D环境；角色行为控制，确定角色的走位和动作；以及摄像机规划，优化取景、运动和构图以实现电影化的摄像机效果。一个构建在游戏引擎中的实时视觉编辑系统进一步支持跨场景、行为和摄像机进行交互式检查和同步时间线调整。大量的实验和人工评估表明，“导演之心”能够在大约25分钟内为每个创意生成高质量、语义接地的预演序列，证明了代理协作在自动化原型设计和人机协作电影制作中的有效性。

TLDR: The paper introduces Mind-of-Director, a multi-modal agent-driven framework using collaborative decision-making for film previsualization, achieving high-quality results in real time.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Mind-of-Director，一个多模态、智能体驱动的电影预演框架，通过协同决策，实现了高质量的实时预演效果。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Shufeng Nan, Mengtian Li, Sixiao Zheng, Yuwei Lu, Han Zhang, Yanwei Fu

Unbiased and Biased Variance-Reduced Forward-Reflected-Backward Splitting Methods for Stochastic Composite Inclusions

Abstract (English): This paper develops new variance-reduction techniques for the forward-reflected-backward splitting (FRBS) method to solve a class of possibly nonmonotone stochastic composite inclusions. Unlike unbiased estimators such as mini-batching, developing stochastic biased variants faces a fundamental technical challenge and has not been utilized before for inclusions and fixed-point problems. We fill this gap by designing a new framework that can handle both unbiased and biased estimators. Our main idea is to construct stochastic variance-reduced estimators for the forward-reflected direction and use them to perform iterate updates. First, we propose a class of unbiased variance-reduced estimators and show that increasing mini-batch SGD, loopless-SVRG, and SAGA estimators fall within this class. For these unbiased estimators, we establish a $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$ best-iterate convergence rate for the expected squared residual norm, together with almost-sure convergence of the iterate sequence to a solution. Consequently, we prove that the best oracle complexities for the $n$-finite-sum and expectation settings are $\mathcal{O}(n^{2/3}ε^{-2})$ and $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-10/3})$, respectively, when employing loopless-SVRG or SAGA, where $ε$ is a desired accuracy. Second, we introduce a new class of biased variance-reduced estimators for the forward-reflected direction, which includes SARAH, Hybrid SGD, and Hybrid SVRG as special instances. While the convergence rates remain valid for these biased estimators, the resulting oracle complexities are $\mathcal{O}(n^{3/4}ε^{-2})$ and $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-5})$ for the $n$-finite-sum and expectation settings, respectively. Finally, we conduct two numerical experiments on AUC optimization for imbalanced classification and policy evaluation in reinforcement learning.

摘要（中文）: 本文针对前向-反射-后向分裂(FRBS)方法，开发了新的方差缩减技术，以解决一类可能非单调的随机复合包含问题。与诸如小批量处理之类的无偏估计器不同，开发随机有偏变体面临着根本性的技术挑战，并且以前从未用于包含和不动点问题。我们通过设计一个新的框架来弥补这一空白，该框架可以处理无偏和有偏估计器。我们的主要思想是为前向-反射方向构造随机方差缩减估计器，并使用它们来执行迭代更新。首先，我们提出了一类无偏方差缩减估计器，并表明增加小批量 SGD、无环-SVRG 和 SAGA 估计器都属于这一类。对于这些无偏估计器，我们建立了预期平方残差范数的 $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$ 最佳迭代收敛速度，以及迭代序列几乎必然收敛到解。因此，我们证明，当采用无环-SVRG 或 SAGA 时，$n$-有限和和期望设置的最佳oracle复杂性分别为 $\mathcal{O}(n^{2/3}ε^{-2})$ 和 $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-10/3})$，其中 $ε$ 是所需的精度。其次，我们为前向-反射方向引入了一类新的有偏方差缩减估计器，其中 SARAH、混合 SGD 和混合 SVRG 是其特殊实例。虽然收敛速度对于这些有偏估计器仍然有效，但$n$-有限和和期望设置的相应 oracle 复杂性分别为 $\mathcal{O}(n^{3/4}ε^{-2})$ 和 $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-5})$。最后，我们进行了两个数值实验，分别针对不平衡分类的 AUC 优化和强化学习中的策略评估。

TLDR: This paper introduces new variance-reduction techniques for the forward-reflected-backward splitting method for solving stochastic composite inclusions, incorporating both unbiased and biased estimators and providing convergence rate and oracle complexity results. Numerical experiments validate the approach on AUC optimization and policy evaluation in reinforcement learning.

简要说明: 本文为前向-反射-后向分裂方法开发了新的方差缩减技术，用于解决随机复合包含问题，结合了无偏和有偏估计器，并提供了收敛速度和预言复杂性结果。数值实验验证了该方法在不平衡分类的AUC优化和强化学习中的策略评估中的有效性。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Quoc Tran-Dinh, Nghia Nguyen-Trung

Mechanistic Foundations of Goal-Directed Control

Abstract (English): Mechanistic interpretability has transformed the analysis of transformer circuits by decomposing model behavior into competing algorithms, identifying phase transitions during training, and deriving closed-form predictions for when and why strategies shift. However, this program has remained largely confined to sequence-prediction architectures, leaving embodied control systems without comparable mechanistic accounts. Here we extend this framework to sensorimotor-cognitive development, using infant motor learning as a model system. We show that foundational inductive biases give rise to causal control circuits, with learned gating mechanisms converging toward theoretically motivated uncertainty thresholds. The resulting dynamics reveal a clean phase transition in the arbitration gate whose commitment behavior is well described by a closed-form exponential moving-average surrogate. We identify context window k as the critical parameter governing circuit formation: below a minimum threshold (k$\leq$4) the arbitration mechanism cannot form; above it (k$\geq$8), gate confidence scales asymptotically as log k. A two-dimensional phase diagram further reveals task-demand-dependent route arbitration consistent with the prediction that prospective execution becomes advantageous only when prediction error remains within the task tolerance window. Together, these results provide a mechanistic account of how reactive and prospective control strategies emerge and compete during learning. More broadly, this work sharpens mechanistic accounts of cognitive development and provides principled guidance for the design of interpretable embodied agents.

摘要（中文）: 以下是这篇摘要的中文翻译： 机制可解释性通过将模型行为分解为相互竞争的算法，识别训练期间的相变，并推导出关于策略何时以及为何转变的闭式预测，从而变革了transformer电路的分析。然而，该程序主要局限于序列预测架构，使得具身控制系统缺乏类似的机制解释。在此，我们将此框架扩展到感觉运动-认知发展，以婴儿运动学习作为模型系统。我们表明，基础性的归纳偏置会产生因果控制电路，学习到的门控机制收敛于理论上驱动的不确定性阈值。由此产生的动态揭示了仲裁门中的清晰相变，其承诺行为可以很好地用闭式指数移动平均替代表示。我们将上下文窗口k识别为控制电路形成的关键参数：低于最小阈值（k≤4）时，仲裁机制无法形成；高于此阈值（k≥8）时，门置信度与log k成渐近比例关系。一个二维相图进一步揭示了任务需求相关的路线仲裁，这与预测执行仅在预测误差保持在任务容差窗口内时才变得有利的预测一致。总之，这些结果提供了一个机制解释，说明反应式和前瞻性控制策略如何在学习过程中出现和竞争。更广泛地说，这项工作锐化了对认知发展的机制解释，并为可解释具身智能体的设计提供了原则性的指导。

TLDR: This paper extends mechanistic interpretability to embodied control systems, specifically infant motor learning, revealing how control strategies emerge through learned gating mechanisms and phase transitions governed by context window size.

简要说明: 本文将机制可解释性扩展到具身控制系统，特别是婴儿运动学习，揭示了控制策略如何通过学到的门控机制和由上下文窗口大小控制的相变而出现。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Alma Lago

DeFRiS: Silo-Cooperative IoT Applications Scheduling via Decentralized Federated Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): Next-generation IoT applications increasingly span across autonomous administrative entities, necessitating silo-cooperative scheduling to leverage diverse computational resources while preserving data privacy. However, realizing efficient cooperation faces significant challenges arising from infrastructure heterogeneity, Non-IID workload shifts, and the inherent risks of adversarial environments. Existing approaches, relying predominantly on centralized coordination or independent learning, fail to address the incompatibility of state-action spaces across heterogeneous silos and lack robustness against malicious attacks. This paper proposes DeFRiS, a Decentralized Federated Reinforcement Learning framework for robust and scalable Silo-cooperative IoT application scheduling. DeFRiS integrates three synergistic innovations: (i) an action-space-agnostic policy utilizing candidate resource scoring to enable seamless knowledge transfer across heterogeneous silos; (ii) a silo-optimized local learning mechanism combining Generalized Advantage Estimation (GAE) with clipped policy updates to resolve sparse delayed reward challenges; and (iii) a Dual-Track Non-IID robust decentralized aggregation protocol leveraging gradient fingerprints for similarity-aware knowledge transfer and anomaly detection, and gradient tracking for optimization momentum. Extensive experiments on a distributed testbed with 20 heterogeneous silos and realistic IoT workloads demonstrate that DeFRiS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing average response time by 6.4% and energy consumption by 7.2%, while lowering tail latency risk (CVaR$_{0.95}$) by 10.4% and achieving near-zero deadline violations. Furthermore, DeFRiS achieves over 3 times better performance retention as the system scales and over 8 times better stability in adversarial environments compared to the best-performing baseline.

摘要（中文）: 下一代物联网应用越来越多地跨越自主管理实体，因此需要孤岛协同调度，以利用多样化的计算资源，同时保护数据隐私。然而，实现高效协作面临着基础设施异构性、非独立同分布（Non-IID）工作负载转移和对抗环境的固有风险等重大挑战。现有方法主要依赖于集中式协调或独立学习，无法解决异构孤岛之间状态-动作空间的不兼容性，并且缺乏针对恶意攻击的鲁棒性。本文提出了一种去中心化联邦强化学习框架DeFRiS，用于实现鲁棒且可扩展的孤岛协同物联网应用调度。DeFRiS集成了三个协同创新点：（i）一种与动作空间无关的策略，利用候选资源评分，以实现跨异构孤岛的无缝知识迁移；（ii）一种孤岛优化的本地学习机制，结合广义优势估计（GAE）和裁剪策略更新，以解决稀疏延迟奖励的挑战；以及（iii）一种双轨非独立同分布鲁棒去中心化聚合协议，利用梯度指纹进行相似性感知的知识迁移和异常检测，并利用梯度追踪来实现优化动量。在具有20个异构孤岛和真实物联网工作负载的分布式测试平台上进行的大量实验表明，DeFRiS显著优于最先进的基线方法，平均响应时间降低6.4%，能耗降低7.2%，同时尾延迟风险（CVaR$_{0.95}$）降低10.4%，并且几乎实现了零截止时间违例。此外，DeFRiS在系统扩展时实现了超过3倍的性能保持率，在对抗环境中实现了超过8倍的稳定性，优于性能最佳的基线方法。

TLDR: The paper proposes DeFRiS, a decentralized federated reinforcement learning framework for silo-cooperative IoT application scheduling that addresses heterogeneity, non-IID data, and adversarial risks, demonstrating significant performance improvements over existing methods.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一个去中心化的联邦强化学习框架DeFRiS，用于孤岛协同的物联网应用调度，解决了异构性、非独立同分布数据和对抗风险，并展示了相对于现有方法的显著性能提升。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Zhiyu Wang, Mohammad Goudarzi, Mingming Gong, Rajkumar Buyya

Optimal control of differentially flat underactuated planar robots in the perspective of oscillation mitigation

Abstract (English): Underactuated robots are characterized by a larger number of degrees of freedom than actuators and if they are designed with a specific mass distribution, they can be controlled by means of differential flatness theory. This structural property enables the development of lightweight and cost-effective robotic systems with enhanced dexterity. However, a key challenge lies in managing the passive joints, whose control demands precise and comprehensive dynamic modeling of the system. To simplify dynamic models, particularly for low-speed trajectories, friction is often neglected. While this assumption simplifies analysis and control design, it introduces residual oscillations of the end-effector about the target position. In this paper, the possibility of using optimal control along with differential flatness control is investigated to improve the tracking of the planned trajectories. First, the study was carried out through formal analysis, and then, it was validated by means of numerical simulations. Results highlight that optimal control can be used to plan the flat variables considering different (quadratic) performance indices: control effort, i.e. motor torque, and potential energy of the considered underactuated joint. Moreover, the minimization of potential energy can be used to design motion laws that are robust against variation of the stiffness and damping of the underactuated joint, thus reducing oscillations in the case of stiffness/damping mismatch.

摘要（中文）: 欠驱动机器人的特点是自由度多于驱动器数量，如果它们被设计成具有特定的质量分布，则可以通过微分平坦性理论进行控制。这种结构特性使得开发轻量化、高性价比且灵巧性增强的机器人系统成为可能。然而，一个关键的挑战在于管理被动关节，其控制需要精确而全面的系统动态建模。为了简化动态模型，尤其是在低速轨迹下，通常会忽略摩擦力。虽然这种假设简化了分析和控制设计，但它会引入末端执行器在目标位置附近的残余振荡。在本文中，研究了使用最优控制与微分平坦控制相结合来改善规划轨迹跟踪的可能性。首先，通过形式分析进行了研究，然后通过数值模拟验证了研究结果。结果表明，可以使用最优控制来规划平坦变量，同时考虑不同的（二次型）性能指标：控制努力，即电机扭矩，以及所考虑的欠驱动关节的势能。此外，势能的最小化可用于设计对欠驱动关节的刚度和阻尼变化具有鲁棒性的运动规律，从而在刚度/阻尼失配的情况下减少振荡。

TLDR: This paper explores using optimal control with differential flatness to mitigate oscillations in underactuated robots, focusing on minimizing control effort and potential energy with robustness to stiffness/damping mismatch.

简要说明: 本文探讨了使用最优控制与微分平坦性来减轻欠驱动机器人中的振荡，重点是通过优化控制力矩和势能来提高对刚度和阻尼不匹配的鲁棒性。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Stefano Lovato, Michele Tonan, Matteo Bottin, Matteo Massaro, Alberto Doria, Giulio Rosati

Formalisms for Robotic Mission Specification and Execution: A Comparative Analysis

Abstract (English): Robots are increasingly deployed across diverse domains and designed for multi-purpose operation. As robotic systems grow in complexity and operate in dynamic environments, the need for structured, expressive, and scalable mission-specification approaches becomes critical, with mission specifications often defined in the field by domain experts rather than robotics specialists. However, there is no standard or widely accepted formalism for specifying missions in single- or multi-robot systems. A variety of formalisms, such as Behavior Trees, State Machines, Hierarchical Task Networks, and Business Process Model and Notation, have been adopted in robotics to varying degrees, each providing different levels of abstraction, expressiveness, and support for integration with human workflows and external devices. This paper presents a systematic analysis of these four formalisms with respect to their suitability for robot mission specification. Our study focuses on mission-level descriptions rather than robot software development. We analyze their underlying control structures and mission concepts, evaluate their expressiveness and limitations in modeling real-world missions, and assess the extent of available tool support. By comparing the formalisms and validating our findings with experts, we provide insights into their applicability, strengths, and shortcomings in robotic system modeling. The results aim to support practitioners and researchers in selecting appropriate modeling approaches for designing robust and adaptable robot and multi-robot missions.

摘要（中文）: 机器人正日益广泛地部署于各个领域，并被设计用于多用途操作。随着机器人系统复杂性的增加以及在动态环境中运行，对结构化、有表现力且可扩展的任务规范方法的需求变得至关重要，任务规范通常由领域专家而非机器人专家在现场定义。然而，对于单机器人或多机器人系统中的任务规范，目前尚未存在标准或广泛接受的形式化方法。行为树、状态机、层次式任务网络以及业务流程模型和标记等多种形式化方法已在机器人领域得到不同程度的应用，每种方法都提供了不同级别的抽象性、表现力以及对与人类工作流程和外部设备集成的支持。 本文对这四种形式化方法在机器人任务规范方面的适用性进行了系统分析。我们的研究侧重于任务级别的描述，而非机器人软件开发。我们分析了它们底层的控制结构和任务概念，评估了它们在建模真实世界任务时的表现力和局限性，并评估了可用工具支持的程度。通过比较这些形式化方法并使用专家验证我们的发现，我们深入了解了它们在机器人系统建模中的适用性、优势和缺点。 研究结果旨在支持从业者和研究人员选择合适的建模方法，以设计稳健且适应性强的单机器人和多机器人任务。

TLDR: This paper comparatively analyzes Behavior Trees, State Machines, Hierarchical Task Networks, and BPMN for robotic mission specification, focusing on their expressiveness, limitations, and tool support to guide practitioners in selecting appropriate formalisms.

简要说明: 本文比较分析了行为树、状态机、分层任务网络和BPMN四种机器人任务规范的形式化方法，重点关注它们的表达能力、局限性和工具支持，旨在指导从业人员选择合适的规范形式。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (4/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Gianluca Filippone, Sara Pettinari, Patrizio Pelliccione

User-Tailored Learning to Forecast Walking Modes for Exosuits

Abstract (English): Assistive robotic devices, like soft lower-limb exoskeletons or exosuits, are widely spreading with the promise of helping people in everyday life. To make such systems adaptive to the variety of users wearing them, it is desirable to endow exosuits with advanced perception systems. However, exosuits have little sensory equipment because they need to be light and easy to wear. This paper presents a perception module based on machine learning that aims at estimating 3 walking modes (i.e., ascending or descending stairs and walking on level ground) of users wearing an exosuit. We tackle this perception problem using only inertial data from two sensors. Our approach provides an estimate for both future and past timesteps that supports control and enables a self-labeling procedure for online model adaptation. Indeed, we show that our estimate can label data acquired online and refine the model for new users. A thorough analysis carried out on real-life datasets shows the effectiveness of our user-tailored perception module. Finally, we integrate our system with the exosuit in a closed-loop controller, validating its performance in an online single-subject experiment.

摘要（中文）: 辅助机器人设备，如软性下肢外骨骼或外衣，正在广泛普及，并有望帮助人们在日常生活中。为了使这些系统能够适应不同用户，需要赋予外衣先进的感知系统。然而，外衣由于需要轻便易穿，因此配备的传感器设备很少。本文提出了一种基于机器学习的感知模块，旨在估计穿戴外衣的用户的三种行走模式（即，上楼梯、下楼梯和平地行走）。我们仅利用两个惯性传感器的数据来解决该感知问题。我们的方法能够估计未来和过去的时间步，从而支持控制，并实现用于在线模型自适应的自标记过程。事实上，我们证明了我们的估计可以标记在线获取的数据，并为新用户优化模型。对真实数据集进行的全面分析表明了我们用户定制感知模块的有效性。最后，我们将我们的系统集成到外骨骼的闭环控制器中，并通过在线单受试者实验验证了其性能。

TLDR: This paper presents a machine-learning-based perception module for exosuits that uses inertial data to predict walking modes and adapts to individual users for improved control.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的外骨骼感知模块，它使用惯性数据来预测步行模式，并适应个体用户以改进控制。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Gabriele Abbate, Enrica Tricomi, Nathalie Gierden, Alessandro Giusti, Lorenzo Masia, Antonio Paolillo

GNIO: Gated Neural Inertial Odometry

Abstract (English): Inertial navigation using low-cost MEMS sensors is plagued by rapid drift due to sensor noise and bias instability. While recent data-driven approaches have made significant strides, they often struggle with micro-drifts during stationarity and mode fusion during complex motion transitions due to their reliance on fixed-window regression. In this work, we introduce Gated Neural Inertial Odometry (GNIO), a novel learning-based framework that explicitly models motion validity and context. We propose two key architectural innovations: \ding{182} a learnable Motion Bank that queries a global dictionary of motion patterns to provide semantic context beyond the local receptive field, and \ding{183} a Gated Prediction Head that decomposes displacement into magnitude and direction. This gating mechanism acts as a soft, differentiable Zero-Velocity Update (ZUPT), dynamically suppressing sensor noise during stationary periods while scaling predictions during dynamic motion. Extensive experiments across four public benchmarks demonstrate that GNIO significantly reduces position drift compared to state-of-the-art CNN and Transformer-based baselines. Notably, GNIO achieves a $60.21\%$ reduction in trajectory error on the OxIOD dataset and exhibits superior generalization in challenging scenarios involving frequent stops and irregular motion speeds.

摘要（中文）: 摘要： 使用低成本MEMS传感器的惯性导航受传感器噪声和偏置不稳定性影响，存在快速漂移问题。虽然近期的数据驱动方法取得了显著进展，但由于依赖于固定窗口回归，它们通常在静止期间难以处理微漂移，在复杂运动过渡期间难以进行模式融合。在这项工作中，我们引入了门控神经惯性里程计（GNIO），一种新颖的、基于学习的框架，可显式建模运动有效性和上下文。我们提出了两个关键的架构创新：\ding{182} 可学习的运动库，查询运动模式的全局字典，以提供超出局部感受野的语义上下文；\ding{183} 门控预测头，将位移分解为幅度和方向。这种门控机制充当一种软性的、可微的零速更新（ZUPT），在静止期间动态抑制传感器噪声，并在动态运动期间缩放预测值。在四个公共基准测试上的大量实验表明，与最先进的基于CNN和Transformer的基线相比，GNIO显著降低了位置漂移。值得注意的是，GNIO在OxIOD数据集上实现了60.21%的轨迹误差降低，并在涉及频繁停止和不规则运动速度的挑战性场景中表现出卓越的泛化能力。

TLDR: The paper introduces GNIO, a novel neural inertial odometry framework using a learnable Motion Bank and a Gated Prediction Head to improve accuracy and robustness in inertial navigation, particularly in scenarios with stationary periods and complex motion transitions. It achieves significant drift reduction compared to state-of-the-art methods.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了GNIO，一种新型的神经惯性里程计框架，它利用可学习的运动库和门控预测头来提高惯性导航的准确性和鲁棒性，尤其是在具有静止期和复杂运动过渡的场景中。与最先进的方法相比，它实现了显著的漂移减少。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Dapeng Feng, Yizhen Yin, Zhiqiang Chen, Yuhua Qi, Hongbo Chen

Surgical Robot, Path Planning, Joint Space, Riemannian Manifolds

Abstract (English): Robotic surgery for minimally invasive surgery can reduce the surgeon's workload by autonomously guiding robotic forceps. Movement of the robot is restricted around a fixed insertion port. The robot often encounters angle limitations during operation. Also, the surface of the abdominal cavity is non-concave, making it computationally expensive to find the desired path.In this work, to solve these problems, we propose a method for path planning in joint space by transforming the position into a Riemannian manifold. An edge cost function is defined to search for a desired path in the joint space and reduce the range of motion of the joints. We found that the organ is mostly non-concave, making it easy to find the optimal path using gradient descent method. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method reduces the range of joint angle movement compared to calculations in position space.

摘要（中文）: 用于微创手术的机器人手术可以通过自主引导机器人持钳器来减轻外科医生的工作负担。机器人的运动被限制在一个固定的插入端口周围。机器人通常在手术过程中遇到角度限制。此外，腹腔表面是非凹面的，这使得寻找所需路径的计算成本很高。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种在关节空间中进行路径规划的方法，通过将位置转换为黎曼流形。定义了一个边成本函数以在关节空间中搜索期望的路径并减少关节的运动范围。我们发现器官大多是非凹面的，因此使用梯度下降法可以很容易地找到最优路径。实验结果表明，与在位置空间中的计算相比，所提出的方法减少了关节角度运动的范围。

TLDR: The paper proposes a path planning method using Riemannian manifolds in joint space for surgical robots to address limitations in joint angles and non-concave surfaces during minimally invasive surgery, demonstrating reduced joint angle movement compared to position space calculations.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种使用黎曼流形在关节空间中进行路径规划的方法，用于解决微创手术中手术机器人在关节角度和非凹表面上的限制。实验结果表明，与在位置空间中计算相比，该方法减少了关节角度的运动范围。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yoshiki Yamamoto, Maina Sogabe, Shunichi Hirahara, Toshiki Kaisaki, Tetsuro Miyazaki, Kenji Kawashima

A Unified Calibration Framework for Coordinate and Kinematic Parameters in Dual-Arm Robots

Abstract (English): Precise collaboration in vision-based dual-arm robot systems requires accurate system calibration. Recent dual-robot calibration methods have achieved strong performance by simultaneously solving multiple coordinate transformations. However, these methods either treat kinematic errors as implicit noise or handle them through separated error modeling, resulting in non-negligible accumulated errors. In this paper, we present a novel framework for unified calibration of the coordinate transformations and kinematic parameters in both robot arms. Our key idea is to unify all the tightly coupled parameters within a single Lie-algebraic formulation. To this end, we construct a consolidated error model grounded in the product-of-exponentials formula, which naturally integrates the coordinate and kinematic parameters in twist forms. Our model introduces no artificial error separation and thus greatly mitigates the error propagation. In addition, we derive a closed-form analytical Jacobian from this model using Lie derivatives. By exploring the Jacobian rank property, we analyze the identifiability of all calibration parameters and show that our joint optimization is well-posed under mild conditions. This enables off-the-shelf iterative solvers to stably optimize these parameters on the manifold space. Besides, to ensure robust convergence of our joint optimization, we develop a certifiably correct algorithm for initializing the unknown coordinates. Relying on semidefinite relaxation, our algorithm can yield a reliable estimate whose near-global optimality can be verified a posteriori. Extensive experiments validate the superior accuracy of our approach over previous baselines under identical visual measurements. Meanwhile, our certifiable initialization consistently outperforms several coordinate-only baselines, proving its reliability as a starting point for joint optimization.

摘要（中文）: 基于视觉的双臂机器人系统中精确的协同工作需要准确的系统标定。最近的双臂机器人标定方法通过同时求解多个坐标变换取得了优异的性能。然而，这些方法要么将运动学误差视为隐式噪声，要么通过分离的误差建模来处理它们，导致不可忽略的累积误差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的框架，用于统一标定两个机器人手臂中的坐标变换和运动学参数。我们的核心思想是在单个李代数公式中统一所有紧密耦合的参数。为此，我们构建了一个基于指数积公式的综合误差模型，该模型自然地将坐标和运动学参数以旋量形式整合在一起。我们的模型不引入人为的误差分离，从而大大减轻了误差传播。此外，我们使用李导数从该模型中推导出一个闭式解析雅可比矩阵。通过探索雅可比矩阵的秩属性，我们分析了所有标定参数的可辨识性，并表明我们的联合优化在温和的条件下是适定的。这使得现成的迭代求解器能够在流形空间上稳定地优化这些参数。此外，为了确保联合优化的稳健收敛，我们开发了一种可验证的正确算法来初始化未知坐标。依靠半正定松弛，我们的算法可以产生一个可靠的估计，其近全局最优性可以进行后验验证。大量的实验验证了在相同的视觉测量条件下，我们的方法比以前的基线具有更高的精度。同时，我们的可证明的初始化方法始终优于几个仅包含坐标的基线方法，证明了其作为联合优化的起点的可靠性。

TLDR: This paper presents a novel unified framework for calibrating coordinate transformations and kinematic parameters in dual-arm robots using a Lie-algebraic formulation, demonstrating superior accuracy over existing methods.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种新的统一框架，用于校准双臂机器人的坐标变换和运动学参数，该框架采用李代数公式，并展示了优于现有方法的精度。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tianyu Huang, Bohan Yang, Bin Li, Wenpan Li, Haoang Li, Wenlong Li, Yun-Hui Liu

Adapting Critic Match Loss Landscape Visualization to Off-policy Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): This work extends an established critic match loss landscape visualization method from online to off-policy reinforcement learning (RL), aiming to reveal the optimization geometry behind critic learning. Off-policy RL differs from stepwise online actor-critic learning in its replay-based data flow and target computation. Based on these two structural differences, the critic match loss landscape visualization method is adapted to the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm by aligning the loss evaluation with its batch-based data flow and target computation, using a fixed replay batch and precomputed critic targets from the selected policy. Critic parameters recorded during training are projected onto a principal component plane, where the critic match loss is evaluated to form a 3-D landscape with an overlaid 2-D optimization path. Applied to a spacecraft attitude control problem, the resulting landscapes are analyzed both qualitatively and quantitatively using sharpness, basin area, and local anisotropy metrics, together with temporal landscape snapshots. Comparisons between convergent SAC, divergent SAC, and divergent Action-Dependent Heuristic Dynamic Programming (ADHDP) cases reveal distinct geometric patterns and optimization behaviors under different algorithmic structures. The results demonstrate that the adapted critic match loss visualization framework serves as a geometric diagnostic tool for analyzing critic optimization dynamics in replay-based off-policy RL-based control problems.

摘要（中文）: 本研究将一种已有的评判器匹配损失景观可视化方法从在线强化学习扩展到离线强化学习(RL)，旨在揭示评判器学习背后的优化几何结构。离线强化学习不同于逐步在线的Actor-Critic学习，其区别在于基于回放的数据流和目标计算。基于这两个结构上的差异，通过将损失评估与SAC算法的批量数据流和目标计算对齐，并将所选策略的固定回放批次和预计算评判器目标利用起来，对评判器匹配损失景观可视化方法进行了改进，使其适用于Soft Actor-Critic (SAC)算法。训练期间记录的评判器参数被投影到主成分平面上，在该平面上评估评判器匹配损失，以形成一个带有覆盖二维优化路径的三维景观。将其应用于航天器姿态控制问题，通过清晰度、盆地面积和局部各向异性指标，结合时间景观快照，对生成的景观进行定性和定量分析。对收敛的SAC、发散的SAC和发散的动作依赖启发式动态规划(ADHDP)案例之间的比较揭示了不同算法结构下截然不同的几何模式和优化行为。结果表明，改进后的评判器匹配损失可视化框架可作为一种几何诊断工具，用于分析基于回放的离线强化学习控制问题中评判器优化动态。

TLDR: This paper adapts a critic match loss landscape visualization technique for off-policy RL (specifically SAC) to analyze critic optimization dynamics, revealing geometric patterns related to convergence and divergence.

简要说明: 本文将评论家(critic)匹配损失景观可视化技术应用于离策略强化学习(特别是SAC)，以分析评论家优化动态，揭示与收敛和发散相关的几何模式。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jingyi Liu, Jian Guo, Eberhard Gill

Interp3R: Continuous-time 3D Geometry Estimation with Frames and Events

Abstract (English): In recent years, 3D visual foundation models pioneered by pointmap-based approaches such as DUSt3R have attracted a lot of interest, achieving impressive accuracy and strong generalization across diverse scenes. However, these methods are inherently limited to recovering scene geometry only at the discrete time instants when images are captured, leaving the scene evolution during the blind time between consecutive frames largely unexplored. We introduce Interp3R, to the best of our knowledge the first method that enhances pointmap-based models to estimate depth and camera poses at arbitrary time instants. Interp3R leverages asynchronous event data to interpolate pointmaps produced by frame-based models, enabling temporally continuous geometric representations. Depth and camera poses are then jointly recovered by aligning the interpolated pointmaps together with those predicted by the underlying frame-based models into a consistent spatial framework. We train Interp3R exclusively on a synthetic dataset, yet demonstrate strong generalization across a wide range of synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Extensive experiments show that Interp3R outperforms by a considerable margin state-of-the-art baselines that follow a two-stage pipeline of 2D video frame interpolation followed by 3D geometry estimation.

摘要（中文）: 近年来，以DUSt3R等基于点云地图的方法为先驱的3D视觉基础模型吸引了大量关注，在各种场景中都取得了令人印象深刻的准确性和强大的泛化能力。然而，这些方法本质上仅限于恢复图像捕捉时离散时间点的场景几何，使得连续帧之间的盲时间段内的场景演变在很大程度上未被探索。我们提出了Interp3R，据我们所知，这是第一个增强基于点云地图的模型以估计任意时间点的深度和相机姿态的方法。Interp3R利用异步事件数据来内插由基于帧的模型生成的点云地图，从而实现时间上连续的几何表示。然后，通过将内插的点云地图与底层基于帧的模型预测的点云地图对齐到一致的空间框架中，联合恢复深度和相机姿态。我们在一个合成数据集上专门训练Interp3R，但展示了其在各种合成和真实世界基准测试中的强大泛化能力。大量实验表明，Interp3R大幅优于最先进的基线方法，这些基线方法遵循先进行2D视频帧插值，然后进行3D几何估计的两阶段流程。

TLDR: Interp3R uses event data to interpolate pointmaps from frame-based 3D geometry estimation models, achieving temporally continuous 3D scene reconstruction and outperforming frame interpolation baselines.

简要说明: Interp3R利用事件数据插值基于帧的3D几何估计模型的点云图，实现时间连续的3D场景重建, 且优于帧插值基线。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Shuang Guo, Filbert Febryanto, Lei Sun, Guillermo Gallego

Iterative Learning Control-Informed Reinforcement Learning for Batch Process Control

Abstract (English): A significant limitation of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is the stochastic uncertainty in actions generated during exploration-exploitation, which poses substantial safety risks during both training and deployment. In industrial process control, the lack of formal stability and convergence guarantees further inhibits adoption of DRL methods by practitioners. Conversely, Iterative Learning Control (ILC) represents a well-established autonomous control methodology for repetitive systems, particularly in batch process optimization. ILC achieves desired control performance through iterative refinement of control laws, either between consecutive batches or within individual batches, to compensate for both repetitive and non-repetitive disturbances. This study introduces an Iterative Learning Control-Informed Reinforcement Learning (IL-CIRL) framework for training DRL controllers in dual-layer batch-to-batch and within-batch control architectures for batch processes. The proposed method incorporates Kalman filter-based state estimation within the iterative learning structure to guide DRL agents toward control policies that satisfy operational constraints and ensure stability guarantees. This approach enables the systematic design of DRL controllers for batch processes operating under multiple disturbance conditions.

摘要（中文）: 深度强化学习(DRL)的一个显著局限性在于探索-利用过程中生成动作的随机不确定性，这在训练和部署期间都带来了重大的安全风险。在工业过程控制中，缺乏形式化的稳定性和收敛性保证进一步阻碍了从业者对DRL方法的采用。相反，迭代学习控制(ILC)代表了一种成熟的重复系统自主控制方法，尤其是在批次过程优化方面。ILC通过迭代改进控制律，在连续批次之间或单个批次内，实现期望的控制性能，以补偿重复性和非重复性扰动。本研究介绍了一种迭代学习控制引导的强化学习(IL-CIRL)框架，用于在批次过程中双层批次间和批次内控制架构中训练DRL控制器。所提出的方法在迭代学习结构中整合了基于卡尔曼滤波器的状态估计，以引导DRL智能体走向满足操作约束并确保稳定性保证的控制策略。这种方法使得对在多种扰动条件下运行的批次过程进行DRL控制器的系统设计成为可能。

TLDR: This paper proposes an Iterative Learning Control-Informed Reinforcement Learning (IL-CIRL) framework for batch process control, aiming to improve the safety and stability of DRL in industrial applications by integrating ILC and Kalman filter-based state estimation.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种迭代学习控制指导的强化学习（IL-CIRL）框架，用于批量过程控制，旨在通过整合ILC和基于卡尔曼滤波器的状态估计，提高DRL在工业应用中的安全性和稳定性。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (6/10)

Authors: Runze Lin, Ziqi Zhuo, Junghui Chen, Lei Xie, Hongye Su

ReactMotion: Generating Reactive Listener Motions from Speaker Utterance

Abstract (English): In this paper, we introduce a new task, Reactive Listener Motion Generation from Speaker Utterance, which aims to generate naturalistic listener body motions that appropriately respond to a speaker's utterance. However, modeling such nonverbal listener behaviors remains underexplored and challenging due to the inherently non-deterministic nature of human reactions. To facilitate this task, we present ReactMotionNet, a large-scale dataset that pairs speaker utterances with multiple candidate listener motions annotated with varying degrees of appropriateness. This dataset design explicitly captures the one-to-many nature of listener behavior and provides supervision beyond a single ground-truth motion. Building on this dataset design, we develop preference-oriented evaluation protocols tailored to evaluate reactive appropriateness, where conventional motion metrics focusing on input-motion alignment ignore. We further propose ReactMotion, a unified generative framework that jointly models text, audio, emotion, and motion, and is trained with preference-based objectives to encourage both appropriate and diverse listener responses. Extensive experiments show that ReactMotion outperforms retrieval baselines and cascaded LLM-based pipelines, generating more natural, diverse, and appropriate listener motions.

摘要（中文）: 本文介绍了一项新的任务：从说话者话语生成反应式听者动作，旨在生成对说话者话语做出适当反应的自然听者身体动作。然而，由于人类反应固有的非确定性，对这种非语言听者行为的建模仍然未被充分探索并且具有挑战性。为了促进这项任务，我们提出了ReactMotionNet，这是一个大规模数据集，它将说话者话语与多个具有不同适当程度注释的候选听者动作配对。这种数据集设计明确地捕捉了听者行为的一对多性质，并提供了超越单一真实动作的监督。基于这种数据集设计，我们开发了面向偏好的评估协议，专门用于评估反应的适当性，而传统的侧重于输入-动作对齐的运动指标则忽略了这一点。我们进一步提出了ReactMotion，一个统一生成框架，可以联合建模文本、音频、情感和运动，并使用基于偏好的目标进行训练，以鼓励适当且多样化的听者反应。大量实验表明，ReactMotion优于检索基线和级联的基于LLM的流水线，生成了更自然、多样和适当的听者动作。

TLDR: This paper introduces a new task of generating reactive listener body motions from speaker utterances and proposes a dataset and model, ReactMotion, that outperforms baselines in generating natural, diverse, and appropriate listener responses.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一个新的任务，即根据说话者的语音生成反应性的听者身体动作，并提出了一个数据集和模型ReactMotion，该模型在生成自然、多样和适当的听者反应方面优于基线。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Cheng Luo, Bizhu Wu, Bing Li, Jianfeng Ren, Ruibin Bai, Rong Qu, Linlin Shen, Bernard Ghanem

How Log-Barrier Helps Exploration in Policy Optimization

Abstract (English): Recently, it has been shown that the Stochastic Gradient Bandit (SGB) algorithm converges to a globally optimal policy with a constant learning rate. However, these guarantees rely on unrealistic assumptions about the learning process, namely that the probability of the optimal action is always bounded away from zero. We attribute this to the lack of an explicit exploration mechanism in SGB. To address these limitations, we propose to regularize the SGB objective with a log-barrier on the parametric policy, structurally enforcing a minimal amount of exploration. We prove that Log-Barrier Stochastic Gradient Bandit (LB-SGB) matches the sample complexity of SGB, but also converges (at a slower rate) without any assumptions on the learning process. We also show a connection between the log-barrier regularization and Natural Policy Gradient, as both exploit the geometry of the policy space by controlling the Fisher information. We validate our theoretical findings through numerical simulations, showing the benefits of the log-barrier regularization.

摘要（中文）: 近期研究表明，随机梯度强盗(SGB)算法在常数学习率下能收敛到全局最优策略。然而，这些保证依赖于对学习过程不切实际的假设，即最优动作的概率始终有下界且远离零。我们认为这是由于SGB中缺乏显式的探索机制。为了解决这些限制，我们提出使用对参数化策略的对数障碍(log-barrier)来正则化SGB目标函数，从而在结构上强制执行最小量的探索。我们证明了对数障碍随机梯度强盗(LB-SGB)算法与SGB算法具有相同的样本复杂度，并且在不对学习过程做任何假设的情况下也能收敛（以较慢的速度）。我们还展示了对数障碍正则化与自然策略梯度之间的联系，因为两者都通过控制费雪信息来利用策略空间的几何特性。我们通过数值模拟验证了我们的理论结果，展示了对数障碍正则化的优势。

TLDR: The paper introduces Log-Barrier Stochastic Gradient Bandit (LB-SGB), a modified SGB algorithm with log-barrier regularization to encourage exploration, providing convergence guarantees without assumptions on the learning process and showing a connection to Natural Policy Gradient.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Log-Barrier Stochastic Gradient Bandit (LB-SGB)，一种改进的SGB算法，通过对数障碍正则化来鼓励探索，在不对学习过程做任何假设的情况下提供收敛保证，并展示了与自然策略梯度之间的联系。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Leonardo Cesani, Matteo Papini, Marcello Restelli

Automated Counting of Stacked Objects in Industrial Inspection

Abstract (English): Visual object counting is a fundamental computer vision task in industrial inspection, where accurate, high-throughput inventory tracking and quality assurance are critical. Moreover, manufactured parts are often too light to reliably deduce their count from their weight, or too heavy to move the stack on a scale safely and practically, making automated visual counting the more robust solution in many scenarios. However, existing methods struggle with stacked 3D items in containers, pallets, or bins, where most objects are heavily occluded and only a few are directly visible. To address this important yet underexplored challenge, we propose a novel 3D counting approach that decomposes the task into two complementary subproblems: estimating the 3D geometry of the stack and its occupancy ratio from multi-view images. By combining geometric reconstruction with deep learning-based depth analysis, our method can accurately count identical manufactured parts inside containers, even when they are irregularly stacked and partially hidden. We validate our 3D counting pipeline on large-scale synthetic and diverse real-world data with manually verified total counts, demonstrating robust performance under realistic inspection conditions.

摘要（中文）: 视觉对象计数是工业检测中一项基础的计算机视觉任务，其中准确、高通量的库存跟踪和质量保证至关重要。此外，由于制造零件通常太轻而无法通过重量可靠地推断其数量，或者太重而无法安全且实际地将堆叠物移动到秤上，因此在许多情况下，自动视觉计数成为更稳健的解决方案。然而，现有方法在处理容器、托盘或料箱中堆叠的3D物品时面临挑战，因为大多数对象被严重遮挡，只有少数对象直接可见。为了解决这一重要但未充分探索的挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的3D计数方法，该方法将任务分解为两个互补的子问题：从多视角图像估计堆叠的3D几何形状及其占用率。通过将几何重建与基于深度学习的深度分析相结合，我们的方法可以准确地计数容器内的相同制造零件，即使它们不规则地堆叠且部分隐藏。我们在具有手动验证总计数的大规模合成数据和多样化真实数据上验证了我们的3D计数流程，展示了在实际检测条件下稳健的性能。

TLDR: This paper introduces a 3D counting method for stacked objects in industrial settings, using multi-view images and a combination of geometric reconstruction and deep learning to address occlusion challenges.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于工业环境中堆叠物体的3D计数方法，该方法使用多视点图像，并结合几何重建和深度学习来解决遮挡问题。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Corentin Dumery, Noa Etté, Aoxiang Fan, Ren Li, Jingyi Xu, Hieu Le, Pascal Fua

GLANCE: Gaze-Led Attention Network for Compressed Edge-inference

Abstract (English): Real-time object detection in AR/VR systems faces critical computational constraints, requiring sub-10\,ms latency within tight power budgets. Inspired by biological foveal vision, we propose a two-stage pipeline that combines differentiable weightless neural networks for ultra-efficient gaze estimation with attention-guided region-of-interest object detection. Our approach eliminates arithmetic-intensive operations by performing gaze tracking through memory lookups rather than multiply-accumulate computations, achieving an angular error of $8.32^{\circ}$ with only 393 MACs and 2.2 KiB of memory per frame. Gaze predictions guide selective object detection on attended regions, reducing computational burden by 40-50\% and energy consumption by 65\%. Deployed on the Arduino Nano 33 BLE, our system achieves 48.1\% mAP on COCO (51.8\% on attended objects) while maintaining sub-10\,ms latency, meeting stringent AR/VR requirements by improving the communication time by $\times 177$. Compared to the global YOLOv12n baseline, which achieves 39.2\%, 63.4\%, and 83.1\% accuracy for small, MEDium, and LARGE objects, respectively, the ROI-based method yields 51.3\%, 72.1\%, and 88.1\% under the same settings. This work shows that memory-centric architectures with explicit attention modeling offer better efficiency and accuracy for resource-constrained wearable platforms than uniform processing.

摘要（中文）: 在AR/VR系统中进行实时目标检测面临着严苛的计算约束，需要在严格的功耗预算内实现低于10毫秒的延迟。受生物中央凹视觉的启发，我们提出了一种两阶段流水线，该流水线结合了用于超高效眼动估计的可微无权神经网络和注意力引导的感兴趣区域目标检测。我们的方法通过执行基于内存查找的眼动追踪而不是乘加运算，消除了算术密集型操作，实现了仅393个MAC和每帧2.2 KiB内存的$8.32^{\circ}$角误差。眼动预测引导对关注区域的选择性目标检测，从而减少了40-50\%的计算负担和65\%的能量消耗。部署在Arduino Nano 33 BLE上，我们的系统在COCO上实现了48.1\%的mAP（关注对象上为51.8\%），同时保持低于10毫秒的延迟，并通过提高$\times177$倍的通信时间来满足严格的AR/VR需求。与全局YOLOv12n基线（小、中、大型对象分别达到39.2\%、63.4\%和83.1\%的精度）相比，基于ROI的方法在相同设置下产生了51.3\%、72.1\%和88.1\%的精度。这项工作表明，与统一处理相比，具有显式注意力建模的以内存为中心的架构为资源受限的可穿戴平台提供了更好的效率和精度。

TLDR: This paper presents a gaze-led attention network (GLANCE) for efficient object detection on resource-constrained edge devices like AR/VR headsets, using memory-based gaze estimation and attention-guided ROI detection to achieve sub-10ms latency. It achieves higher accuracy and efficiency than YOLOv12n baseline.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于注视点引导的注意力网络（GLANCE），用于在AR/VR头显等资源受限的边缘设备上进行高效的目标检测。通过使用基于内存的注视点估计和注意力引导的ROI检测，实现了低于10毫秒的延迟，并获得了比YOLOv12n基线更高的精度和效率。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: Neeraj Solanki, Hong Ding, Sepehr Tabrizchi, Ali Shafiee Sarvestani, Shaahin Angizi, David Z. Pan, Arman Roohi

MeMix: Writing Less, Remembering More for Streaming 3D Reconstruction

Abstract (English): Reconstruction is a fundamental task in 3D vision and a fundamental capability for spatial intelligence. Particularly, streaming 3D reconstruction is central to real-time spatial perception, yet existing recurrent online models often suffer from progressive degradation on long sequences due to state drift and forgetting, motivating inference-time remedies. We present MeMix, a training-free, plug-and-play module that improves streaming reconstruction by recasting the recurrent state into a Memory Mixture. MeMix partitions the state into multiple independent memory patches and updates only the least-aligned memory patches while exactly preserving others. This selective update mitigates catastrophic forgetting while retaining $O(1)$ inference memory, and requires no fine-tuning or additional learnable parameters, making it directly applicable to existing recurrent reconstruction models. Across standard benchmarks (ScanNet, 7-Scenes, KITTI, etc.), under identical backbones and inference settings, MeMix reduces reconstruction completeness error by 15.3% on average (up to 40.0%) across 300--500 frame streams on 7-Scenes. The code is available at https://dongjiacheng06.github.io/MeMix/

摘要（中文）: 重建是3D视觉中的一项基础任务，也是空间智能的一项基本能力。特别地，流式3D重建是实时空间感知中的核心，然而，现有的循环在线模型常常在长序列上遭受由状态漂移和遗忘引起的渐进式退化，这促使研究人员寻找推理时的补救措施。我们提出了MeMix，一个免训练、即插即用的模块，通过将循环状态重构为记忆混合来改进流式重建。MeMix将状态划分为多个独立的记忆块，仅更新对齐度最低的记忆块，同时精确保留其他块。这种选择性更新减轻了灾难性遗忘，同时保持$O(1)$的推理内存，并且不需要微调或额外的可学习参数，使其可以直接应用于现有的循环重建模型。在标准基准（ScanNet、7-Scenes、KITTI等）上，在相同的骨干网络和推理设置下，MeMix在7-Scenes的300-500帧流上平均降低了15.3%的重建完整性误差（最高可达40.0%）。代码见https://dongjiacheng06.github.io/MeMix/

TLDR: MeMix is a training-free module that improves streaming 3D reconstruction by selectively updating memory patches in recurrent models, mitigating catastrophic forgetting without increasing inference cost. It achieves significant error reduction on standard benchmarks.

简要说明: MeMix是一个免训练模块，它通过选择性地更新循环模型中的内存块来改进流式3D重建，从而减轻了灾难性遗忘，而不会增加推理成本。它在标准基准测试中实现了显著的误差降低。

Authors: Jiacheng Dong, Huan Li, Sicheng Zhou, Wenhao Hu, Weili Xu, Yan Wang

Sampling-guided exploration of active feature selection policies

Abstract (English): Determining the most appropriate features for machine learning predictive models is challenging regarding performance and feature acquisition costs. In particular, global feature choice is limited given that some features will only benefit a subset of instances. In previous work, we proposed a reinforcement learning approach to sequentially recommend which modality to acquire next to reach the best information/cost ratio, based on the instance-specific information already acquired. We formulated the problem as a Markov Decision Process where the state's dimensionality changes during the episode, avoiding data imputation, contrary to existing works. However, this only allowed processing a small number of features, as all possible combinations of features were considered. Here, we address these limitations with two contributions: 1) we expand our framework to larger datasets with a heuristic-based strategy that focuses on the most promising feature combinations, and 2) we introduce a post-fit regularisation strategy that reduces the number of different feature combinations, leading to compact sequences of decisions. We tested our method on four binary classification datasets (one involving high-dimensional variables), the largest of which had 56 features and 4500 samples. We obtained better performance than state-of-the-art methods, both in terms of accuracy and policy complexity.

摘要（中文）: 确定机器学习预测模型中最合适的特征在性能和特征获取成本方面都具有挑战性。特别是，全局特征选择受到限制，因为某些特征可能仅对一部分实例有利。在之前的工作中，我们提出了一种强化学习方法，基于已获取的实例特定信息，按顺序推荐接下来要获取哪种模态，以达到最佳的信息/成本比。我们将该问题表述为一个马尔可夫决策过程，其中状态的维度在episode期间变化，从而避免了数据插补，这与现有工作相反。然而，由于考虑了所有可能的特征组合，这仅允许处理少量特征。在这里，我们通过两项贡献来解决这些限制：1）我们使用基于启发式的策略扩展了我们的框架，使其能够处理更大的数据集，该策略侧重于最有希望的特征组合；2）我们引入了一种后拟合正则化策略，以减少不同特征组合的数量，从而产生紧凑的决策序列。我们在四个二元分类数据集（其中一个涉及高维变量）上测试了我们的方法，其中最大的数据集具有56个特征和4500个样本。在准确性和策略复杂性方面，我们都获得了优于最先进方法的性能。

TLDR: The paper presents an improved reinforcement learning approach for active feature selection, addressing scalability issues and reducing policy complexity through heuristic-based sampling and post-fit regularization.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种改进的强化学习方法，用于主动特征选择，通过基于启发式的采样和后拟合正则化解决了可扩展性问题并降低了策略复杂性。

Authors: Gabriel Bernardino, Anders Jonsson, Patrick Clarysse, Nicolas Duchateau

From Horizontal to Rotated: Cross-View Object Geo-Localization with Orientation Awareness

Abstract (English): Cross-View object geo-localization (CVOGL) aims to precisely determine the geographic coordinates of a query object from a ground or drone perspective by referencing a satellite map. Segmentation-based approaches offer high precision but require prohibitively expensive pixel-level annotations, whereas more economical detection-based methods suffer from lower accuracy. This performance disparity in detection is primarily caused by two factors: the poor geometric fit of Horizontal Bounding Boxes (HBoxes) for oriented objects and the degradation in precision due to feature map scaling. Motivated by these, we propose leveraging Rotated Bounding Boxes (RBoxes) as a natural extension of the detection-based paradigm. RBoxes provide a much tighter geometric fit to oriented objects. Building on this, we introduce OSGeo, a novel geo-localization framework, meticulously designed with a multi-scale perception module and an orientation-sensitive head to accurately regress RBoxes. To support this scheme, we also construct and release CVOGL-R, the first dataset with precise RBox annotations for CVOGL. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our OSGeo achieves state-of-the-art performance, consistently matching or even surpassing the accuracy of leading segmentation-based methods but with an annotation cost that is over an order of magnitude lower.

摘要（中文）: 跨视角目标地理定位（CVOGL）旨在通过参考卫星地图，精确确定来自地面或无人机视角的查询对象的地理坐标。基于分割的方法可以提供高精度，但需要成本高昂的像素级标注，而更经济的基于检测的方法则精度较低。这种检测性能的差异主要由两个因素引起：水平边界框（HBoxes）对定向对象的几何拟合较差，以及特征图缩放导致的精度下降。受此启发，我们提出利用旋转边界框（RBoxes）作为基于检测范例的自然延伸。RBoxes为定向对象提供了更紧密的几何拟合。在此基础上，我们引入了OSGeo，这是一个新颖的地理定位框架，精心设计了多尺度感知模块和方向敏感头，以准确回归RBoxes。为了支持这一方案，我们还构建并发布了CVOGL-R，这是第一个具有精确RBox标注的CVOGL数据集。大量实验表明，我们的OSGeo实现了最先进的性能，始终与领先的基于分割方法的准确性相匹配甚至超过它们，但标注成本却低一个数量级以上。

TLDR: This paper introduces a novel geo-localization framework, OSGeo, which uses Rotated Bounding Boxes (RBoxes) for cross-view object geo-localization, achieving state-of-the-art performance with significantly lower annotation costs compared to segmentation-based methods. They also release a new dataset (CVOGL-R) with RBox annotations.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种新的地理定位框架 OSGeo，它使用旋转边界框 (RBoxes) 进行跨视角对象地理定位，与基于分割的方法相比，以显著降低的标注成本实现了最先进的性能。他们还发布了一个新的数据集 (CVOGL-R)，其中包含 RBox 标注。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Chenlin Fu, Ao Gong, Yingying Zhu

Chain-of-Trajectories: Unlocking the Intrinsic Generative Optimality of Diffusion Models via Graph-Theoretic Planning

Abstract (English): Diffusion models operate in a reflexive System 1 mode, constrained by a fixed, content-agnostic sampling schedule. This rigidity arises from the curse of state dimensionality, where the combinatorial explosion of possible states in the high-dimensional noise manifold renders explicit trajectory planning intractable and leads to systematic computational misallocation. To address this, we introduce Chain-of-Trajectories (CoTj), a train-free framework enabling System 2 deliberative planning. Central to CoTj is Diffusion DNA, a low-dimensional signature that quantifies per-stage denoising difficulty and serves as a proxy for the high-dimensional state space, allowing us to reformulate sampling as graph planning on a directed acyclic graph. Through a Predict-Plan-Execute paradigm, CoTj dynamically allocates computational effort to the most challenging generative phases. Experiments across multiple generative models demonstrate that CoTj discovers context-aware trajectories, improving output quality and stability while reducing redundant computation. This work establishes a new foundation for resource-aware, planning-based diffusion modeling. The code is available at https://github.com/UnicomAI/CoTj.

摘要（中文）: 扩散模型以一种反射性的系统1模式运行，受限于固定的、与内容无关的采样计划。这种刚性源于状态维度灾难，即高维噪声流形中可能状态的组合爆炸使得显式轨迹规划变得难以处理，并导致系统的计算资源错配。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了轨迹链（CoTj），这是一个无需训练的框架，实现了系统2的深思熟虑式规划。CoTj的核心是扩散DNA，一个量化每阶段去噪难度的低维签名，并作为高维状态空间的代理，允许我们将采样重新表述为有向无环图上的图规划。通过一个预测-计划-执行的范式，CoTj动态地将计算资源分配给最具挑战性的生成阶段。在多个生成模型上的实验表明，CoTj发现了上下文感知的轨迹，提高了输出质量和稳定性，同时减少了冗余计算。这项工作为资源感知、基于规划的扩散建模奠定了新的基础。代码可在https://github.com/UnicomAI/CoTj获取。

TLDR: The paper introduces Chain-of-Trajectories (CoTj), a novel framework for diffusion models that uses graph planning on a low-dimensional 'Diffusion DNA' signature to dynamically allocate computational resources during the generative process, improving quality and stability.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Chain-of-Trajectories (CoTj)，一种新颖的扩散模型框架，它使用低维“Diffusion DNA”签名上的图规划，在生成过程中动态分配计算资源，从而提高质量和稳定性。
