Authors: Ping Chen, Xiang Liu, Xingpeng Zhang, Fei Shen, Xun Gong, Zhaoxiang Liu, Zezhou Chen, Huan Hu, Kai Wang, Shiguo Lian

AURORA-KITTI: Any-Weather Depth Completion and Denoising in the Wild

Abstract (English): Robust depth completion is fundamental to real-world 3D scene understanding, yet existing RGB-LiDAR fusion methods degrade significantly under adverse weather, where both camera images and LiDAR measurements suffer from weather-induced corruption. In this paper, we introduce AURORA-KITTI, the first large-scale multi-modal, multi-weather benchmark for robust depth completion in the wild. We further formulate Depth Completion and Denoising (DCD) as a unified task that jointly reconstructs a dense depth map from corrupted sparse inputs while suppressing weather-induced noise. AURORA-KITTI contains over \textit{82K} weather-consistent RGBL pairs with metric depth ground truth, spanning diverse weather types, three severity levels, day and night scenes, paired clean references, lens occlusion conditions, and textual descriptions. Moreover, we introduce DDCD, an efficient distillation-based baseline that leverages depth foundation models to inject clean structural priors into in-the-wild DCD training. DDCD achieves state-of-the-art performance on AURORA-KITTI and the real-world DENSE dataset while maintaining efficiency. Notably, our results further show that weather-aware, physically consistent data contributes more to robustness than architectural modifications alone. Data and code will be released upon publication.

摘要（中文）: 稳健的深度补全是真实世界三维场景理解的基础，然而现有的RGB-LiDAR融合方法在恶劣天气下性能显著下降，因为相机图像和LiDAR测量都受到天气引起的损坏。在本文中，我们引入了AURORA-KITTI，这是首个大规模多模态、多天气基准，用于野外环境下稳健的深度补全。我们进一步将深度补全和去噪(DCD)构建为一个统一的任务，该任务在抑制天气引起的噪声的同时，从损坏的稀疏输入中联合重建一个稠密的深度图。AURORA-KITTI包含超过\textit{82K}个天气一致的RGBL对，并附带度量深度真值，涵盖多种天气类型、三个严重程度级别、白天和夜晚场景、配对的干净参考，镜头遮挡条件和文本描述。此外，我们引入了DDCD，一种高效的基于蒸馏的基线方法，它利用深度基础模型将干净的结构先验注入到野外DCD训练中。DDCD在AURORA-KITTI和真实世界的DENSE数据集上实现了最先进的性能，同时保持了效率。值得注意的是，我们的结果进一步表明，与单独的架构修改相比，具有天气感知和物理一致性的数据对稳健性的贡献更大。数据和代码将在发布后公开。

TLDR: The paper introduces AURORA-KITTI, a new large-scale multi-weather benchmark for depth completion and denoising, and proposes DDCD, a distillation-based baseline that leverages depth foundation models for robust performance in adverse weather conditions.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了AURORA-KITTI，一个新的大规模多天气深度补全和去噪的基准，并提出了DDCD，一种基于知识蒸馏的基线方法，利用深度基础模型在恶劣天气条件下实现稳健的性能。

Authors: Yiting Wang, Tim Brödermann, Hamed Haghighi, Haonan Zhao, Christos Sakaridis, Kurt Debattista, Valentina Donzella

Evaluating the Robustness of Reinforcement Learning based Adaptive Traffic Signal Control

Abstract (English): Reinforcement learning (RL) has attracted increasing interest for adaptive traffic signal control due to its model-free ability to learn control policies directly from interaction with the traffic environment. However, several challenges remain before RL-based signal control can be considered ready for field deployment. Many existing studies rely on simplified signal timing structures, robustness of trained models under varying traffic demand conditions remains insufficiently evaluated, and runtime efficiency continues to pose challenges when training RL algorithms in traffic microscopic simulation environments. This study formulates an RL-based signal control algorithm capable of representing a full eight-phase ring-barrier configuration consistent with field signal controllers. The algorithm is trained and evaluated under varying traffic demand conditions and benchmarked against state-of-the-practice actuated signal control (ASC). To assess robustness, experiments are conducted across multiple traffic volumes and origin-destination (O-D) demand patterns with varying levels of structural similarity. To improve training efficiency, a distributed asynchronous training architecture is implemented that enables parallel simulation across multiple computing nodes. Results from a case study intersection show that the proposed RL-based signal control significantly outperforms optimized ASC, reducing average delay by 11-32% across movements. A model trained on a single O-D pattern generalizes well to similar unseen demand patterns but degrades under substantially different demand conditions. In contrast, a model trained on diverse O-D patterns demonstrates strong robustness, consistently outperforming ASC even under highly dissimilar unseen demand scenarios.

摘要（中文）: 由于其具备直接从与交通环境的交互中学习控制策略的免模型能力，强化学习（RL）在自适应交通信号控制领域引起了越来越多的关注。然而，在基于RL的信号控制可以被认为已经为现场部署做好准备之前，仍存在一些挑战。许多现有研究依赖于简化的信号配时结构，训练后的模型在不同交通需求条件下的鲁棒性评估仍然不够充分，并且在交通微观仿真环境中训练RL算法时，运行时效率仍然构成挑战。本研究提出了一种基于RL的信号控制算法，该算法能够表示与现场信号控制器一致的完整的八相位环形障碍结构。该算法在不同的交通需求条件下进行训练和评估，并与先进的自适应信号控制（ASC）进行基准测试。为了评估鲁棒性，实验在多个交通量和具有不同结构相似程度的起点-终点（O-D）需求模式下进行。为了提高训练效率，实现了一种分布式异步训练架构，该架构支持跨多个计算节点的并行仿真。案例研究交叉口的结果表明，所提出的基于RL的信号控制明显优于优化的ASC，各个方向的平均延误减少了11-32%。在单个O-D模式上训练的模型可以很好地泛化到类似的未见需求模式，但在差异显著的需求条件下性能会下降。相比之下，在多样化的O-D模式上训练的模型表现出很强的鲁棒性，即使在高度不同的未见需求场景下，也始终优于ASC。

TLDR: This paper evaluates the robustness of a reinforcement learning (RL) based adaptive traffic signal control algorithm with an eight-phase ring-barrier configuration under varying traffic conditions. The results show that RL models can outperform state-of-the-practice methods but require training on diverse traffic patterns for robust generalization.

简要说明: 本文评估了一种基于强化学习的自适应交通信号控制算法在不同交通条件下的鲁棒性，该算法具有八相位环状结构。结果表明，强化学习模型可以优于现有方法，但需要针对不同的交通模式进行训练，以获得稳健的泛化能力。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (5/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Dickens Kwesiga, Angshuman Guin, Khaled Abdelghany, Michael Hunter

Trustworthy Koopman Operator Learning: Invariance Diagnostics and Error Bounds

Abstract (English): Koopman operator theory provides a global linear representation of nonlinear dynamics and underpins many data-driven methods. In practice, however, finite-dimensional feature spaces induced by a user-chosen dictionary are rarely invariant, so closure failures and projection errors lead to spurious eigenvalues, misleading Koopman modes, and overconfident forecasts. This paper addresses a central validation problem in data-driven Koopman methods: how to quantify invariance and projection errors for an arbitrary feature space using only snapshot data, and how to use these diagnostics to produce actionable guarantees and guide dictionary refinement? A unified a posteriori methodology is developed for certifying when a Koopman approximation is trustworthy and improving it when it is not. Koopman invariance is quantified using principal angles between a subspace and its Koopman image, yielding principal observables and a principal angle decomposition (PAD), a dynamics-informed alternative to SVD truncation with significantly improved performance. Multi-step error bounds are derived for Koopman and Perron--Frobenius mode decompositions, including RKHS-based pointwise guarantees, and are complemented by Gaussian process expected error surrogates. The resulting toolbox enables validated spectral analysis, certified forecasting, and principled dictionary and kernel learning, demonstrated on chaotic and high-dimensional benchmarks and real-world datasets, including cavity flow and the Pluto--Charon system.

摘要（中文）: 考普曼算子理论为非线性动力学提供了一种全局线性表示，并支撑着许多数据驱动的方法。然而，在实践中，用户选择的字典所诱导的有限维特征空间很少具有不变性，因此闭合性失效和投影误差会导致虚假的特征值、误导性的考普曼模态和过于自信的预测。本文旨在解决数据驱动的考普曼方法中的一个核心验证问题：如何仅使用快照数据来量化任意特征空间的不变性和投影误差，以及如何使用这些诊断信息来产生可操作的保证并指导字典的改进？本文提出了一种统一的后验方法，用于验证考普曼近似何时是可信的，并在不可信时对其进行改进。考普曼不变性通过子空间及其考普曼像之间的主角度进行量化，从而产生主可观测量和主角度分解（PAD），这是一种受动力学启发、替代奇异值分解截断的方法，具有显著提升的性能。导出了考普曼和佩隆-弗罗贝尼乌斯模态分解的多步误差界，包括基于再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）的逐点保证，并辅以高斯过程期望误差代理。由此产生的工具箱能够实现经过验证的谱分析、经过认证的预测以及基于原则的字典和核学习，并在混沌和高维基准以及包括腔体流动和冥王星-卡戎系统在内的真实世界数据集上进行了演示。

TLDR: The paper introduces a methodology for quantifying invariance and projection errors in Koopman operator learning, providing error bounds and diagnostics for trustworthy Koopman approximations and dictionary refinement, with demonstrations on diverse datasets.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种量化Koopman算子学习中不变性和投影误差的方法，为可信的Koopman近似和字典改进提供误差界限和诊断，并在各种数据集上进行了演示。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Gustav Conradie, Nicolas Boullé, Jean-Christophe Loiseau, Steven L. Brunton, Matthew J. Colbrook

Multi-Mode Pneumatic Artificial Muscles Driven by Hybrid Positive-Negative Pressure

Abstract (English): Artificial muscles embody human aspirations for engineering lifelike robotic movements. This paper introduces an architecture for Inflatable Fluid-Driven Origami-Inspired Artificial Muscles (IN-FOAMs). A typical IN-FOAM consists of an inflatable skeleton enclosed within an outer skin, which can be driven using a combination of positive and negative pressures (e.g., compressed air and vacuum). IN-FOAMs are manufactured using low-cost heat-sealable sheet materials through heat-pressing and heat-sealing processes. Thus, they can be ultra-thin when not actuated, making them flexible, lightweight, and portable. The skeleton patterns are programmable, enabling a variety of motions, including contracting, bending, twisting, and rotating, based on specific skeleton designs. We conducted comprehensive experimental, theoretical, and numerical studies to investigate IN-FOAM's basic mechanical behavior and properties. The results show that IN-FOAM's output force and contraction can be tuned through multiple operation modes with the applied hybrid positive-negative pressure. Additionally, we propose multilayer skeleton structures to enhance the contraction ratio further, and we demonstrate a multi-channel skeleton approach that allows the integration of multiple motion modes into a single IN-FOAM. These findings indicate that IN-FOAMs hold great potential for future applications in flexible wearable devices and compact soft robotic systems.

摘要（中文）: 人工肌肉体现了人类对工程化类生命机器人运动的渴望。本文介绍了一种可充气流体驱动折纸启发式人工肌肉（IN-FOAMs）的架构。一个典型的IN-FOAM由一个封闭在外皮内的可充气骨架组成，可利用正压和负压的组合（例如，压缩空气和真空）驱动。IN-FOAMs采用低成本热封片材，通过热压和热封工艺制造。因此，它们在未驱动时可以做到超薄，从而使其具有柔韧性、轻量化和便携性。骨架图案是可编程的，基于特定的骨架设计，可实现各种运动，包括收缩、弯曲、扭转和旋转。我们进行了全面的实验、理论和数值研究，以研究IN-FOAM的基本机械行为和特性。结果表明，IN-FOAM的输出力和收缩可以通过施加混合正负压的多种操作模式进行调节。此外，我们提出了多层骨架结构以进一步提高收缩率，并且我们展示了一种多通道骨架方法，该方法允许将多种运动模式集成到单个IN-FOAM中。这些发现表明，IN-FOAMs在未来的柔性可穿戴设备和紧凑型软体机器人系统中具有巨大的应用潜力。

TLDR: The paper introduces Inflatable Fluid-Driven Origami-Inspired Artificial Muscles (IN-FOAMs) driven by hybrid positive-negative pressure for flexible, lightweight, and programmable robotic movements, showing promise for wearable devices and soft robotics.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种由正负混合压力驱动的可充气流体驱动的折纸启发式人工肌肉（IN-FOAMs），用于实现灵活、轻便和可编程的机器人运动，并展现了在可穿戴设备和软体机器人领域的应用前景。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Siyuan Feng, Ruoyu Feng, Shuguang Li

Thermal Image Refinement with Depth Estimation using Recurrent Networks for Monocular ORB-SLAM3

Abstract (English): Autonomous navigation in GPS-denied and visually degraded environments remains challenging for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). To this end, we investigate the use of a monocular thermal camera as a standalone sensor on a UAV platform for real-time depth estimation and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). To extract depth information from thermal images, we propose a novel pipeline employing a lightweight supervised network with recurrent blocks (RBs) integrated to capture temporal dependencies, enabling more robust predictions. The network combines lightweight convolutional backbones with a thermal refinement network (T-RefNet) to refine raw thermal inputs and enhance feature visibility. The refined thermal images and predicted depth maps are integrated into ORB-SLAM3, enabling thermal-only localization. Unlike previous methods, the network is trained on a custom non-radiometric dataset, obviating the need for high-cost radiometric thermal cameras. Experimental results on datasets and UAV flights demonstrate competitive depth accuracy and robust SLAM performance under low-light conditions. On the radiometric VIVID++ (indoor-dark) dataset, our method achieves an absolute relative error of approximately 0.06, compared to baselines exceeding 0.11. In our non-radiometric indoor set, baseline errors remain above 0.24, whereas our approach remains below 0.10. Thermal-only ORB-SLAM3 maintains a mean trajectory error under 0.4 m.

摘要（中文）: 在无 GPS 及视觉退化环境中，无人机 (UAV) 的自主导航仍然面临挑战。为此，我们研究了使用单目热像仪作为 UAV 平台上的独立传感器，用于实时深度估计和同步定位与地图构建 (SLAM)。为了从热图像中提取深度信息，我们提出了一种新颖的流程，该流程采用轻量级监督网络，并集成了循环块 (RB) 以捕获时间依赖性，从而实现更稳健的预测。该网络将轻量级卷积骨干网络与热图像精炼网络 (T-RefNet) 相结合，以精炼原始热图像输入并增强特征可见性。精炼后的热图像和预测的深度图被集成到 ORB-SLAM3 中，从而实现纯热定位。与以往的方法不同，该网络在一个定制的非辐射数据集上进行训练，从而无需使用高成本的辐射热像仪。在数据集和无人机飞行实验中的结果表明，在低光照条件下，该方法具有竞争力的深度精度和稳健的 SLAM 性能。在辐射型 VIVID++ (室内-黑暗) 数据集上，我们的方法实现了约 0.06 的绝对相对误差，而基线方法的误差超过 0.11。在我们非辐射型室内数据集中，基线误差保持在 0.24 以上，而我们的方法保持在 0.10 以下。纯热感 ORB-SLAM3 保持在 0.4 米以下的平均轨迹误差。

TLDR: The paper introduces a thermal image refinement and depth estimation pipeline using recurrent networks to enable robust monocular ORB-SLAM3 in challenging environments, achieving competitive performance with a custom non-radiometric dataset.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种使用循环网络进行热图像细化和深度估计的流水线，以在具有挑战性的环境中实现稳健的单目ORB-SLAM3，并使用自定义的非辐射数据集实现了有竞争力的性能。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Hürkan Şahin, Huy Xuan Pham, Van Huyen Dang, Alper Yegenoglu, Erdal Kayacan

Intelligent Control of Differential Drive Robots Subject to Unmodeled Dynamics with EKF-based State Estimation

Abstract (English): Reliable control and state estimation of differential drive robots (DDR) operating in dynamic and uncertain environments remains a challenge, particularly when system dynamics are partially unknown and sensor measurements are prone to degradation. This work introduces a unified control and state estimation framework that combines a Lyapunov-based nonlinear controller and Adaptive Neural Networks (ANN) with Extended Kalman Filter (EKF)-based multi-sensor fusion. The proposed controller leverages the universal approximation property of neural networks to model unknown nonlinearities in real time. An online adaptation scheme updates the weights of the radial basis function (RBF), the architecture chosen for the ANN. The learned dynamics are integrated into a feedback linearization (FBL) control law, for which theoretical guarantees of closed-loop stability and asymptotic convergence in a trajectory-tracking task are established through a Lyapunov-like stability analysis. To ensure robust state estimation, the EKF fuses inertial measurement unit (IMU) and odometry from monocular, 2D-LiDAR and wheel encoders. The fused state estimate drives the intelligent controller, ensuring consistent performance even under drift, wheel slip, sensor noise and failure. Gazebo simulations and real-world experiments are done using DDR, demonstrating the effectiveness of the approach in terms of improved velocity tracking performance with reduction in linear and angular velocity errors up to $53.91\%$ and $29.0\%$ in comparison to the baseline FBL.

摘要（中文）: 在动态和不确定环境中运行的差动驱动机器人（DDR）的可靠控制和状态估计仍然是一项挑战，特别是当系统动力学部分未知且传感器测量容易退化时。本研究提出了一种统一的控制和状态估计框架，该框架结合了基于李雅普诺夫的非线性控制器和自适应神经网络（ANN），以及基于扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）的多传感器融合。所提出的控制器利用神经网络的通用逼近特性来实时建模未知的非线性。一种在线自适应方案更新径向基函数（RBF）的权重，RBF是为ANN选择的架构。学习到的动力学被集成到反馈线性化（FBL）控制律中，通过类李雅普诺夫稳定性分析，为轨迹跟踪任务中的闭环稳定性和渐近收敛建立了理论保证。为了确保稳健的状态估计，EKF融合了来自单目相机、2D-LiDAR和轮式编码器的惯性测量单元（IMU）和里程计数据。融合的状态估计驱动智能控制器，即使在漂移、车轮打滑、传感器噪声和故障的情况下也能确保一致的性能。使用DDR进行的Gazebo仿真和真实世界实验表明，与基准FBL相比，该方法在提高速度跟踪性能方面有效，线速度和角速度误差分别降低高达$53.91\%$和$29.0\%$。

TLDR: This paper presents a Lyapunov-based nonlinear controller using Adaptive Neural Networks (ANNs) and Extended Kalman Filter (EKF)-based multi-sensor fusion for robust control and state estimation of differential drive robots (DDRs), validated with simulations and real-world experiments, showing improved velocity tracking.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于李雅普诺夫的非线性控制器，该控制器使用自适应神经网络 (ANN) 和基于扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (EKF) 的多传感器融合，用于差动驱动机器人 (DDR) 的鲁棒控制和状态估计，并通过仿真和实际实验验证，显示出改进的速度跟踪。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)

Authors: Amos Alwala, Yuchen Hu, Gabriel da Silva Lima, Wallace Moreira Bessa

Global Truncated Loss Minimization for Robust and Threshold-Resilient Geometric Estimation

Abstract (English): To achieve outlier-robust geometric estimation, robust objective functions are generally employed to mitigate the influence of outliers. The widely used consensus maximization(CM) is highly robust when paired with global branch-and-bound(BnB) search. However, CM relies solely on inlier counts and is sensitive to the inlier threshold. Besides, the discrete nature of CM leads to loose bounds, necessitating extensive BnB iterations and computation cost. Truncated losses(TL), another continuous alternative, leverage residual information more effectively and could potentially overcome these issues. But to our knowledge, no prior work has systematically explored globally minimizing TL with BnB and its potential for enhanced threshold resilience or search efficiency. In this work, we propose GTM, the first unified BnB-based framework for globally-optimal TL loss minimization across diverse geometric problems. GTM involves a hybrid solving design: given an n-dimensional problem, it performs BnB search over an (n-1)-dimensional subspace while the remaining 1D variable is solved by bounding the objective function. Our hybrid design not only reduces the search space, but also enables us to derive Lipschitz-continuous bounding functions that are general, tight, and can be efficiently solved by a classic global Lipschitz solver named DIRECT, which brings further acceleration. We conduct a systematic evaluation on various BnB-based methods for CM and TL on the robust linear regression problem, showing that GTM enjoys remarkable threshold resilience and the highest efficiency compared to baseline methods. Furthermore, we apply GTM on different geometric estimation problems with diverse residual forms. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GTM achieves state-of-the-art outlier-robustness and threshold-resilience while maintaining high efficiency across these estimation tasks.

摘要（中文）: 为了实现异常值鲁棒的几何估计，通常采用鲁棒的目标函数来减轻异常值的影响。广泛使用的共识最大化 (CM) 在与全局分支定界 (BnB) 搜索结合使用时具有很高的鲁棒性。然而，CM 仅依赖于内点计数，并且对内点阈值敏感。此外，CM 的离散性质导致约束松弛，需要大量的 BnB 迭代和计算成本。截断损失 (TL) 作为另一种连续的替代方案，能够更有效地利用残差信息，并有可能克服这些问题。但据我们所知，此前尚无工作系统地探索使用 BnB 全局最小化 TL 及其在增强阈值适应性和搜索效率方面的潜力。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GTM，这是第一个基于 BnB 的统一框架，用于在各种几何问题中全局最优地最小化 TL 损失。GTM 采用混合求解设计：给定一个 n 维问题，它在 (n-1) 维子空间上执行 BnB 搜索，而剩余的 1D 变量则通过约束目标函数来求解。我们的混合设计不仅减少了搜索空间，而且使我们能够推导出 Lipschitz 连续的约束函数，这些函数是通用的、紧凑的，并且可以通过一种名为 DIRECT 的经典全局 Lipschitz 求解器有效地求解，从而进一步加速。我们对各种基于 BnB 的 CM 和 TL 方法在鲁棒线性回归问题上进行了系统评估，表明 GTM 具有显著的阈值适应性，并且与基线方法相比具有最高的效率。此外，我们将 GTM 应用于具有不同残差形式的几何估计问题。大量实验表明，GTM 在这些估计任务中实现了最先进的异常值鲁棒性和阈值适应性，同时保持了高效率。

TLDR: This paper introduces GTM, a globally-optimal Truncated Loss minimization framework using branch-and-bound search, demonstrating improved threshold resilience and efficiency in geometric estimation problems compared to consensus maximization and other truncated loss methods.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了GTM，一个基于分支定界搜索的全局最优截断损失最小化框架，与共识最大化和其他截断损失方法相比，在几何估计问题中表现出更好的阈值弹性和效率。

Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Tianyu Huang, Liangzu Peng, Xinyue Zhang, Tongfan Guan, Jinhu Dong, Haoang Li, Laurent Kneip, Yun-Hui Liu

Exploring the dynamic properties and motion reproducibility of a small upper-body humanoid robot with 13-DOF pneumatic actuation for data-driven control

Abstract (English): Pneumatically-actuated anthropomorphic robots with high degrees of freedom (DOF) offer significant potential for physical human-robot interaction. However, precise control of pneumatic actuators is challenging due to their inherent nonlinearities. This paper presents the development of a compact 13-DOF upper-body humanoid robot. To assess the feasibility of an effective controller, we first investigate its key dynamic properties, such as actuation time delays, and confirm that the system exhibits highly reproducible behavior. Leveraging this reproducibility, we implement a preliminary data-driven controller for a 4-DOF arm subsystem based on a multilayer perceptron with explicit time delay compensation. The network was trained on random movement data to generate pressure commands for tracking arbitrary trajectories. Comparative evaluations with a traditional PID controller demonstrate superior trajectory tracking performance, highlighting the potential of data-driven approaches for controlling complex, high-DOF pneumatic robots.

摘要（中文）: 具有高自由度 (DOF) 的气动驱动仿人机器人为物理人机交互提供了巨大的潜力。然而，由于气动执行器固有的非线性，对其进行精确控制极具挑战性。本文展示了一种紧凑型 13 自由度上半身人形机器人的开发。为了评估有效控制器的可行性，我们首先研究其关键动态特性，例如驱动时间延迟，并确认该系统表现出高度可重复的行为。利用这种可重复性，我们针对 4 自由度手臂子系统，基于具有显式时间延迟补偿的多层感知器，实现了一个初步的数据驱动控制器。该网络在随机运动数据上进行训练，以生成用于跟踪任意轨迹的压力指令。与传统的 PID 控制器进行的对比评估表明，其具有卓越的轨迹跟踪性能，突出了数据驱动方法在控制复杂、高自由度气动机器人方面的潜力。

TLDR: This paper presents a 13-DOF pneumatically-actuated upper-body humanoid robot and demonstrates the feasibility of data-driven control using a multilayer perceptron with time delay compensation, showing improved performance over PID control for trajectory tracking.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一个13自由度的气动上身人形机器人，并展示了使用带时间延迟补偿的多层感知器进行数据驱动控制的可行性，在轨迹跟踪方面表现优于PID控制。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Hiroshi Atsuta, Hisashi Ishihara, Minoru Asada

A Dual Quaternion Framework for Collision Recovery of Quadrotor

Abstract (English): Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) operating in cluttered environments require accurate impact modeling to maintain stability. However, conventional contact models decouple linear and angular impulses, risking manifold inconsistency during rapid state transitions. This article presents a dual quaternion reset map that resolves rigid-body impacts directly on the SE(3) manifold. By operating on the unified spatial twist (linear and angular velocities as a single dual entity), our formulation is algebraically equivalent to the classical Newton impulse model while preserving manifold consistency during discrete state jumps. Building on this framework, we design a hybrid recovery controller that couples linear and angular momentum to ensure strict energy dissipation across impacts. Hardware-in-the-loop benchmarks demonstrate a 24% reduction in execution latency compared to an optimized matrix-based implementation. High-fidelity MuJoCo simulations validate the controller's robustness to complex contact dynamics, showing a 56.6% reduction in post-impact root-mean-square error (RMSE) and a 41.2% decrease in peak kinetic energy compared to decoupled recovery methods.

摘要（中文）: 在复杂环境中运行的无人飞行器（UAV）需要精确的碰撞建模以维持稳定性。然而，传统的接触模型将线性和角冲量解耦，这在快速状态转换期间存在流形不一致的风险。本文提出了一种双四元数重置映射，可以直接在 SE(3) 流形上求解刚体碰撞。通过在统一空间螺旋（线性和角速度作为一个双实体）上进行运算，我们的公式在代数上等价于经典的牛顿冲量模型，同时在离散状态跳转期间保持流形一致性。基于该框架，我们设计了一种混合恢复控制器，该控制器耦合线性和角动量，以确保碰撞过程中严格的能量耗散。硬件在环基准测试表明，与优化的基于矩阵的实现相比，执行延迟降低了 24%。高保真 MuJoCo 仿真验证了控制器对复杂接触动力学的鲁棒性，与解耦恢复方法相比，碰撞后的均方根误差（RMSE）降低了 56.6%，峰值动能降低了 41.2%。

TLDR: This paper presents a dual quaternion-based method for collision recovery in quadrotors, achieving improved performance and robustness compared to traditional methods by preserving manifold consistency and tightly integrating linear and angular momentum control.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于双四元数的四旋翼碰撞恢复方法，通过保持流形一致性并紧密结合线性和角动量控制，与传统方法相比，实现了更好的性能和鲁棒性。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Valentin Gaucher, Wenlong Zhang

Coordinate-Independent Robot Model Identification

Abstract (English): Robot model identification is commonly performed by least-squares regression on inverse dynamics, but existing formulations measure residuals directly in coordinate force space and therefore depend on the chosen coordinate chart, units, and scaling. This paper proposes a coordinate-independent identification method that weights inverse-dynamics residuals by the dual metric induced by the system Riemannian metric. Using the force--velocity vector--covector duality, the dual metric provides a physically meaningful normalization of generalized forces, pulling coordinate residuals back into the ambient mechanical space and eliminating coordinate-induced bias. The resulting objective remains convex through an affine-metric and Schur-complement reformulation, and is compatible with physical-consistency constraints and geometric regularization. Experiments on an inertia-dominated Crazyflie--pendulum system and a drag-dominated LandSalp robot show improved identification accuracy, especially on shape coordinates, in both low-data and high-data settings.

摘要（中文）: 机器人模型辨识通常通过对逆动力学进行最小二乘回归实现，但现有的方法直接在坐标力空间中度量残差，因此依赖于所选的坐标图、单位和尺度。本文提出了一种坐标无关的辨识方法，该方法利用系统黎曼度量所诱导的对偶度量来加权逆动力学残差。利用力-速度向量-余向量对偶性，对偶度量为广义力提供了一种具有物理意义的归一化，将坐标残差拉回到环境机械空间，并消除了坐标引起的偏差。通过仿射度量和舒尔补重构，所得目标函数仍然保持凸性，并且与物理一致性约束和几何正则化相兼容。在惯性主导的Crazyflie-摆锤系统和阻力主导的LandSalp机器人上的实验表明，在低数据和高数据设置下，该方法均提高了辨识精度，尤其是在形状坐标上。

TLDR: The paper proposes a coordinate-independent robot model identification method using a dual metric derived from the Riemannian metric to improve accuracy and eliminate coordinate-induced bias, demonstrating effectiveness on two robot systems.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种坐标无关的机器人模型辨识方法，利用黎曼度量导出的对偶度量来提高精度并消除坐标引起的偏差，并在两个机器人系统上验证了其有效性。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yanhao Yang, Ross L. Hatton

Architecting Autonomy for Safe Microgravity Free-Flyer Inspection

Abstract (English): Small free-flying spacecraft can provide vital extravehicular activity (EVA) services like inspection and repair for future orbital outposts like the Lunar Gateway. Operating adjacent to delicate space station and microgravity targets, these spacecraft require formalization to describe the autonomy that a free-flyer inspection mission must provide. This work explores the transformation of general mission requirements for this class of free-flyer into a set of concrete decisions for the planning and control autonomy architectures that will power such missions. Flowing down from operator commands for inspection of important regions and mission time-criticality, a motion planning problem emerges that provides the basis for developing autonomy solutions. Unique constraints are considered such as velocity limitations, pointing, and keep-in/keep-out zones, with mission fallback techniques for providing hierarchical safety guarantees under model uncertainties and failure. Planning considerations such as cost function design and path vs. trajectory control are discussed. The typical inputs and outputs of the planning and control autonomy stack of such a mission are also provided. Notional system requirements such as solve times and propellant use are documented to inform planning and control design. The entire proposed autonomy framework for free-flyer inspection is realized in the SmallSatSim simulation environment, providing a reference example of free-flyer inspection autonomy. The proposed autonomy architecture serves as a blueprint for future implementations of small satellite autonomous inspection in proximity to mission-critical hardware, going beyond the existing literature in terms of both (1) providing realistic system requirements for an autonomous inspection mission and (2) translating these requirements into autonomy design decisions for inspection planning and control.

摘要（中文）: 小型自由飞行航天器能够为未来的轨道前哨站（如月球门户）提供至关重要的舱外活动（EVA）服务，例如检查和维修。由于它们运行于精密的空间站和微重力目标附近，因此需要对其自主性进行规范化描述，以满足自由飞行器检查任务的需求。 本文探讨了如何将此类自由飞行器的一般任务需求转化为规划和控制自主架构的一系列具体决策，从而驱动此类任务的实施。 从操作员对重要区域的检查命令和任务时间关键性出发，产生了一个运动规划问题，并成为开发自主解决方案的基础。 文中考虑了独特的约束条件，例如速度限制、指向、保持区域/禁入区域以及在模型不确定性和故障情况下提供分层安全保障的任务回退技术。 讨论了规划方面的考虑因素，例如成本函数设计以及路径与轨迹控制。 还提供了此类任务规划和控制自主堆栈的典型输入和输出。 记录了诸如求解时间和推进剂使用量等概念性系统需求，以指导规划和控制设计。 整个提出的自由飞行器检查自主框架在 SmallSatSim 仿真环境中得以实现，为自由飞行器检查自主性提供了一个参考示例。 提出的自主架构为未来小型卫星在关键任务硬件附近进行自主检查的实施提供了一个蓝图，在以下两个方面超越了现有文献：(1) 为自主检查任务提供现实的系统需求； (2) 将这些需求转化为检查规划和控制的自主设计决策。

TLDR: This paper presents an autonomy architecture for small free-flying spacecraft used for inspection and repair of orbital outposts, detailing the transformation of general mission requirements into concrete autonomy design decisions and system requirements, validated in a simulation environment.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于小型自由飞行航天器的自主架构，该航天器用于轨道前哨站的检查和维修，详细介绍了将一般任务要求转化为具体的自主设计决策和系统要求的过程，并在仿真环境中进行了验证。

Relevance: (3/10)

Authors: Keenan Albee, David C. Sternberg, Alexander Hansson, David Schwartz, Ritwik Majumdar, Oliver Jia-Richards

Agentic workflow enables the recovery of critical materials from complex feedstocks via selective precipitation

Abstract (English): We present a multi-agentic workflow for critical materials recovery that deploys a series of AI agents and automated instruments to recover critical materials from produced water and magnet leachates. This approach achieves selective precipitation from real-world feedstocks using simple chemicals, accelerating the development of efficient, adaptable, and scalable separations to a timeline of days, rather than months and years.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了一种用于关键材料回收的多智能体工作流，该工作流部署了一系列人工智能智能体和自动化仪器，以从采出水和磁体浸出液中回收关键材料。该方法利用简单的化学品从真实的原料中实现选择性沉淀，将高效、适应性强且可扩展的分离过程的开发周期从数月甚至数年缩短至数天。

TLDR: The paper introduces a multi-agentic workflow employing AI agents and automated instruments for rapid, selective precipitation of critical materials from complex industrial feedstocks.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种多智能体工作流程，利用人工智能体和自动化仪器，快速、选择性地从复杂的工业原料中沉淀关键材料。

Authors: Andrew Ritchhart, Sarah I. Allec, Pravalika Butreddy, Krista Kulesa, Qingpu Wang, Dan Thien Nguyen, Maxim Ziatdinov, Elias Nakouzi

Agent Lifecycle Toolkit (ALTK): Reusable Middleware Components for Robust AI Agents

Abstract (English): As AI agents move from demos into enterprise deployments, their failure modes become consequential: a misinterpreted tool argument can corrupt production data, a silent reasoning error can go undetected until damage is done, and outputs that violate organizational policy can create legal or compliance risk. Yet, most agent frameworks leave builders to handle these failure modes ad hoc, resulting in brittle, one-off safeguards that are hard to reuse or maintain. We present the Agent Lifecycle Toolkit (ALTK), an open-source collection of modular middleware components that systematically address these gaps across the full agent lifecycle. Across the agent lifecycle, we identify opportunities to intervene and improve, namely, post-user-request, pre-LLM prompt conditioning, post-LLM output processing, pre-tool validation, post-tool result checking, and pre-response assembly. ALTK provides modular middleware that detects, repairs, and mitigates common failure modes. It offers consistent interfaces that fit naturally into existing pipelines. It is compatible with low-code and no-code tools such as the ContextForge MCP Gateway and Langflow. Finally, it significantly reduces the effort of building reliable, production-grade agents.

摘要（中文）: 随着人工智能代理从演示走向企业部署，它们的失效模式变得至关重要：一个被误解的工具参数可能会破坏生产数据，一个无声的推理错误可能会在造成损害之前未被发现，违反组织策略的输出可能会产生法律或合规风险。然而，大多数代理框架都让构建者临时处理这些失效模式，导致脆弱、一次性的安全措施，难以重用或维护。我们提出了代理生命周期工具包（ALTK），这是一个开源的模块化中间件组件集合，旨在系统地解决整个代理生命周期中的这些差距。 在整个代理生命周期中，我们识别出干预和改进的机会，包括用户请求后、LLM提示词条件预处理、LLM输出后处理、工具验证前、工具结果检查后以及响应组装前。ALTK 提供了模块化中间件，可以检测、修复和缓解常见的失效模式。它提供了与现有流水线自然契合的一致接口。它与低代码和无代码工具（如 ContextForge MCP Gateway 和 Langflow）兼容。最后，它显著降低了构建可靠的、生产级代理的工作量。

TLDR: The paper introduces the Agent Lifecycle Toolkit (ALTK), an open-source collection of middleware components designed to improve the robustness and reliability of AI agents across their lifecycle by addressing common failure modes often overlooked in existing frameworks.

简要说明: 本文介绍了 Agent Lifecycle Toolkit (ALTK)，一个开源的中间件组件集合，旨在提高 AI 代理在其生命周期中的稳健性和可靠性，通过解决现有框架中经常被忽视的常见故障模式。

Novelty: (6/10)

Authors: Zidane Wright, Jason Tsay, Anupama Murthi, Osher Elhadad, Diego Del Rio, Saurabh Goyal, Kiran Kate, Jim Laredo, Koren Lazar, Vinod Muthusamy, Yara Rizk

Detection of Autonomous Shuttles in Urban Traffic Images Using Adaptive Residual Context

Abstract (English): The progressive automation of transport promises to enhance safety and sustainability through shared mobility. Like other vehicles and road users, and even more so for such a new technology, it requires monitoring to understand how it interacts in traffic and to evaluate its safety. This can be done with fixed cameras and video object detection. However, the addition of new detection targets generally requires a fine-tuning approach for regular detection methods. Unfortunately, this implementation strategy will lead to a phenomenon known as catastrophic forgetting, which causes a degradation in scene understanding. In road safety applications, preserving contextual scene knowledge is of the utmost importance for protecting road users. We introduce the Adaptive Residual Context (ARC) architecture to address this. ARC links a frozen context branch and trainable task-specific branches through a Context-Guided Bridge, utilizing attention to transfer spatial features while preserving pre-trained representations. Experiments on a custom dataset show that ARC matches fine-tuned baselines while significantly improving knowledge retention, offering a data-efficient solution to add new vehicle categories for complex urban environments.

摘要（中文）: 交通运输的渐进式自动化有望通过共享出行来增强安全性和可持续性。与其它车辆和道路使用者一样，甚至对于这样一种新技术而言，都需要对其进行监控，以了解其在交通中的交互方式并评估其安全性。 这可以通过固定摄像头和视频对象检测来实现。然而，添加新的检测目标通常需要对常规检测方法进行微调。不幸的是，这种实施策略会导致一种被称为灾难性遗忘的现象，从而降低场景理解能力。在道路安全应用中，保持上下文场景知识对于保护道路使用者至关重要。我们引入了自适应残差上下文（ARC）架构来解决这个问题。ARC通过上下文引导桥连接一个冻结的上下文分支和可训练的特定任务分支，利用注意力机制来传递空间特征，同时保留预训练的表示。在一个自定义数据集上的实验表明，ARC在显著提高知识保留率的同时，性能与微调的基线方法相匹配，为复杂城市环境中添加新的车辆类别提供了一种数据高效的解决方案。

TLDR: This paper introduces Adaptive Residual Context (ARC), a method for detecting autonomous shuttles in urban traffic images that addresses catastrophic forgetting by maintaining contextual scene knowledge while adding new vehicle categories.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为自适应残差上下文 (ARC) 的方法，用于检测城市交通图像中的自动驾驶巴士，该方法通过在添加新的车辆类别时保持上下文场景知识，从而解决了灾难性遗忘问题。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Mohamed Aziz Younes, Nicolas Saunier, Guillaume-Alexandre Bilodeau

TrajFlow: Nation-wide Pseudo GPS Trajectory Generation with Flow Matching Models

Abstract (English): The importance of mobile phone GPS trajectory data is widely recognized across many fields, yet the use of real data is often hindered by privacy concerns, limited accessibility, and high acquisition costs. As a result, generating pseudo-GPS trajectory data has become an active area of research. Recent diffusion-based approaches have achieved strong fidelity but remain limited in spatial scale (small urban areas), transportation-mode diversity, and efficiency (requiring numerous sampling steps). To address these challenges, we introduce TrajFlow, which to the best of our knowledge is the first flow-matching-based generative model for GPS trajectory generation. TrajFlow leverages the flow-matching paradigm to improve robustness and efficiency across multiple geospatial scales, and incorporates a trajectory harmonization and reconstruction strategy to jointly address scalability, diversity, and efficiency. Using a nationwide mobile phone GPS dataset with millions of trajectories across Japan, we show that TrajFlow or its variants consistently outperform diffusion-based and deep generative baselines at urban, metropolitan, and nationwide levels. As the first nationwide, multi-scale GPS trajectory generation model, TrajFlow demonstrates strong potential to support inter-region urban planning, traffic management, and disaster response, thereby advancing the resilience and intelligence of future mobility systems.

摘要（中文）: 移动电话GPS轨迹数据的重要性已在诸多领域得到广泛认可，但真实数据的使用常常受到隐私问题、可访问性有限以及高昂获取成本的阻碍。因此，生成伪GPS轨迹数据已成为一个活跃的研究领域。最近基于扩散的方法在保真度方面表现出色，但在空间尺度（小城市区域）、交通方式多样性和效率（需要大量采样步骤）方面仍然存在局限性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了TrajFlow，据我们所知，这是第一个基于流匹配的GPS轨迹生成模型。TrajFlow利用流匹配范式来提高跨多个地理空间尺度的鲁棒性和效率，并整合了一种轨迹协调和重构策略，以共同解决可扩展性、多样性和效率问题。通过使用包含日本境内数百万条轨迹的全国性移动电话GPS数据集，我们证明了TrajFlow或其变体在城市、都市和全国范围内始终优于基于扩散和深度生成模型的基线。作为第一个全国性的、多尺度的GPS轨迹生成模型，TrajFlow展现出支持区域间城市规划、交通管理和灾害响应的巨大潜力，从而提升未来出行系统的韧性和智能化水平。

TLDR: The paper introduces TrajFlow, a flow-matching-based generative model for creating pseudo-GPS trajectory data at a nationwide scale, addressing limitations of existing diffusion models in terms of scale, diversity, and efficiency. It demonstrates superior performance across Japan compared to diffusion and other generative models.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了TrajFlow，一种基于流匹配的生成模型，用于创建全国范围的伪GPS轨迹数据，解决了现有扩散模型在规模、多样性和效率方面的局限性。 它证明了在日本的表现优于扩散模型和其他生成模型。

Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Peiran Li, Jiawei Wang, Haoran Zhang, Xiaodan Shi, Noboru Koshizuka, Chihiro Shimizu, Renhe Jiang

Video Detector: A Dual-Phase Vision-Based System for Real-Time Traffic Intersection Control and Intelligent Transportation Analysis

Abstract (English): Urban traffic management increasingly requires intelligent sensing systems capable of adapting to dynamic traffic conditions without costly infrastructure modifications. Vision-based vehicle detection has therefore become a key technology for modern intelligent transportation systems. This study presents Video Detector (VD), a dual-phase vision-based traffic intersection management system designed as a flexible and cost-effective alternative to traditional inductive loop detectors. The framework integrates a real-time module (VD-RT) for intersection control with an offline analytical module (VD-Offline) for detailed traffic behavior analysis. Three system configurations were implemented using SSD Inception v2, Faster R-CNN Inception v2, and CenterNet ResNet-50 V1 FPN, trained on datasets totaling 108,000 annotated images across 6-10 vehicle classes. Experimental results show detection performance of up to 90% test accuracy and 29.5 mAP@0.5, while maintaining real-time throughput of 37 FPS on HD video streams. Field deployments conducted in collaboration with Istanbul IT and Smart City Technologies Inc. (ISBAK) demonstrate stable operation under diverse environmental conditions. The system supports virtual loop detection, vehicle counting, multi-object tracking, queue estimation, speed analysis, and multiclass vehicle classification, enabling comprehensive intersection monitoring without the need for embedded road sensors. The annotated dataset and training pipeline are publicly released to support reproducibility. These results indicate that the proposed framework provides a scalable and deployable vision-based solution for intelligent transportation systems and smart-city traffic management.

摘要（中文）: 城市交通管理日益需要能够适应动态交通状况且无需昂贵的基础设施改造的智能感知系统。因此，基于视觉的车辆检测已成为现代智能交通系统的关键技术。本研究提出了一种双阶段的基于视觉的交通路口管理系统——视频检测器(VD)，旨在作为传统感应线圈检测器的灵活且经济高效的替代方案。该框架集成了用于路口控制的实时模块(VD-RT)和用于详细交通行为分析的离线分析模块(VD-Offline)。使用SSD Inception v2、Faster R-CNN Inception v2和CenterNet ResNet-50 V1 FPN实现了三种系统配置，并在总计108,000张带注释的图像数据集上进行了训练，这些数据集涵盖了6-10个车辆类别。实验结果表明，检测性能高达90%的测试准确率和29.5 mAP@0.5，同时在高清视频流上保持37 FPS的实时吞吐量。与伊斯坦布尔IT和智慧城市技术有限公司（ISBAK）合作进行的现场部署表明，该系统在各种环境条件下都能稳定运行。该系统支持虚拟线圈检测、车辆计数、多目标跟踪、排队估计、速度分析和多类车辆分类，从而无需嵌入式道路传感器即可实现全面的路口监控。注释数据集和训练管道已公开发布，以支持可重复性。这些结果表明，所提出的框架为智能交通系统和智慧城市交通管理提供了一种可扩展且可部署的基于视觉的解决方案。

TLDR: This paper presents Video Detector (VD), a dual-phase vision-based system for real-time traffic intersection control and intelligent transportation analysis, achieving high accuracy and real-time performance in field deployments. The annotated dataset and training pipeline are publicly available.

简要说明: 本文提出了Video Detector (VD)，一个用于实时交通路口控制和智能交通分析的双阶段视觉系统，在现场部署中实现了高精度和实时性能。注释数据集和训练管道已公开发布。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Mustafa Fatih Şen, Halûk Gümüşkaya, Şenol Pazar

Real-Time Driver Safety Scoring Through Inverse Crash Probability Modeling

Abstract (English): Road crashes remain a leading cause of preventable fatalities. Existing prediction models predominantly produce binary outcomes, which offer limited actionable insights for real-time driver feedback. These approaches often lack continuous risk quantification, interpretability, and explicit consideration of vulnerable road users (VRUs), such as pedestrians and cyclists. This research introduces SafeDriver-IQ, a framework that transforms binary crash classifiers into continuous 0-100 safety scores by combining national crash statistics with naturalistic driving data from autonomous vehicles. The framework fuses National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) crash records with Waymo Open Motion Dataset scenarios, engineers domain-informed features, and incorporates a calibration layer grounded in transportation safety literature. Evaluation across 15 complementary analyses indicates that the framework reliably differentiates high-risk from low-risk driving conditions with strong discriminative performance. Findings further reveal that 87% of crashes involve multiple co-occurring risk factors, with non-linear compounding effects that increase the risk to 4.5x baseline. SafeDriver-IQ delivers proactive, explainable safety intelligence relevant to advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS), fleet management, and urban infrastructure planning. This framework shifts the focus from reactive crash counting to real-time risk prevention.

摘要（中文）: 道路交通事故仍然是可预防死亡的主要原因。现有的预测模型主要产生二元结果，这为实时驾驶员反馈提供的可操作见解有限。这些方法通常缺乏连续的风险量化、可解释性以及对弱势道路使用者（VRUs），如行人和自行车骑行者，的明确考虑。本研究引入了SafeDriver-IQ，该框架通过将国家交通事故统计数据与来自无人驾驶汽车的自然驾驶数据相结合，将二元碰撞分类器转换为连续的0-100安全评分。该框架融合了美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）的交通事故记录与Waymo开放运动数据集场景，设计了领域相关的特征，并纳入了基于交通安全文献的校准层。对15项互补性分析的评估表明，该框架能够可靠地区分高风险和低风险驾驶条件，并具有强大的区分性能。研究结果进一步表明，87%的交通事故涉及多种同时发生的风险因素，这些因素具有非线性复合效应，使风险增加至基线的4.5倍。SafeDriver-IQ提供主动、可解释的安全智能，与高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）、车队管理和城市基础设施规划相关。该框架将重点从被动的事故计数转移到实时的风险预防。

TLDR: The paper introduces SafeDriver-IQ, a framework using crash statistics and driving data to provide real-time, continuous driver safety scores, addressing limitations of existing binary crash prediction models.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了SafeDriver-IQ，一个利用崩溃统计和驾驶数据提供实时、连续驾驶员安全评分的框架，解决了现有二元崩溃预测模型的局限性。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Joyjit Roy, Samaresh Kumar Singh

Planning as Goal Recognition: Deriving Heuristics from Intention Models - Extended Version

Abstract (English): Classical planning aims to find a sequence of actions, a plan, that maps a starting state into one of the goal states. If a trajectory appears to be leading to the goal, should we prioritise exploring it? Seminal work in goal recognition (GR) has defined GR in terms of a classical planning problem, adopting classical solvers and heuristics to recognise plans. We come full circle, and study the adoption and properties of GR-derived heuristics for seeking solutions to classical planning problems. We propose a new framework for assessing goal intention, which informs a new class of efficiently-computable heuristics. As a proof of concept, we derive two such heuristics, and show that they can already yield improvements for top-scoring classical planners. Our work provides foundational knowledge for understanding and deriving probabilistic intention-based heuristics for planning.

摘要（中文）: 经典规划旨在寻找一个行动序列，即一个计划，将起始状态映射到目标状态之一。如果某个轨迹看起来将通往目标，我们是否应该优先探索它？目标识别（GR）的开创性工作已将GR定义为一个经典规划问题，采用经典求解器和启发式方法来识别计划。我们现在回到原点，研究GR导出的启发式方法在寻求经典规划问题解决方案时的应用和性质。我们提出了一个新的框架来评估目标意图，该框架为一种新的高效可计算启发式方法提供了依据。作为概念验证，我们推导了两种这样的启发式方法，并表明它们已经可以提高顶级经典规划器的性能。我们的工作为理解和推导基于概率意图的规划启发式方法提供了基础知识。

TLDR: This paper explores using goal recognition techniques as heuristics for classical planning, deriving intention-based heuristics that improve classical planner performance. The work provides foundational knowledge for probabilistic intention-based planning heuristics.

简要说明: 本文探讨了使用目标识别技术作为经典规划的启发式方法，推导出基于意图的启发式方法，提高了经典规划器的性能。这项工作为基于概率意图的规划启发式方法提供了基础知识。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Giacomo Rosa, Jean Honorio, Nir Lipovetzky, Sebastian Sardina

Robust Building Damage Detection in Cross-Disaster Settings Using Domain Adaptation

Abstract (English): Rapid structural damage assessment from remote sensing imagery is essential for timely disaster response. Within human-machine systems (HMS) for disaster management, automated damage detection provides decision-makers with actionable situational awareness. However, models trained on multi-disaster benchmarks often underperform in unseen geographic regions due to domain shift - a distributional mismatch between training and deployment data that undermines human trust in automated assessments. We explore a two-stage ensemble approach using supervised domain adaptation (SDA) for building damage classification across four severity classes. The pipeline adapts the xView2 first-place method to the Ida-BD dataset using SDA and systematically investigates the effect of individual augmentation components on classification performance. Comprehensive ablation experiments on the unseen Ida-BD test split demonstrate that SDA is indispensable: removing it causes damage detection to fail entirely. Our pipeline achieves the most robust performance using SDA with unsharp-enhanced RGB input, attaining a Macro-F1 of 0.5552. These results underscore the critical role of domain adaptation in building trustworthy automated damage assessment modules for HMS-integrated disaster response.

摘要（中文）: 以下是英文论文摘要的中文翻译： 从遥感影像中快速评估结构性破坏对于及时的灾难响应至关重要。在用于灾难管理的人机系统（HMS）中，自动损伤检测为决策者提供可操作的态势感知。然而，在多灾害基准数据集上训练的模型，由于领域迁移——训练数据和部署数据之间的分布不匹配，损害了人对自动评估的信任——通常在未见过的地理区域表现不佳。我们探索了一种使用监督领域自适应（SDA）的两阶段集成方法，用于跨四个严重程度等级的建筑物损伤分类。该流程将xView2的冠军方法通过SDA迁移到Ida-BD数据集，并系统地研究了各增强组件对分类性能的影响。在未见过的Ida-BD测试集上的全面消融实验表明，SDA是不可或缺的：移除它会导致损伤检测完全失败。我们的流程使用带有锐化增强RGB输入的SDA获得了最稳健的性能，宏平均F1值达到0.5552。这些结果强调了领域自适应在构建可信的、集成到HMS的自动化损伤评估模块中的关键作用，以便用于灾难响应。

TLDR: This paper presents a two-stage ensemble approach using supervised domain adaptation (SDA) for robust building damage classification across disaster settings, demonstrating SDA's critical role in improving performance in unseen geographic regions.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种两阶段集成方法，该方法使用监督域适应（SDA）来进行跨灾难环境下的稳健建筑物损坏分类，证明了SDA在提高未知地理区域性能方面的关键作用。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Asmae Mouradi, Shruti Kshirsagar

RadarXFormer: Robust Object Detection via Cross-Dimension Fusion of 4D Radar Spectra and Images for Autonomous Driving

Abstract (English): Reliable perception is essential for autonomous driving systems to operate safely under diverse real-world traffic conditions. However, camera- and LiDAR-based perception systems suffer from performance degradation under adverse weather and lighting conditions, limiting their robustness and large-scale deployment in intelligent transportation systems. Radar-vision fusion provides a promising alternative by combining the environmental robustness and cost efficiency of millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar with the rich semantic information captured by cameras. Nevertheless, conventional 3D radar measurements lack height resolution and remain highly sparse, while emerging 4D mmWave radar introduces elevation information but also brings challenges such as signal noise and large data volume. To address these issues, this paper proposes RadarXFormer, a 3D object detection framework that enables efficient cross-modal fusion between 4D radar spectra and RGB images. Instead of relying on sparse radar point clouds, RadarXFormer directly leverages raw radar spectra and constructs an efficient 3D representation that reduces data volume while preserving complete 3D spatial information. The "X" highlights the proposed cross-dimension (3D-2D) fusion mechanism, in which multi-scale 3D spherical radar feature cubes are fused with complementary 2D image feature maps. Experiments on the K-Radar dataset demonstrate improved detection accuracy and robustness under challenging conditions while maintaining real-time inference capability.

摘要（中文）: 可靠的感知能力对于自动驾驶系统在各种真实交通条件下安全运行至关重要。然而，基于摄像头和激光雷达的感知系统在恶劣天气和光照条件下性能会下降，限制了其在智能交通系统中的鲁棒性和大规模部署。雷达-视觉融合提供了一种有前景的替代方案，它将毫米波雷达的环境鲁棒性和成本效益与摄像头捕获的丰富语义信息相结合。然而，传统的3D雷达测量缺乏高度分辨率且仍然高度稀疏，而新兴的4D毫米波雷达引入了高度信息，但也带来了信号噪声和大数据量等挑战。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种3D目标检测框架RadarXFormer，它能够在4D雷达频谱和RGB图像之间实现高效的跨模态融合。RadarXFormer不依赖于稀疏的雷达点云，而是直接利用原始雷达频谱，并构建一种高效的3D表示，在减少数据量的同时保留完整的3D空间信息。"X"突出了所提出的跨维度（3D-2D）融合机制，其中多尺度的3D球形雷达特征立方体与互补的2D图像特征图进行融合。在K-Radar数据集上的实验表明，在具有挑战性的条件下，该方法提高了检测精度和鲁棒性，同时保持了实时的推理能力。

TLDR: The paper introduces RadarXFormer, a 3D object detection framework that fuses 4D radar spectra and RGB images for robust autonomous driving perception, addressing limitations of camera and LiDAR-based systems in adverse conditions.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了RadarXFormer，一个3D物体检测框架，它融合了4D雷达频谱和RGB图像，以实现稳健的自动驾驶感知。它解决了相机和激光雷达系统在恶劣条件下存在的局限性。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Yue Sun, Yeqiang Qian, Zhe Wang, Tianhui Li, Chunxiang Wang, Ming Yang

Zero-Shot Reconstruction of Animatable 3D Avatars with Cloth Dynamics from a Single Image

Abstract (English): Existing single-image 3D human avatar methods primarily rely on rigid joint transformations, limiting their ability to model realistic cloth dynamics. We present DynaAvatar, a zero-shot framework that reconstructs animatable 3D human avatars with motion-dependent cloth dynamics from a single image. Trained on large-scale multi-person motion datasets, DynaAvatar employs a Transformer-based feed-forward architecture that directly predicts dynamic 3D Gaussian deformations without subject-specific optimization. To overcome the scarcity of dynamic captures, we introduce a static-to-dynamic knowledge transfer strategy: a Transformer pretrained on large-scale static captures provides strong geometric and appearance priors, which are efficiently adapted to motion-dependent deformations through lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on dynamic captures. We further propose the DynaFlow loss, an optical flow-guided objective that provides reliable motion-direction geometric cues for cloth dynamics in rendered space. Finally, we reannotate the missing or noisy SMPL-X fittings in existing dynamic capture datasets, as most public dynamic capture datasets contain incomplete or unreliable fittings that are unsuitable for training high-quality 3D avatar reconstruction models. Experiments demonstrate that DynaAvatar produces visually rich and generalizable animations, outperforming prior methods.

摘要（中文）: 现有的单图三维人体数字替身方法主要依赖于刚性关节变换，限制了其对真实服装动力学建模的能力。我们提出了DynaAvatar，一种零样本框架，可以从单张图像重建具有运动相关服装动力学的可动画三维人体数字替身。DynaAvatar在大型多人运动数据集上训练，采用基于Transformer的前馈架构，无需针对特定对象进行优化，即可直接预测动态三维高斯变形。为了克服动态捕捉数据的稀缺性，我们引入了一种静态到动态的知识迁移策略：一个在大型静态捕捉数据上预训练的Transformer提供了强大的几何和外观先验知识，通过在动态捕捉数据上进行轻量级的LoRA微调，可以有效地适应运动相关的变形。我们进一步提出了DynaFlow损失，这是一个光流引导的目标函数，在渲染空间中为服装动力学提供可靠的运动方向几何线索。最后，我们重新标注了现有动态捕捉数据集中缺失或噪声过大的SMPL-X拟合，因为大多数公开的动态捕捉数据集包含不完整或不可靠的拟合，不适合训练高质量的三维数字替身重建模型。实验表明，DynaAvatar能够生成视觉效果丰富且具有通用性的动画，优于以往的方法。

TLDR: DynaAvatar is a zero-shot framework for reconstructing animatable 3D human avatars with cloth dynamics from a single image, using transformers and a static-to-dynamic knowledge transfer strategy with a novel optical flow-guided loss.

简要说明: DynaAvatar是一个零样本框架，用于从单张图像重建具有布料动态的可动画3D人体化身。它采用Transformer和静态到动态的知识迁移策略，并结合了一个新的光流引导损失。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Joohyun Kwon, Geonhee Sim, Gyeongsik Moon

SSR: A Training-Free Approach for Streaming 3D Reconstruction

Abstract (English): Streaming 3D reconstruction demands long-horizon state updates under strict latency constraints, yet stateful recurrent models often suffer from geometric drift as errors accumulate over time. We revisit this problem from a Grassmannian manifold perspective: the latent persistent state can be viewed as a subspace representation, i.e., a point evolving on a Grassmannian manifold, where temporal coherence implies the state trajectory should remain on (or near) this manifold.Based on this view, we propose Self-expressive Sequence Regularization (SSR), a plug-and-play, training-free operator that enforces Grassmannian sequence regularity during inference.Given a window of historical states, SSR computes an analytical affinity matrix via the self-expressive property and uses it to regularize the current update, effectively pulling noisy predictions back toward the manifold-consistent trajectory with minimal overhead. Experiments on long-sequence benchmarks demonstrate that SSR consistently reduces drift and improves reconstruction quality across multiple streaming 3D reconstruction tasks.

摘要（中文）: 流式三维重建需要在严格的延迟约束下进行长时域状态更新，然而，有状态的循环模型常常遭受几何漂移，因为误差会随着时间累积。我们从格拉斯曼流形的角度重新审视这个问题：潜在的持久状态可以被视为一个子空间表示，即格拉斯曼流形上演化的点，其中时间相干性意味着状态轨迹应保持在该流形上（或附近）。基于这种观点，我们提出了自表达序列正则化 (SSR)，这是一种即插即用、无需训练的算子，可在推理过程中强制执行格拉斯曼序列正则性。给定一个历史状态窗口，SSR通过自表达属性计算一个解析的亲和矩阵，并利用它来正则化当前的更新，从而有效地将嘈杂的预测拉回到流形一致的轨迹上，且开销最小。在长序列基准上的实验表明，SSR能够持续降低漂移，并在多个流式三维重建任务中提高重建质量。

TLDR: The paper introduces a training-free, plug-and-play method called Self-expressive Sequence Regularization (SSR) to reduce geometric drift in streaming 3D reconstruction by enforcing Grassmannian sequence regularity during inference.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为自表达序列正则化(SSR)的免训练、即插即用方法，通过在推理过程中强制执行格拉斯曼序列正则性，来减少流式3D重建中的几何漂移。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Hui Deng, Yuxin Mao, Yuxin He, Yuchao Dai

Enhancing Hands in 3D Whole-Body Pose Estimation with Conditional Hands Modulator

Abstract (English): Accurately recovering hand poses within the body context remains a major challenge in 3D whole-body pose estimation. This difficulty arises from a fundamental supervision gap: whole-body pose estimators are trained on full-body datasets with limited hand diversity, while hand-only estimators, trained on hand-centric datasets, excel at detailed finger articulation but lack global body awareness. To address this, we propose Hand4Whole++, a modular framework that leverages the strengths of both pre-trained whole-body and hand pose estimators. We introduce CHAM (Conditional Hands Modulator), a lightweight module that modulates the whole-body feature stream using hand-specific features extracted from a pre-trained hand pose estimator. This modulation enables the whole-body model to predict wrist orientations that are both accurate and coherent with the upper-body kinematic structure, without retraining the full-body model. In parallel, we directly incorporate finger articulations and hand shapes predicted by the hand pose estimator, aligning them to the full-body mesh via differentiable rigid alignment. This design allows Hand4Whole++ to combine globally consistent body reasoning with fine-grained hand detail. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Hand4Whole++ substantially improves hand accuracy and enhances overall full-body pose quality.

摘要（中文）: 在3D全身姿态估计中，准确恢复身体环境下的手部姿态仍然是一个主要的挑战。这一困难源于一个根本性的监督差距：全身姿态估计器在手部多样性有限的全身数据集上训练，而手部专用估计器在手部中心数据集上训练，擅长精细的手指关节运动，但缺乏全局身体感知。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了Hand4Whole++，一个模块化的框架，它利用了预训练的全身和手部姿态估计器的优势。我们引入了CHAM（条件手部调制器），一个轻量级模块，它使用从预训练手部姿态估计器中提取的手部特定特征来调制全身特征流。这种调制使全身模型能够预测既准确又与上身运动学结构一致的腕部方向，而无需重新训练全身模型。同时，我们直接整合了手部姿态估计器预测的手指关节运动和手部形状，通过可微的刚性对齐将它们与全身网格对齐。这种设计允许Hand4Whole++将全局一致的身体推理与精细的手部细节相结合。大量实验表明，Hand4Whole++显著提高了手部精度，并增强了整体全身姿态质量。

TLDR: The paper introduces Hand4Whole++, a framework leveraging both whole-body and hand pose estimators with a novel Conditional Hands Modulator (CHAM) to improve hand pose accuracy in 3D whole-body pose estimation.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Hand4Whole++框架，它利用全身和手部姿势估计器，并结合一种新颖的条件手部调制器（CHAM），以提高3D全身姿势估计中的手部姿势准确性。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Gyeongsik Moon

E2EGS: Event-to-Edge Gaussian Splatting for Pose-Free 3D Reconstruction

Abstract (English): The emergence of neural radiance fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) has advanced novel view synthesis (NVS). These methods, however, require high-quality RGB inputs and accurate corresponding poses, limiting robustness under real-world conditions such as fast camera motion or adverse lighting. Event cameras, which capture brightness changes at each pixel with high temporal resolution and wide dynamic range, enable precise sensing of dynamic scenes and offer a promising solution. However, existing event-based NVS methods either assume known poses or rely on depth estimation models that are bounded by their initial observations, failing to generalize as the camera traverses previously unseen regions. We present E2EGS, a pose-free framework operating solely on event streams. Our key insight is that edge information provides rich structural cues essential for accurate trajectory estimation and high-quality NVS. To extract edges from noisy event streams, we exploit the distinct spatio-temporal characteristics of edges and non-edge regions. The event camera's movement induces consistent events along edges, while non-edge regions produce sparse noise. We leverage this through a patch-based temporal coherence analysis that measures local variance to extract edges while robustly suppressing noise. The extracted edges guide structure-aware Gaussian initialization and enable edge-weighted losses throughout initialization, tracking, and bundle adjustment. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that E2EGS achieves superior reconstruction quality and trajectory accuracy, establishing a fully pose-free paradigm for event-based 3D reconstruction.

摘要（中文）: 神经辐射场(NeRF)和3D高斯溅射(3DGS)的出现，推动了新视角合成(NVS)的发展。然而，这些方法需要高质量的RGB图像输入和精确的对应位姿，限制了其在快速相机运动或不利光照等真实世界条件下的鲁棒性。事件相机以高时间分辨率和宽动态范围捕获每个像素的亮度变化，能够精确感知动态场景，并提供了一种有前景的解决方案。然而，现有的基于事件的NVS方法要么假定已知位姿，要么依赖于受初始观测限制的深度估计模型，无法在相机遍历先前未见区域时进行泛化。我们提出了E2EGS，一个完全基于事件流的无位姿框架。我们的关键见解是，边缘信息提供了丰富的结构线索，这对于准确的轨迹估计和高质量的NVS至关重要。为了从噪声事件流中提取边缘，我们利用了边缘和非边缘区域独特的时空特性。事件相机的运动会在边缘附近产生一致的事件，而非边缘区域则产生稀疏的噪声。我们通过基于块的时序相干性分析来利用这一点，该分析测量局部方差以提取边缘，同时稳健地抑制噪声。提取的边缘引导结构感知的高斯初始化，并在初始化、跟踪和光束平差中启用边缘加权的损失。在合成和真实数据集上的大量实验表明，E2EGS实现了卓越的重建质量和轨迹精度，为基于事件的三维重建建立了一个完全无位姿的范例。

TLDR: This paper introduces E2EGS, a novel pose-free framework for 3D reconstruction from event streams, leveraging edge information extracted via temporal coherence analysis to guide Gaussian Splatting.

简要说明: 本文介绍了 E2EGS，一个新颖的无姿态框架，用于从事件流中进行 3D 重建，利用通过时间相干分析提取的边缘信息来指导高斯溅射。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yunsoo Kim, Changki Sung, Dasol Hong, Hyun Myung

Covariance-Guided Resource Adaptive Learning for Efficient Edge Inference

Abstract (English): For deep learning inference on edge devices, hardware configurations achieving the same throughput can differ by 2$\times$ in power consumption, yet operators often struggle to find the efficient ones without exhaustive profiling. Existing approaches often rely on inefficient static presets or require expensive offline profiling that must be repeated for each new model or device. To address this problem, we present CORAL, an online optimization method that discovers near-optimal configurations without offline profiling. CORAL leverages distance covariance to statistically capture the non-linear dependencies between hardware settings, e.g., DVFS and concurrency levels, and performance metrics. Unlike prior work, we explicitly formulate the challenge as a throughput-power co-optimization problem to satisfy power budgets and throughput targets simultaneously. We evaluate CORAL on two NVIDIA Jetson devices across three object detection models ranging from lightweight to heavyweight. In single-target scenarios, CORAL achieves 96% $\unicode{x2013}$ 100% of the optimal performance found by exhaustive search. In strict dual-constraint scenarios where baselines fail or exceed power budgets, CORAL consistently finds proper configurations online with minimal exploration.

摘要（中文）: 针对边缘设备上的深度学习推理，即使硬件配置达到相同吞吐量，功耗也可能相差2倍，但通常运营商很难在不进行详尽分析的情况下找到高效的配置。现有方法往往依赖于低效的静态预设，或者需要昂贵的离线分析，而每次新模型或设备出现时都必须重复进行这些离线分析。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种在线优化方法CORAL，无需离线分析即可发现接近最优的配置。CORAL利用距离协方差来统计地捕捉硬件设置（如DVFS和并发级别）与性能指标之间的非线性依赖关系。与以往工作不同的是，我们明确地将挑战表述为一个吞吐量-功耗协同优化问题，以同时满足功耗预算和吞吐量目标。我们在两块NVIDIA Jetson设备上，针对三个从轻量级到重量级的目标检测模型评估了CORAL。在单目标场景中，CORAL达到了穷举搜索找到的最优性能的96%–100%。在严格的双约束场景中，基线方法失效或超出功耗预算，而CORAL始终能够通过最小的探索在线找到合适的配置。

TLDR: The paper introduces CORAL, an online optimization method that uses distance covariance to efficiently find near-optimal hardware configurations for deep learning inference on edge devices while considering both throughput and power constraints, avoiding exhaustive profiling.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为CORAL的在线优化方法，该方法利用距离协方差来高效寻找边缘设备上深度学习推理的近优硬件配置，同时考虑到吞吐量和功耗约束，避免了详尽的性能分析。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Ahmad N. L. Nabhaan, Zaki Sukma, Rakandhiya D. Rachmanto, Muhammad Husni Santriaji, Byungjin Cho, Arief Setyanto, In Kee Kim

SFedHIFI: Fire Rate-Based Heterogeneous Information Fusion for Spiking Federated Learning

Abstract (English): Spiking Federated Learning (SFL) has been widely studied with the energy efficiency of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs). However, existing SFL methods require model homogeneity and assume all clients have sufficient computational resources, resulting in the exclusion of some resource-constrained clients. To address the prevalent system heterogeneity in real-world scenarios, enabling heterogeneous SFL systems that allow clients to adaptively deploy models of different scales based on their local resources is crucial. To this end, we introduce SFedHIFI, a novel Spiking Federated Learning framework with Fire Rate-Based Heterogeneous Information Fusion. Specifically, SFedHIFI employs channel-wise matrix decomposition to deploy SNN models of adaptive complexity on clients with heterogeneous resources. Building on this, the proposed heterogeneous information fusion module enables cross-scale aggregation among models of different widths, thereby enhancing the utilization of diverse local knowledge. Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks demonstrate that SFedHIFI can effectively enable heterogeneous SFL, consistently outperforming all three baseline methods. Compared with ANN-based FL, it achieves significant energy savings with only a marginal trade-off in accuracy.

摘要（中文）: 突触神经元联邦学习(SFL)因其脉冲神经网络(SNNs)的能源效率而被广泛研究。然而，现有的SFL方法要求模型同质性，并假设所有客户端都拥有足够的计算资源，导致一些资源受限的客户端被排除在外。为了解决现实场景中普遍存在的系统异构性，使异构SFL系统能够允许客户端基于其本地资源自适应地部署不同规模的模型至关重要。为此，我们引入SFedHIFI，一种基于放电率的异构信息融合的全新突触神经元联邦学习框架。具体而言，SFedHIFI采用通道式矩阵分解，在具有异构资源的客户端上部署具有自适应复杂度的SNN模型。在此基础上，所提出的异构信息融合模块能够实现不同宽度的模型之间的跨尺度聚合，从而提高对多样化本地知识的利用率。在三个公共基准数据集上的大量实验表明，SFedHIFI可以有效地实现异构SFL，并始终优于所有三种基线方法。与基于ANN的FL相比，它在精度上只有很小的折衷，却实现了显著的节能效果。

TLDR: The paper introduces SFedHIFI, a novel Spiking Federated Learning framework addressing system heterogeneity by enabling adaptive model deployment and cross-scale aggregation in SNNs, achieving energy savings with minimal accuracy trade-off.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了SFedHIFI，一种新型 Spiking 联邦学习框架，通过在 SNN 中实现自适应模型部署和跨尺度聚合来解决系统异构性问题，同时在能耗方面节省显著，而精度方面的损失很小。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Ran Tao, Qiugang Zhan, Shantian Yang, Xiurui Xie, Qi Tian, Guisong Liu

Masked BRep Autoencoder via Hierarchical Graph Transformer

Abstract (English): We introduce a novel self-supervised learning framework that automatically learns representations from input computer-aided design (CAD) models for downstream tasks, including part classification, modeling segmentation, and machining feature recognition. To train our network, we construct a large-scale, unlabeled dataset of boundary representation (BRep) models. The success of our algorithm relies on two keycomponents. The first is a masked graph autoencoder that reconstructs randomly masked geometries and attributes of BReps for representation learning to enhance the generalization. The second is a hierarchical graph Transformer architecture that elegantly fuses global and local learning by a cross-scale mutual attention block to model long-range geometric dependencies and a graph neural network block to aggregate local topological information. After training the autoencoder, we replace its decoder with a task-specific network trained on a small amount of labeled data for downstream tasks. We conduct experiments on various tasks and achieve high performance, even with a small amount of labeled data, demonstrating the practicality and generalizability of our model. Compared to other methods, our model performs significantly better on downstream tasks with the same amount of training data, particularly when the training data is very limited.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了一种新颖的自监督学习框架，可以从输入的计算机辅助设计（CAD）模型中自动学习表征，用于下游任务，包括零件分类、建模分割和加工特征识别。为了训练我们的网络，我们构建了一个大规模的、未标记的边界表示（BRep）模型数据集。我们算法的成功依赖于两个关键组件。第一个是一个掩码图自编码器，它重建BRep的随机掩码几何和属性用于表征学习，以增强泛化能力。第二个是一个分层图Transformer架构，它通过跨尺度互注意力模块优雅地融合全局和局部学习，以建模长程几何依赖关系，并通过图神经网络模块聚合局部拓扑信息。在训练自编码器之后，我们将它的解码器替换为一个特定于任务的网络，该网络在少量标记数据上进行训练以适应下游任务。我们在各种任务上进行了实验并取得了出色的性能，即使使用少量标记数据也是如此，这证明了我们模型的实用性和泛化性。与其他方法相比，我们的模型在使用相同数量训练数据的情况下，在下游任务上表现明显更好，尤其是在训练数据非常有限的情况下。

TLDR: The paper introduces a self-supervised learning framework using a masked graph autoencoder with a hierarchical graph Transformer to learn representations from CAD models for downstream tasks like part classification and segmentation, showing strong performance even with limited labeled data.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种自监督学习框架，它使用带分层图Transformer的掩码图自动编码器，从CAD模型中学习表征，用于零件分类和分割等下游任务，即使在标记数据有限的情况下也表现出强大的性能。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Yifei Li, Kang Wu, Wenming Wu, Xiao-Ming Fu

Online Learning for Supervisory Switching Control

Abstract (English): We study supervisory switching control for partially-observed linear dynamical systems. The objective is to identify and deploy the best controller for the unknown system by periodically selecting among a collection of $N$ candidate controllers, some of which may destabilize the underlying system. While classical estimator-based supervisory control guarantees asymptotic stability, it lacks quantitative finite-time performance bounds. Conversely, current non-asymptotic methods in both online learning and system identification require restrictive assumptions that are incompatible in a control setting, such as system stability, which preclude testing potentially unstable controllers. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel, non-asymptotic analysis of supervisory control that adapts multi-armed bandit algorithms to address these control-theoretic challenges. Our data-driven algorithm evaluates candidate controllers via scoring criteria that leverage system observability to isolate the effects of historical states, enabling both detection of destabilizing controllers and accurate system identification. We present two algorithmic variants with dimension-free, finite-time guarantees, where each identifies the most suitable controller in $\mathcal{O}(N \log N)$ steps, while simultaneously achieving finite $L_2$-gain with respect to system disturbances.

摘要（中文）: 我们研究了部分观测线性动态系统的监督切换控制。目标是通过在 $N$ 个候选控制器集合中周期性地选择，来识别并部署最适用于未知系统的控制器，其中一些控制器可能会使底层系统不稳定。虽然经典的基于估计器的监督控制保证了渐近稳定性，但它缺乏定量的有限时间性能界限。相反，当前在线学习和系统识别中的非渐近方法需要限制性假设，这些假设在控制环境中是不兼容的，例如系统稳定性，这排除了测试潜在不稳定的控制器。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了一种新颖的监督控制的非渐近分析，它采用多臂老虎机算法来应对这些控制理论挑战。我们的数据驱动算法通过评分标准评估候选控制器，该评分标准利用系统可观测性来隔离历史状态的影响，从而能够检测到不稳定控制器并进行准确的系统识别。我们提出了两种具有与维度无关的有限时间保证的算法变体，每种算法都在 $\mathcal{O}(N \log N)$ 步中识别出最合适的控制器，同时实现相对于系统扰动的有限 $L_2$-增益。

TLDR: This paper introduces a novel online learning algorithm for supervisory switching control of partially-observed linear dynamical systems, providing finite-time performance guarantees and addressing the challenge of potentially unstable controllers.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种新型在线学习算法，用于部分可观测线性动态系统的监督切换控制，提供了有限时间的性能保证，并解决了潜在不稳定控制器的挑战。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Haoyuan Sun, Ali Jadbabaie

Encirclement Guaranteed Finite-Time Capture against Unknown Evader Strategies

Abstract (English): We consider a pursuit-evasion scenario involving a group of pursuers and a single evader in a two-dimensional unbounded environment. The pursuers aim to capture the evader in finite time while ensuring the evader remains enclosed within the convex hull of their positions until capture, without knowledge of the evader's heading angle. Prior works have addressed the problem of encirclement and capture separately in different contexts. In this paper, we present a class of strategies for the pursuers that guarantee capture in finite time while maintaining encirclement, irrespective of the evader's strategy. Furthermore, we derive an upper bound on the time to capture. Numerical results highlight the effectiveness of the proposed framework against a range of evader strategies.

摘要（中文）: 我们考虑一个在二维无界环境中，由一群追捕者和一个逃避者参与的追逐-逃避场景。追捕者的目标是在有限时间内捕获逃避者，同时确保逃避者在被捕获之前始终被包含在追捕者位置的凸包内，并且追捕者不需要知道逃避者的朝向角。以往的研究已在不同的背景下分别解决了包围和捕获问题。在本文中，我们提出了一类追捕者策略，该策略保证在有限时间内捕获逃避者，同时保持包围状态，且与逃避者的策略无关。此外，我们推导出了捕获时间的上限。数值结果突出了所提出的框架对于一系列逃避者策略的有效性。

TLDR: This paper presents encirclement strategies for multiple pursuers to capture a single evader in finite time, guaranteeing the evader remains enclosed without knowledge of the evader's heading angle. Numerical results validate the effectiveness of the method.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种包围策略，使多个追捕者在有限时间内捕获单个逃避者，保证逃避者在不知晓其航向角的情况下保持在包围圈内。数值结果验证了该方法的有效性。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: Dinesh Patra, Prajakta Surve, Ashish R. Hota, Shaunak D. Bopardikar

A Methodology for Dynamic Parameters Identification of 3-DOF Parallel Robots in Terms of Relevant Parameters

Abstract (English): The identification of dynamic parameters in mechanical systems is important for improving model-based control as well as for performing realistic dynamic simulations. Generally, when identification techniques are applied only a subset of so-called base parameters can be identified. More even, some of these parameters cannot be identified properly given that they have a small contribution to the robot dynamics and hence in the presence of noise in measurements and discrepancy in modeling, their quality of being identifiable decreases. For this reason, a strategy for dynamic parameter identification of fully parallel robots in terms of a subset called relevant parameters is put forward. The objective of the proposed methodology is to start from a full dynamic model, then simplification concerning the geometry of each link and, the symmetry due to legs of fully parallel robots, are carried out. After that, the identification is done by Weighted Least Squares. Then, with statistical considerations the model is reduced until the physical feasibility conditions are met. The application of the propose strategy has been experimentally tested on two difierent configurations of actual 3-DOF parallel robots. The response of the inverse and forward dynamics of the identified models agrees with experiments. In order to evaluate the forward dynamics response, an approach for obtaining the forward dynamics in terms of the relevant parameters is also proposed.

摘要（中文）: 机械系统中动态参数的辨识对于改进基于模型的控制以及执行逼真的动力学仿真至关重要。通常，当应用辨识技术时，只能辨识所谓的基参数的一个子集。更甚者，其中一些参数由于对机器人动力学的贡献较小，其可辨识性会降低，特别是在存在测量噪声和建模差异的情况下。因此，本文提出了一种针对全并联机器人动态参数辨识的策略，以识别被称为相关参数的子集。所提出方法的目标是从完整的动力学模型出发，然后对每个连杆的几何形状以及全并联机器人腿的对称性进行简化。之后，通过加权最小二乘法进行辨识。接着，通过统计学考量来简化模型，直到满足物理可行性条件为止。该策略的应用已在两种不同配置的实际三自由度并联机器人上进行了实验验证。所辨识模型的逆动力学和正动力学响应与实验结果相符。为了评估正动力学响应，本文还提出了一种基于相关参数获得正动力学的方法。

TLDR: This paper presents a methodology for identifying a subset of "relevant" dynamic parameters for 3-DOF parallel robots to improve model-based control and dynamic simulations, validated experimentally on actual robots.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种识别3自由度并联机器人“相关”动态参数子集的方法，以改进基于模型的控制和动态仿真，并在实际机器人上进行了实验验证。

Authors: Miguel Díaz-Rodríguez, Vicente Mata, Angel Valera, Alvaro Page

A Novel Camera-to-Robot Calibration Method for Vision-Based Floor Measurements

Abstract (English): A novel hand-eye calibration method for ground-observing mobile robots is proposed. While cameras on mobile robots are com- mon, they are rarely used for ground-observing measurement tasks. Laser trackers are increasingly used in robotics for precise localization. A referencing plate is designed to combine the two measurement modalities of laser-tracker 3D metrology and camera- based 2D imaging. It incorporates reflector nests for pose acquisition using a laser tracker and a camera calibration target that is observed by the robot-mounted camera. The procedure comprises estimating the plate pose, the plate-camera pose, and the robot pose, followed by computing the robot-camera transformation. Experiments indicate sub-millimeter repeatability.

摘要（中文）: 提出了一种用于地面观测移动机器人的新型手眼标定方法。虽然移动机器人上配备相机很常见，但它们很少被用于地面观测测量任务。激光跟踪仪越来越多地被应用于机器人技术中以实现精确定位。设计了一种参考板，用于结合激光跟踪仪三维测量和基于相机的二维成像两种测量模式。它集成了用于使用激光跟踪仪进行姿态采集的反光巢，以及机器人相机观测到的相机标定目标。该流程包括估计参考板姿态、参考板-相机姿态和机器人姿态，然后计算机器人-相机变换。实验表明具有亚毫米级重复性。

TLDR: This paper introduces a new hand-eye calibration method for ground-observing mobile robots using a combination of laser tracker and camera measurements, achieving sub-millimeter repeatability.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种新的手眼标定方法，用于地面观测移动机器人，结合了激光跟踪器和相机测量，实现了亚毫米级的重复性。

Relevance: (3/10)

Authors: Jan Andre Rudolph, Dennis Haitz, Markus Ulrich

Voronoi-based Second-order Descriptor with Whitened Metric in LiDAR Place Recognition

Abstract (English): The pooling layer plays a vital role in aggregating local descriptors into the metrizable global descriptor in the LiDAR Place Recognition (LPR). In particular, the second-order pooling is capable of capturing higher-order interactions among local descriptors. However, its existing methods in the LPR adhere to conventional implementations and post-normalization, and incur the descriptor unsuitable for Euclidean distancing. Based on the recent interpretation that associates NetVLAD with the second-order statistics, we propose to integrate second-order pooling with the inductive bias from Voronoi cells. Our novel pooling method aggregates local descriptors to form the second-order matrix and whitens the global descriptor to implicitly measure the Mahalanobis distance while conserving the cluster property from Voronoi cells, addressing its numerical instability during learning with diverse techniques. We demonstrate its performance gains through the experiments conducted on the Oxford Robotcar and Wild-Places benchmarks and analyze the numerical effect of the proposed whitening algorithm.

摘要（中文）: 池化层在激光雷达地点识别（LPR）中起着至关重要的作用，它将局部描述符聚合为可度量的全局描述符。 特别是，二阶池化能够捕捉局部描述符之间的高阶交互。 然而，现有的LPR方法遵循传统的实现和后归一化，导致描述符不适用于欧几里得距离计算。 基于最近将 NetVLAD 与二阶统计量相关联的解释，我们提出将二阶池化与 Voronoi 单元的归纳偏置相结合。 我们提出的新型池化方法聚合局部描述符形成二阶矩阵，并对全局描述符进行白化处理，以隐式地测量马氏距离，同时保留 Voronoi 单元的聚类属性，从而解决了学习过程中由于使用了各种技术而导致的数值不稳定性。 我们通过在 Oxford Robotcar 和 Wild-Places 基准数据集上进行的实验证明了其性能提升，并分析了所提出的白化算法的数值效果。

TLDR: This paper proposes a Voronoi-based second-order descriptor with whitened metric for LiDAR place recognition, aiming to improve the suitability of descriptors for Euclidean distancing. The method integrates second-order pooling with Voronoi cells and whitens the global descriptor for Mahalanobis distance measurement.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于Voronoi的二阶描述符，并采用白化度量进行激光雷达位置识别，旨在提高描述符对欧氏距离的适用性。该方法将二阶池化与Voronoi单元相结合，并对全局描述符进行白化处理，以进行马氏距离测量。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)
Overall: (4/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jaein Kim, Hee Bin Yoo, Dong-Sig Han, Byoung-Tak Zhang

Bots and Blocks: Presenting a project-based approach for robotics education

Abstract (English): To prepare students for upcoming trends and challenges, it is important to teach them about the helpful and important aspects of modern technologies, such as robotics. However, classic study programs often fail to prepare students for working in the industry because of the lack of practical experience, caused by solely theoretical lecturing. The challenge is to teach both practical and theoretical skills interactively to improve the students' learning. In the scope of the paper, a project-based learning approach is proposed, where students are taught in an agile, semester-spanning project how to work with robots. This project is part of the applied computer science degree study program Digital Technologies. The paper presents the framework as well as an exemplary project featuring the development of a disassembly software ecosystem for hardware robots. In the project, the students are taught the programming of robots with the help of the Robot Operating System (ROS). To ensure the base qualifications, the students are taught in so-called schools, an interactive mix of lectures and exercises. At the beginning of the course, the basics of the technologies are covered, while the students work more and more in their team with the robot on a specific use case. The use case here is to automate the disassembly of build block assemblies.

摘要（中文）: 为了使学生为即将到来的趋势和挑战做好准备，教授他们现代科技（如机器人技术）的有用且重要的方面至关重要。然而，由于缺乏实践经验，经典学习项目往往无法让学生为行业工作做好准备，而缺乏实践经验是纯粹的理论讲授造成的。挑战在于如何交互式地教授实践和理论技能，以提高学生的学习效果。在本文范围内，提出了一种基于项目的学习方法，学生在一个敏捷的、跨学期的项目中学习如何使用机器人。该项目是应用计算机科学学位学习项目“数字技术”的一部分。 本文介绍了该框架以及一个示例项目，该项目涉及为硬件机器人开发一个拆卸软件生态系统。 在项目中，学生们在机器人操作系统（ROS）的帮助下学习机器人的编程。为了确保基本资质，学生们在所谓的“学校”中接受教学，这是一种讲座和练习相结合的互动式教学。在课程开始的时候，涵盖了技术的基础知识，与此同时，学生们在其团队中越来越多地针对特定用例使用机器人进行工作。这里的用例是实现积木组件的自动化拆卸。

TLDR: This paper presents a project-based learning approach for robotics education, using ROS to automate the disassembly of build block assemblies, aiming to bridge the gap between theoretical knowledge and practical experience.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种基于项目的机器人教育方法，使用ROS自动拆卸积木组件，旨在弥合理论知识和实践经验之间的差距。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (3/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)
Overall: (4/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tobias Geger, Dominique Briechle, Andreas Rausch

Describing Agentic AI Systems with C4: Lessons from Industry Projects

Abstract (English): Different domains foster different architectural styles -- and thus different documentation practices (e.g., state-based models for behavioral control vs. ER-style models for information structures). Agentic AI systems exhibit another characteristic style: specialized agents collaborate by exchanging artifacts, invoking external tools, and coordinating via recurring interaction patterns and quality gates. As these systems evolve into long-lived industrial solutions, documentation must capture these style-defining concerns rather than relying on ad-hoc code sketches or pipeline drawings. This paper reports industrial experience from joint projects and derives a documentation systematics tailored to this style. Concretely, we provide (i) a style-oriented modeling vocabulary and a small set of views for agents, artifacts, tools, and their coordination patterns, (ii) a hierarchical description technique aligned with C4 to structure these views across abstraction levels, and (iii) industrial examples with lessons learned that demonstrate how the approach yields transparent, maintainable architecture documentation supporting sustained evolution.

摘要（中文）: 不同领域孕育不同的架构风格，从而也产生了不同的文档实践（例如，用于行为控制的基于状态的模型，以及用于信息结构的ER风格的模型）。自主人工智能系统呈现出另一种特性风格：专业化的代理通过交换工件、调用外部工具，以及通过循环交互模式和质量关卡进行协调来协作。随着这些系统演变为长期存在的工业解决方案，文档必须捕捉这些定义风格的关键要素，而不是依赖于临时的代码草图或流程图。本文报告了联合项目中的工业经验，并推导出一种针对此风格量身定制的文档体系。具体而言，我们提供了：（i）一种面向风格的建模词汇表和一组用于代理、工件、工具及其协调模式的视图；（ii）一种与C4对齐的分层描述技术，用于跨抽象级别构造这些视图；以及（iii）包含经验教训的工业示例，这些示例展示了该方法如何产生透明、可维护的架构文档，从而支持持续演进。

TLDR: This paper introduces a C4-aligned documentation approach tailored for agentic AI systems, focusing on capturing agents, artifacts, tools, and their coordination patterns to support maintainable architecture and sustained evolution based on industrial experience.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种针对 Agentic AI 系统的 C4 对齐文档方法，重点在于捕获代理、工件、工具及其协调模式，以支持基于工业经验的可维护架构和持续演进。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)
